Our method incorporates object-level representations during feature encoding to align image features with discrete semantic entities, then introduces multi-scale feature fusion and geometric constraints from head pose and gaze direction for fine-grained localization and object-level discrimination. Extensive experiments on GazeFollow, VideoAttentionTarget, ChildPlay, and GOO-Real demonstrate that our method achieves AUC of 0.961, 0.948, 0.987, and 0.977 respectively, delivering strong performance across all benchmarks while maintaining a compact parameter size of 7.1M.

</details>


### [108] [W4A4 Quantization for Inference on Wan2.2-I2V-A14B](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29337)
*Yidong Chen,Chengyu Shi,Jiahao Liu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文针对ICME 2026低比特大模型量化挑战赛W4A4子任务，结合MixQ混合精度和SmoothQuant通道平滑技术，在Wan2.2模型上实现了4比特权重的推理，在VBench指标上相较于FP16仅下降2-3.5%，优于原生HiFloat4基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决W4A4量化下激活值异常分布导致的大模型推理精度下降问题，提升4比特量化的实际可用性。

Method: (1) MixQ风格混合精度：对稀疏激活异常值保持较高精度；(2) SmoothQuant风格逐通道平滑：校准OpenS2V-5M批次识别重尾激活通道，在W4A4舍入前重新平衡动态范围；(3) 双分支GEMM：异常值列保持高精度，其余通道严格W4A4；(4) 块级HiF4打包应用于Wan2.2前馈线性层。

Result: 在官方VBench I2V指标上，多数质量维度距离FP16仅下降2-3.5%，运动平滑度有所提升；相比原生HiFloat4基线（在所有报告分数上相对FP16下降约5%）有显著改进。

Conclusion: 混合精度与逐通道平滑的联合策略能有效缓解W4A4量化在Wan2.2模型上的精度损失，证明了低比特量化在大规模视频生成模型上的可行性。

Abstract: We summarize our submission to Sub-Challenge 1: W4A4 Quantization for Inference (HiF4 / MXFP4) of the ICME 2026 Low-Bit-width Large-Model Quantization Challenge. The sub-challenge targets 4-bit weight and 4-bit activation inference on Wan-AI/Wan2.2-I2V-A14B under HiF4 or MXFP4 numerical formats. We adapt two complementary ideas from LLM quantization, MixQ-style mixed precision for sparse activation outliers and SmoothQuant-style per-channel smoothing, together with block-wise HiF4 packing for Wan2.2 feed-forward linear layers. Calibration on representative OpenS2V-5M batches identifies heavy-tailed activation channels; smoothing rebalances dynamic range before W4A4 rounding; and a dual-branch GEMM preserves outlier columns in higher precision while the bulk of channels use strict W4A4. On official VBench I2V metrics, our pipeline stays within 2-3.5 percent of FP16 on most quality axes and improves motion smoothness, outperforming a native HiFloat4 baseline that degrades roughly 5 percent relative to FP16 across all reported scores.

</details>


### [109] [Fast Enough to Act: Spatio-Temporal Visual Token Merging for Low-Latency Robotic VLMs and VLAs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29350)
*Junzhou Chen,Jindong Wang,Gang Zhou*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: ST-Merge是一个即插即用、无需训练的视觉token融合框架，通过在视觉编码阶段直接融合冗余token，显著降低VLM和VLA模型的推理延迟，在保持性能的同时实现2~8.3倍加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 视觉语言模型和视觉语言动作模型的输入包含海量视觉token，导致推理延迟极高，严重阻碍机器人实时控制，亟需突破这一计算瓶颈。

Method: 提出ST-Merge，即插即用、无需训练；通过显式构建3D时空坐标，采用多队列并行匹配和加权聚合机制实现跨帧冗余token的高效融合；引入合并后位置校正机制，动态重新评估加权质心的旋转位置编码以消除空间偏差。

Result: 在Qwen2.5-VL上实现2倍推理加速，精度仅损失1%；在π_{0.5} VLA策略上，1024×1024分辨率下实现8.3倍加速且成功率与基线持平，低分辨率下精度略有下降。

Conclusion: ST-Merge通过高效的时空冗余token融合，在不牺牲精度的情况下大幅降低VLM/VLA推理延迟，为机器人实时控制提供可行方案。

Abstract: Vision-language models and vision-language action models endow the robot with unprecedented capabilities. However, the input of video and high-resolution images yields a massive number of visual tokens, leading to extremely high inference latency and severely hindering the robot's real-time control. To break through this computational bottleneck, we propose ST-Merge, a plug-and-play, training-free framework that efficiently fuses redundant tokens directly during the visual encoding phase. By explicitly constructing 3D spatiotemporal coordinates, it employs a multi-queue parallel matching and weighted aggregation mechanism to achieve efficient and geometrically consistent fusion of redundant tokens across frames. In addition, we introduce a post-merge positional correction mechanism that effectively eliminates spatial deviation caused by merging by dynamically re-evaluating the rotational position code of the weighted centroid of the vision token, thereby ensuring the high-precision spatial awareness required for dexterous operation. In the Video Question Answering task on the mainstream VLM, Qwen2.5-VL, ST-Merge achieves a 2$\times$ inference speedup with only a tiny 1\% loss in precision. When deployed on the $π_{0.5}$ VLA policy, ST-Merge achieves an 8.3$\times$ speedup at 1024 $\times$ 1024 resolution and matches the baseline success rate at this high-resolution setting. At lower resolutions, it introduces a small drop in accuracy.

</details>


### [110] [Dynamic Parsing and Updating Natural Language Specification using VLMs for Robust Vision-Language Tracking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29357)
*Xiao Wang,Liye Jin,Dan Xu,Yuehang Li,Lan Chen,Yaowei Wang,Yonghong Tian,Jin Tang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于语言依赖解析机制的视觉-语言跟踪方法，通过精准提取目标对象、语义概念和背景上下文等核心跟踪主成分，并利用Qwen-VL模型进行组件感知的自适应文本描述更新，有效解决了现有方法中目标更新错误、背景干扰和幻觉伪影等问题，在多个基准测试上取得一致优越性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视觉-语言跟踪方法通过序列模型或大语言模型直接生成文本描述，但存在目标更新错误、背景过度干扰和幻觉伪影等固有缺陷，导致语义-视觉不匹配问题未能有效解决。

Method: 提出语言依赖解析机制，精准蒸馏目标对象、语义概念和背景上下文等核心跟踪主成分；在此基础上，利用预训练视觉-语言模型Qwen-VL的跨模态理解能力，进行组件感知的自适应文本描述更新。

Result: 在TNL2K、LaSOT、TNLLT和OTB-LANG等多个大规模视觉-语言跟踪基准上取得一致且优越的跟踪性能。

Conclusion: 通过精心设计的模块集成到基线框架中，所提方法能有效缓解语义-视觉不匹配问题，显著提升跟踪精度和鲁棒性。

Abstract: Vision-language tracking guided by natural language specifications leverages high-level semantic cues of target objects to substantially boost tracking accuracy and robustness. Existing studies have verified that adaptively optimizing textual descriptions throughout the tracking process can effectively mitigate the semantic-visual mismatch induced by dynamic variations in target appearance, position, and other inherent attributes. Nevertheless, mainstream methods that directly generate textual information via sequence models or large language models inevitably suffer from inherent defects, including erroneous target updating, excessive background distraction, and pervasive hallucination artifacts. To address the aforementioned limitations, this paper proposes a novel language dependency parsing mechanism to precisely distill core tracking principal components, encompassing target objects, semantic concepts, and background contextual information. On this basis, we perform component-aware adaptive textual description updates by exploiting the powerful cross-modal understanding capability of the pre-trained vision-language model Qwen-VL. By integrating the proposed elaborately designed modules into the baseline framework, our method achieves consistent and superior tracking performance on multiple large-scale vision-language tracking benchmarks, including TNL2K, LaSOT, TNLLT, and OTB-LANG. The source code and pre-trained models will be released at https://github.com/Event-AHU/Open_VLTrack.

</details>


### [111] [SAFE-DiT: Semantics-Aware Fast-path Execution for High-Resolution Diffusion Transformers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29360)
*Xuanhua Yin,Yuxuan Jia,Chuanzhi Xu,Weidong Cai*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出SAFE-DiT框架，通过识别并消除DiT推理中冗余的空间自注意力掩码（称为MIDT瓶颈），在不重新引入掩码的情况下实现训练无关的加速。在Lumina-Next上，SAFE-DiT实现2.69倍（1024²）至5.09倍（2560²）端到端加速，峰值内存从94.1GB降至27.9GB，并支持3072²分辨率生成，且视觉质量非劣于基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高分辨率DiT推理存在大量空间冗余，但现有空间自适应实现通过注意力掩码编码区域计算，导致缩放点积注意力偏离FlashAttention快速路径，产生Mask-Induced Dispatch Tax (MIDT)系统瓶颈，且随序列长度增长而加剧。

Method: 提出SAFE-DiT框架：1) 精确掩码消除——仅移除经证明在注意力logits中引入行向常数偏移的图像自注意力冗余掩码，保留语义掩码（如文本填充掩码）；2) 近似空间调度——通过提示条件化token分区、选择性状态更新（结合全局上下文）和周期性上下文刷新实现空间自适应；3) SAFE-Core为纯加速配置，SAFE-DiT+SW额外报告敏感性加权无分类器引导。

Result: 冗余掩码使长序列注意力比无掩码路径慢4.1-5.8倍。Lumina-Next上：1024²分辨率加速2.69倍，2560²加速5.09倍；2560²峰值内存从94.1GB降至27.9GB；支持3072²生成（密集推理显存不足）。成对指标、组件消融和盲人研究支持SAFE-Core视觉非劣性。

Conclusion: SAFE-DiT有效解决了DiT推理中掩码导致的系统级加速瓶颈，在不牺牲视觉质量的前提下实现大幅加速和显存节省，且无需重新训练。SAFE-DiT+SW提供了额外的提示对齐操作点。

Abstract: High-resolution Diffusion Transformer (DiT) inference contains substantial spatial redundancy, but many spatially adaptive implementations encode regional computation as attention masks, which can inadvertently move scaled dot-product attention (SDPA) away from FlashAttention fast paths. We identify this avoidable systems bottleneck as Mask-Induced Dispatch Tax (MIDT) and show that it grows with latent sequence length. We introduce SAFE-DiT, a training-free Semantics-Aware Fast-path Execution framework that separates exact mask elision from approximation-based spatial scheduling. SAFE-DiT removes only provenance-certified image self-attention masks that induce a row-wise constant shift in attention logits, preserves semantics-bearing masks such as text-padding masks, and realizes spatial adaptation through prompt-conditioned token partitioning, selective state updates with global context, and periodic context refresh. We call this acceleration-only configuration SAFE-Core and report sensitivity-weighted classifier-free guidance separately as SAFE-DiT+SW. On the evaluated PyTorch SDPA stack, redundant masks make long-sequence attention $4.1\times$ to $5.8\times$ slower than the mask-free path. On Lumina-Next, SAFE-DiT achieves $2.69\times$ end-to-end acceleration at $1024^2$ resolution and $5.09\times$ at $2560^2$, reduces peak memory at $2560^2$ from 94.1 to 27.9 GB, and enables $3072^2$ generation when dense inference runs out of memory. Paired metrics, component ablations, and a blinded human study support visual non-inferiority of SAFE-Core to the dense fast-path baseline, while SAFE-DiT+SW provides a separate prompt-alignment operating point without reintroducing spatial self-attention masks. Code is available at https://github.com/xuanhuayin/SAFE-DiT.

</details>


### [112] [SAD-GS: Learning Reliable 3D Semantic Gaussian Fields via Dynamic Geo-Semantic Anchoring](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29376)
*Yufei Zhang,Chenlu Zhan,Gaoang Wang,Hongwei Wang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: SAD-GS通过动态地理语义锚定机制（语义锚点蒸馏+地理语义反馈循环）解决多视图2D监督中语义漂移和边界泄漏问题，在开放词汇定位和语义分割任务上取得最优性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有开放词汇3D语义高斯场学习依赖多视图2D监督，但2D目标存在视角依赖特征导致的语义身份漂移、传播跟踪掩码导致的边界泄漏和身份切换问题，直接优化不可靠的2D目标会导致错误累积。

Method: 提出SAD-GS框架：1）语义锚点蒸馏（SAD）将每视图视觉嵌入蒸馏为共识文本锚点，建立视角不变的语义身份；2）地理语义反馈循环（GSFL）利用演化的3D场主动过滤跟踪异常，并通过保守三门更新规则优化空间掩码分配。

Result: 在LERF-OVS、3D-OVS和Mip-NeRF360数据集上，SAD-GS在开放词汇定位和语义分割任务中均取得最佳综合性能。

Conclusion: 动态地理语义锚定机制能够有效学习可靠的3D语义高斯场，验证了其鲁棒性和有效性。

Abstract: Open-vocabulary 3D semantic Gaussian field learning relies on multi-view 2D supervision, whose semantic targets and spatial assignments are often unreliable. Across varying viewpoints, view-dependent features cause semantic identity drift, while propagated tracker masks introduce boundary leakage and identity switches. Directly optimizing against these unreliable 2D targets forces the 3D representation to absorb multi-view contradictions, leading to severe error accumulation. To resolve this limitation, we propose SAD-GS, a framework for learning reliable 3D semantic Gaussian fields via dynamic geo-semantic anchoring. Specifically, Semantic Anchor Distillation (SAD) distills per-view visual embeddings into consensus text anchors to establish a viewpoint-invariant semantic identity. Concurrently, the Geo-Semantic Feedback Loop (GSFL) leverages the evolving 3D field to actively filter tracker anomalies and refine spatial mask assignments via a conservative three-gate update rule. Extensive evaluations on LERF-OVS, 3D-OVS, and Mip-NeRF360 show that SAD-GS consistently achieves the best overall performance in both open-vocabulary localization and semantic segmentation. These comprehensive improvements validate the effectiveness and robustness of dynamic geo-semantic anchoring for reliable 3D semantic Gaussian field learning.

</details>


### [113] [Event-VLA: Action-Conditioned Event Fusion for Robust Vision-Language-Action Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29384)
*Jiaxin Liu,Xun Xu,Zhenhao Zhang,Hanqing Wang,Ruiqi Chen,Shi Chang,Weiyu Guo,Laurent Kneip*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: Event-VLA是一个事件增强的视觉-语言-动作框架，通过引入事件流（event streams）作为补充观测，解决机器人操作在光照变化条件下的鲁棒性问题。它采用动作查询路由路径，利用可学习的动作查询从VLA推理过程中提取任务相关语义，并通过门控交叉注意力选择性聚合事件令牌，在不破坏预训练RGB-语言语义先验的情况下提升动作预测鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLA模型通常假设光照良好的稳定室内环境，而真实世界的机器人操作可能面临光照变化导致的RGB观测退化，这给机器人操作的鲁棒性带来严峻挑战。为解决这一问题，作者提出Event-VLA框架。

Method: Event-VLA引入事件流作为对光照鲁棒、对运动敏感的互补观测。它通过动作查询路由路径注入事件信息：使用可学习的动作查询从VLA推理过程中提取任务相关语义，并通过门控交叉注意力选择性聚合事件令牌，构建事件感知的动作表示，从而保留预训练的RGB-语言语义先验。

Result: 在仿真和真实世界实验中，Event-VLA在正常光照下保持良好操作性能，并在低光退化和近黑暗的真实环境中提高了操作成功率。

Conclusion: Event-VLA通过事件增强的方式有效提升了VLA模型在光照变化条件下的操作鲁棒性，验证了事件流作为互补模态在机器人操作中的价值。

Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have become an important paradigm of embodied AI. However, existing VLA models typically assume well-lit and stable indoor settings, while real-world embodied manipulation may involve degraded RGB observations caused by illumination shifts, posing critical challenges for robust robotic manipulation. To address this gap, we propose \textbf{Event-VLA}, an event-enhanced VLA framework for generalizable manipulation across varying illumination conditions. We formulate VLA-based manipulation under degraded visibility as a practical robustness problem for RGB-centric policies, and introduce event streams as an illumination-robust, motion-sensitive complementary observation to improve robustness across visibility levels. Specifically, unlike conventional multimodal fusion that directly merges event features into the global semantic token space, Event-VLA injects event information through an action-query routing pathway. It uses learnable action queries to extract task-relevant semantics from the VLA reasoning process, and selectively aggregates event tokens via gated cross-attention to construct event-aware action representations. This design preserves the pretrained RGB-language semantic priors while effectively leveraging event information for robust action prediction. Experiments in simulation and real-world deployment show that Event-VLA maintains strong manipulation performance under normal lighting and improves success rates under low-light degradation and near-dark real-world settings.

</details>


### [114] [NaLA: A 3D Native LLM Layout Agent for High-quality 3D Scene Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29395)
*Cheng Wan,Yongsen Mao,Wenzheng Wu,Yuxuan Xie,Chucheng Xiang,Runze Wang,Xiang Zhang,Zhongyuan Liu,Rushi Dai,Yuan Liu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: NaLA提出了一种原生3D LLM布局智能体，通过直接编码3D资产和场景边界到LLM中，并采用粗到细的预测机制（自回归离散预测+连续回归精化），生成高质量3D场景布局，优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于文本描述作为输入输出的3D布局智能体存在严重的模态差距，导致文本与3D资产及3D布局之间的信息损失，从而产生不合理的布局生成。

Method: NaLA将3D场景边界和3D资产直接编码到LLM中，保留细粒度几何信息并支持碰撞、表面支撑和包含关系等显式推理；采用粗到细预测机制，先自回归预测离散位姿，再通过连续回归进行精化。

Result: 在多样化布局数据集上，NaLA在生成质量和推理效率上均优于先前的布局智能体，并通过消融实验验证了各组件的有效性。

Conclusion: NaLA通过原生3D编码和粗到细位姿预测，有效弥合了文本与3D之间的模态差距，实现了高质量且几何一致的3D场景布局生成。

Abstract: Recently, Large Language Models (LLMs) have emerged as promising layout agents for 3D scene generation. Existing layout agents still suffer from implausible layout generation because most of them convert 3D assets and 3D layouts into textual descriptions as inputs and outputs, which involves severe information loss due to the modality gap between texts and 3D assets and 3D layouts. We propose NaLA, a native 3D LLM layout Agent for high-quality 3D scene generation by placing 3D assets in the scene. For the inputs, NaLA encodes 3D scene boundaries and 3D assets directly into the LLM, preserving fine-grained geometry and enabling explicit reasoning over relationships like collisions, surface supporting, and containment. To accurately output the positions and orientations of assets, NaLA adopts a coarse-to-fine prediction mechanism that first predicts discrete poses in an autoregressive manner and then refines the discrete poses with a continuous regression. Trained on diverse layout datasets, NaLA attains strong geometric perception and layout coherence. Experiments demonstrate that NaLA outperforms prior layout agents in both generation quality and inference efficiency, with comprehensive ablation studies to verify each component's effectiveness.

</details>


### [115] [FiRe: Frequency Reparameterization as a Preconditioner for Periodic Implicit Neural Representations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29414)
*Harinandan Shukla,Rajarshi Verma,Jitin Singla*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: FiRe是一种针对周期性隐式神经表示（如SIREN、FINER）的频重参数化方法，通过低秩门控路径为每个神经元赋予输入依赖的边界频率，作为隐式预条件子改善NTK条件数，从而加速优化收敛，在2D图像拟合任务中提升PSNR（短训练预算下可达+1 dB）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 周期性INR（如SIREN、FINER）为所有神经元分配相同全局频率，当局部信号内容变化时，代表性预算利用效率低下，导致优化收敛慢。

Method: FiRe通过一个独立的低秩门控路径为每个神经元提供有界的、输入依赖的频率，可应用于任何周期性激活函数。该门控作为隐式预条件子，通过神经正切核（NTK）改善初始化时的优化条件。

Result: 在2D图像拟合任务中，FiRe相较于参数匹配基线提升PSNR（短训练预算下可达+1 dB），增益随分辨率和训练预算变化，并在完全收敛时减弱。

Conclusion: FiRe通过频率重参数化加速周期性INR优化收敛，高频重建内容在固定计算预算下更紧密追踪目标，增益受分辨率、秩和训练预算影响，NTK分析可预测这些趋势。

Abstract: Periodic Implicit Neural Representations (INRs) such as SIREN and FINER assign every neuron, the same global frequency, spending the representational budget inefficiently when local signal content varies. We introduce FiRe (Frequency Reparameterization), that accelerates optimization by reparameterizing per-neuron frequency of periodic INRs without changing their underlying activation function. FiRe gives each neuron a bounded, input-dependent frequency via a separate low-rank gating path and is applicable to any periodic activation function. The gate acts as an implicit preconditioner that improves optimization conditioning at initialization via the Neural Tangent Kernel (NTK). This better-conditioned initialization makes optimization converge faster, and the high-frequency content of the reconstruction tracks the target more closely at a fixed computational budget. On 2D image fitting, FiRe increases PSNR over a parameter-matched baseline (up to +1 dB at short training budgets), with gains that vary with resolution and diminish at full convergence. We characterize how performance depends on resolution, rank, and training budget, and give an NTK account that predicts these trends.

</details>


### [116] [Tool-Augmented Spatiotemporal Reasoning for Streamlining Video Question Answering Task](https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.10359)
*Sunqi Fan,Jiashuo Cui,Meng-Hao Guo,Shuojin Yang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种视频工具包和时空推理框架STAR，通过轻量级工具增强MLLM的时空推理能力，在VideoMME和LongVideoBench上分别提升8.2%和4.6%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MLLM在复杂、推理密集的VideoQA任务上难以同时建模视频帧内的空间关系和理解时间演变的因果动态。

Method: 为MLLM配备全面可扩展的视频工具包以增强时空推理能力，并提出STAR框架，通过策略性调度时间和空间工具来逐步定位视频关键区域，避免工具链短路问题。

Result: STAR框架使用轻量工具增强GPT-4o，在VideoMME上提升8.2%，在LongVideoBench上提升4.6%。

Conclusion: 提出的视频工具包和STAR框架在构建自主智能的视频分析助手方面迈出了重要一步。

Abstract: Video Question Answering (VideoQA) task serves as a critical playground for evaluating whether foundation models can effectively perceive, understand, and reason about dynamic real-world scenarios. However, existing Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) struggle with simultaneously modeling spatial relationships within video frames and understanding the causal dynamics of temporal evolution on complex and reasoning-intensive VideoQA task. In this work, we equip MLLM with a comprehensive and extensible Video Toolkit, to enhance MLLM's spatiotemporal reasoning capabilities and ensure the harmony between the quantity and diversity of tools. To better control the tool invocation sequence and avoid toolchain shortcut issues, we propose a Spatiotemporal Reasoning Framework (STAR) that strategically schedules temporal and spatial tools, thereby progressively localizing the key area in the video. Our STAR framework enhances GPT-4o using lightweight tools, achieving an 8.2% gain on VideoMME and 4.6% on LongVideoBench. We believe that our proposed Video Toolkit and STAR framework make an important step towards building autonomous and intelligent video analysis assistants. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/fansunqi/VideoTool.

</details>


### [117] [Can Machines Really See Objects in Images? A Study Based on Syntactic Distance and Visual Self-Referential Instances](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29416)
*Xingyu Peng,Junran Wu,Yue Hou,Zhongliang Qiao,Jiaheng Liu,Shangzhe Li,Jichang Zhao,Wenjun Wu,Xianglong Liu,Yongxin Tong,Li Dong,Ke Xu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出“句法距离”概念衡量视觉模型对全局语义的识别能力。通过构造最大方差二值噪声中的视觉自指任务（闭合正方形vs边界像素翻转的正方形），两类样本全局语义不同但句法距离为零。实验发现ResNet和ViT存在相变现象：超过临界图像尺度后准确率骤降至随机猜测，更大数据集和模型仅延迟崩溃，全局注意力ViT反而更早崩溃。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究视觉模型是否真正理解全局语义，还是仅利用局部统计线索进行识别。基于维特根斯坦“语言的界限即世界的界限”观点，认为模型识别能力受限于其习得的描述系统，而当前模型主要利用局部特征表示。作者想知道当局部线索无法提供稳定区分依据时，模型是否仍能正确分类。

Method: 1) 形式化定义句法距离：通过操作对称性衡量类别可分性，正距离存在可被利用的局部特征，零距离需要全局语义。2) 构造视觉自指任务：最大方差二值噪声中，正样本含闭合正方形，负样本含一个边界像素翻转的相似正方形，两类句法距离为零。3) 在ResNet和Vision Transformer上进行实验，测试不同图像尺度下的分类准确率。

Result: 1) 存在一致的相变现象：准确率在超过临界图像尺度后骤降至随机猜测水平，且在该测试范围内不可恢复。2) 更大训练集和模型规模仅推迟崩溃发生。3) 全局注意力机制的ViT比局部卷积的ResNet更早达到崩溃点。

Conclusion: 当前视觉架构在处理全局概念任务时存在结构性能力边界，仅通过扩大数据和模型规模无法根本解决。这表明通用智能可能需要创造新的语言（描述系统）而非复用现有特征表示。

Abstract: Can a vision model truly see an object, or does it only fit surface-level visual cues? Following Wittgenstein's view that the limits of language are the limits of the world, we view a model's recognition ability as bounded by the descriptive system it has learned. In current vision models, this system is often realized through learned feature representations that exploit local statistical cues. We therefore ask whether a model can still classify correctly when such local cues provide no stable basis for distinction. We formalize this question with syntactic distance, which measures class separability through the symmetry of the operations mapping one class to the other: positive distance exposes exploitable local features, whereas zero distance requires global semantics rather than local rules. We construct a visual self-referential task in maximum-variance binary noise: positive samples contain a closed square, while negative samples contain an otherwise identical square with one flipped boundary pixel. The two classes differ in global semantics but have zero syntactic distance, making local statistical shortcuts unreliable. Experiments on ResNets and Vision Transformers reveal a consistent phase-transition phenomenon, with accuracy collapsing to random guessing once the image scale crosses a critical point and does not recover within the tested range. Larger training sets and models only delay this collapse, while globally attentive ViTs reach it earlier. These results reveal a structural capability boundary of current architectures on global-concept tasks, suggesting that general intelligence may require creating new language, not reusing an existing one.

</details>


### [118] [Bit-ViP: Leveraging Bit-planes to Preserve Visual Privacy in Images through Obfuscation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29417)
*Vishesh Kumar Tanwar,Ashish Gupta,Sanjay Madria,Sajal K. Das*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于位平面的图像模糊方案Bit-ViP，结合Lorenz混沌系统和差分隐私生成不可逆噪声，在保护视觉隐私的同时保持图像可用性，并在UCF101和HMDB51数据集上验证了其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着计算机视觉应用（如监控系统和社交媒体）的快速增长，存储在云服务器上的数据面临安全和视觉隐私问题。现有图像模糊方案要么易受恶意攻击（如模型反转攻击可重建原始图像），要么生成不可训练的模糊图像导致准确率低下。

Method: 提出了一种新颖的基于位平面的图像模糊方案Bit-ViP，通过端到端的模糊函数，利用Lorenz混沌系统和差分隐私生成不可逆噪声，使模糊图像包含非可逆噪声，阻止攻击者重建原始图像。

Result: 在UCF101和HMDB51两个流行活动识别数据集上进行了广泛实验，并在面对重建攻击、像素频率、信息熵和像素互相关攻击时进行了严格的安全性分析，证明相比现有方案有显著改进。

Conclusion: Bit-ViP方案能够生成安全且可训练的模糊图像，在保护视觉隐私的同时保持合理的识别准确率，有效抵御多种攻击。

Abstract: The unprecedented growth of computer vision applications, such as surveillance systems and social media, raises security and visual privacy concerns, especially when data is stored on cloud servers. Image obfuscation offers a way to preserve visual privacy while maintaining an adequate level of usability; thus, it has been a topic of great interest in recent years. However, prior obfuscation schemes are either vulnerable to malicious attacks, such as model inversion to reconstruct original images from obfuscated images, or generate non-trainable obfuscated images, making them unusable for achieving reasonable accuracy. This paper proposes a novel bit-plane-based image obfuscation scheme, {\em Bit-ViP}, to preserve visual privacy for image-based recognition tasks. The Bit-ViP scheme produces secure, usable images by incorporating an innovative end-to-end obfuscation function. While doing so, the obfuscated image would contain non-invertible noise (generated by Lorenz's chaotic system and differential privacy), making it hard for an adversary to reconstruct the original image. We conduct extensive experiments on two popular activity recognition datasets, namely UCF101 and HMDB51, to validate the effectiveness of Bit-ViP. In the face of attacks on reconstruction, pixel frequency, information entropy, and pixel inter-correlation, we present a rigorous security analysis demonstrating tangible improvements over existing schemes.

</details>


### [119] [Robust Zero-shot Anomaly Detection under Limited Auxiliary Anomaly Priors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29428)
*Guanyu Lu,Fang Zhou,Cheqing Jin*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: DIVE是一种针对有限异常先验知识下的零样本异常检测方法，通过浅层与深层文本嵌入注入策略和视觉-文本解耦机制，在异常模式有限的辅助数据训练下，在十二个数据集上超越SOTA方法最高达47%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有零样本异常检测方法假设辅助数据包含丰富的异常多样性，忽略了真实目标域中更复杂和不可预测的变化。本文首次研究有限辅助异常先验的场景，并解决由此导致的性能严重下降问题。

Method: 提出DIVE方法，包括：(1) 浅层与深层文本嵌入注入策略（shallow-and-deep text embedding injection），在视觉编码过程中学习跨辅助训练域和多样目标域的通用异常概念；(2) 解耦机制（disentanglement mechanism），解决与对象语义纠缠的视觉嵌入与对象无关的文本提示之间的次优对齐问题。

Result: 在有限异常模式设置下，十二个数据集平均性能：分类指标超越SOTA 16.2%和28.5%；分割指标超越23.4%、24.1%和47.0%。在辅助数据具有充分异常多样性时，仍保持高度竞争性能。

Conclusion: DIVE在有限异常先验的零样本异常检测场景下显著优于现有方法，同时在高多样性辅助数据下仍保持竞争力，验证了所提策略的有效性和通用性。

Abstract: Zero-shot anomaly detection aims to identify defects in arbitrary novel domains; however, existing models assume that the auxiliary data contains a rich diversity of anomalies, neglecting the far more complex and unpredictable variations in real-world target domains. This study introduces DIVE, the first approach to investigate the scenario of limited auxiliary anomaly priors and resolve the resulting substantial performance degradation. Through a shallow-and-deep text embedding injection strategy during visual encoding, DIVE learns to abstract generic anomaly concepts shared across the auxiliary training domain and diverse target domains. Moreover, we propose a disentanglement mechanism to tackle the suboptimal alignment between visual embeddings entangled with object semantics and object-agnostic textual prompts. Experiments demonstrate that, under the setting of limited anomaly patterns in auxiliary data, DIVE outperforms SOTA baselines by up to 16.2% and 28.5% on two classification metrics, and 23.4%, 24.1%, and 47.0% on three segmentation metrics, in terms of average performance across twelve datasets. Furthermore, it maintains highly competitive performance when auxiliary data exhibits sufficient anomaly diversity.

</details>


### [120] [EvLIR: Learning Illumination Residuals from Ordered Events for Low-Light Image Enhancement](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29430)
*Haoxian Zhou,Chuanzhi Xu,Langyi Chen,Pengfei Ye,Haodong Chen,Qiang Qu,Ali Anaissi,Weidong Cai*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: EvLIR提出了一种时序残差增强框架，利用有序事件流和ConvGRU时序建模进行低光图像增强，在四个基准测试的12个指标对中取得了11个最优结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 低光图像增强在输入帧存在结构缺失、饱和噪声和弱局部对比度时严重病态。事件相机提供高时间分辨率的异步亮度变化观测，但先前工作通常将体素通道视为无序或静态特征堆叠，忽略了窗口内的时间演化，削弱了事件的有用时序证据。

Method: 提出EvLIR框架，保留事件流的有序时间bin，引入时序事件残差模块(TERM)使用轻量级ConvGRU编码短窗口事件动态，将时序状态转换为有界照明校正，为Retinex-style照明估计提供空间自适应光度引导，并执行可靠性感知的图像-事件恢复。

Result: 在SDE和SDSD室内/室外基准上，EvLIR在12个数据集-指标对中取得11个最佳结果，四个基准测试的平均PSNR为25.63dB，PSNR*为28.30dB，SSIM为0.827。

Conclusion: 通过对事件流有序时序的显式建模，EvLIR有效利用了事件的时间证据，显著提升了低光图像增强的性能。

Abstract: Low-light image enhancement is severely ill-posed when the input frame contains missing structure, saturated noise, and weak local contrast. Event cameras provide asynchronous brightness-change observations with high temporal resolution, but prior works often treat voxel channels as an unordered or static feature stack before fusion, rather than explicitly modeling their within-window temporal evolution, weakening the temporal evidence that makes events useful. We propose EvLIR, a temporal-residual enhancement framework that learns illumination residuals from ordered events for low-light image enhancement. Given a low-light frame and its aligned event voxel, EvLIR preserves the ordered temporal bins of the event stream and introduces a Temporal Event Residual Module (TERM) to encode short-window event dynamics with a lightweight ConvGRU. The resulting temporal state is converted into a bounded illumination correction, which provides spatially adaptive photometric guidance for Retinex-style illumination estimation and subsequent reliability-aware image-event restoration. On SDE and SDSD indoor/outdoor benchmarks, EvLIR achieves the best result on eleven of twelve dataset-metric pairs, with average scores of 25.63~dB PSNR, 28.30~dB PSNR*, and 0.827 SSIM across the four benchmarks.

</details>


### [121] [Bridging VideoQA and Video-Guided Agentic Tasks via Generalized Keyframe Extraction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29445)
*Sunqi Fan,Qingle Liu,Runqi Yin,Meng-Hao Guo,Shuojin Yang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了VG-GUIBench基准，用于评估MLLM-based GUI代理能否跟随视频教程完成GUI交互任务；同时提出TASKER关键帧提取算法，联合考虑任务相关性和场景动态，在VideoQA和视频引导代理任务上均取得显著提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视频理解基准主要评估模型感知浅层视觉线索的能力，极少检验MLLM能否从视频教程中学习深层知识或程序性技能并将其泛化到下游长周期代理任务中。

Method: 1) 提出VG-GUIBench基准，评估MLLM-based GUI代理跟随视频教程完成GUI交互任务的能力；2) 提出TASKER关键帧提取算法，联合建模任务相关性与场景动态以筛选信息帧。

Result: TASKER在EgoSchema fullset上超越最佳基线2.0%，在NExT-QA上超越1.8%。

Conclusion: 通用关键帧提取方法对视频理解任务具有重要潜力。

Abstract: Video understanding is a fundamental capability for multimodal intelligence, and recent Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have achieved remarkable performance on Video Question Answering (VideoQA) benchmarks. However, existing benchmarks primarily evaluate whether models can perceive shallow visual cues, while rarely examining whether MLLMs can learn deeper knowledge or procedural skills from video tutorials and generalize them to downstream long-horizon agentic tasks. To address this gap, we introduce VG-GUIBench (Video-Guided GUI Benchmark), a new benchmark designed to evaluate whether MLLM-based GUI agents can follow video tutorials to complete corresponding GUI interactive tasks. Furthermore, we observe that the performance of models on both VideoQA and video-guided agentic tasks critically depends on effective keyframe extraction. Based on this observation, we propose TASKER (Task-driven And Scene-aware Keyframe searchER), a keyframe extraction algorithm that jointly considers task relevance and scene dynamics to identify informative frames. Experimental results demonstrate that TASKER achieves significant performance improvements on both VideoQA and video-guided agentic task benchmarks, outperforming the best baseline by 2.0% on the EgoSchema fullset and 1.8% on the NExT-QA dataset, respectively. These results further highlight the potential of generalized keyframe extraction methods for video understanding tasks. Our code and data are available at https://github.com/VG-GUI-TASKER/VG-GUI-TASKER.

</details>


### [122] [Miti360: A Comprehensive Dataset for Improved Reforestation Monitoring](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29447)
*Cedric Kiplimo,Samuel Mbatia,Ciira wa Maina,Arthur Sichangi,Dennis Gitundu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文介绍了Miti360数据集，这是一个覆盖肯尼亚Kieni森林770公顷区域的综合数据集，包含高分辨率航拍图像、地面图像、树木参数和气象数据，填补了非洲林业监测数据的空白。通过在Miti360上微调DeepForest模型，框精确度提升12%，框召回率提升69%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的机器学习森林监测训练数据集主要来自北美、欧洲、亚洲和澳大利亚，缺乏非洲林业数据，地理多样性不足，难以支持非洲地区的森林监测和再造林工作。

Method: 在肯尼亚Kieni森林770公顷再造林区域，于2023年3月至2025年2月期间采集数据。航拍使用DJI Mavic 2 Pro，通过Agisoft Metashape拼接、ArcGIS Pro切片；地面图像使用智能手机和定制立体相机。数据集包含正射影像、带树木边界框标注的瓦片、地面图像、树木生物物理参数、物种、GPS坐标及历史气象数据。

Result: 成功跟踪了三年间的树冠变化；通过在Miti360上微调DeepForest模型，框精确度提升12%，框召回率提升69%。

Conclusion: Miti360数据集能有效支持ML系统训练，用于加速树木普查、物种-区域匹配、基于气象条件的生长建模以及数字孪生框架开发，推动撒哈拉以南非洲地区的再造林监测和可持续林业实践。

Abstract: Over the past decade, interest in applying machine learning (ML) to automate forest monitoring has grown significantly. However, existing training datasets are predominantly drawn from North America, Europe, Asia, and Australia, leaving a critical gap in African forestry data. To address this limited geographic diversity, we present Miti360, a comprehensive dataset for reforestation monitoring that comprises high-resolution imagery, ground truth data, and longitudinal weather data. Data collection occurred within a 770-ha reforested section of the Kieni Forest in Kenya between March 2023 and February 2025. Miti360 comprises aerial photos (orthophotos and tiles) with tree bounding box annotations, terrestrial images (single and stereo), and detailed data records including tree biophysical parameters, species, and GPS coordinates, alongside historical weather data. Aerial surveys utilized a DJI Mavic 2 Pro, with imagery stitched via Agisoft Metashape and tiled using ArcGIS Pro, while terrestrial captures used smartphones and custom stereo cameras. Miti360 enables the training of ML systems for tasks such as accelerating tree censuses, matching species to geographical areas, modelling growth based on weather conditions, and developing digital twin frameworks. Models can be trained on Miti360 to address challenges specific to Sub-Saharan Africa, ultimately advancing reforestation monitoring and fostering sustainable forestry practices in underrepresented regions. We demonstrate the utility of this dataset by successfully tracking tree crowns across three years and improving the DeepForest model's box precision and box recall by 12% and 69% respectively through fine-tuning on Miti360.

</details>


### [123] [The Platonic Defense: Backdoor Defense for Self-Supervised Encoders in the Era of Large Scale Pre-training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29451)
*Tuo Chen,Minjing Dong,Benlei Cui,Jian Liu,Jie Gui*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出一种名为"柏拉图表示防御"的黑盒测试时防御范式，利用预训练编码器间表示趋同的特性，通过条件能量函数进行后门攻击检测与表示净化，在多种自监督编码器和10余种攻击上取得显著效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自监督学习预训练模型易受后门攻击，现有防御方法在完全黑盒场景下难以生效，因为它们通常需要访问标签、攻击模式或训练数据。

Method: 提出柏拉图表示防御（Platonic Representation Defense），基于柏拉图表示假说——独立训练的大规模编码器会收敛到同一现实的一致投影。将防御形式化为条件能量函数，通过噪声对比估计进行检测训练，通过去噪分数匹配进行表示净化。能量函数定义在源表示与一组参考表示之间。

Result: 在多种自监督编码器和10余种攻击上验证了有效性，方法可同时进行表示检测和净化，在多种攻击下均取得显著的性能提升。

Conclusion: 该防御范式是攻击无关、模型无关、模态无关的黑盒测试时防御，理论上能量间隙被源与参考表示间的互信息下界约束。

Abstract: Self-supervised learning (SSL) pretrained models have become a dominant paradigm for visual representation learning, but they are vulnerable to backdoor attacks. Existing defenses struggle to defend against such attacks in a fully black-box setting because they often require access to labels, attack patterns, or training data. To tackle this issue, we propose a new attack-agnostic, model-agnostic, and modality-agnostic black-box test-time defense paradigm, called \emph{Platonic Representation Defense}. It is inspired by the Platonic Representation Hypothesis, which suggests that large-scale independently trained encoders converge toward compatible projections of the same underlying reality. We formalize this idea as a conditional energy function defined over source representations and a set of reference representations. The energy function is trained for detection through noise-contrastive estimation and for representation purification through denoising score matching. Theoretically, the energy gap between matched and mismatched samples is lower bounded by the mutual information between source and reference representations. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our method on multiple self-supervised encoders and more than 10 attacks. The method can perform both representation detection and purification, and achieves substantial performance gains across multiple attacks. Code is available \href{https://github.com/jsrdcht/Platonic-Representation-Defense}{here}.

</details>


### [124] [From Phase to Phenomenon: Self-Supervised Learning of Subsurface Scattering with Minimal Phase-shift Inputs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29461)
*Arjun Majumdar,Raphael Braun,Andreas Engelhardt,Hendrik PA. Lensch*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出一种自监督预训练框架，仅用每视角8张高频相移轮廓测量图像即可学习次表面散射光传输表示，通过专用数据增强和损失函数，在重光照等下游任务中实现高保真重建，所需图像量较先前方法减少数个数量级。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有SSS光传输学习需要大量输入图像，采集成本高；传统数据增强策略（如ImageNet风格）对SSS数据效果不佳，亟需高效的预训练框架以降低数据需求并提升泛化能力。

Method: 使用立体投影-相机系统采集每视角8张PSP图像；设计基于PSP的专用数据增强策略；在multi-view multi-object设置下自监督预训练编码器；结合解码器通过专用损失函数重建密集散射足迹响应。

Result: 所提增强策略显著优于ImageNet风格增强；预训练编码器学习到可泛化的SSS表示，在空间变化重光照和kNN分类器中表现优异；对具有复杂几何和材质的新物体实现高保真重建，图像量较先前方法减少数个数量级。

Conclusion: 证明了极小量输入（8张/视角）结合专用自监督预训练即可高效学习SSS光传输，为高效材质采集和重建提供了新范式。

Abstract: We propose a self-supervised pretraining framework for learning sub-surface scattering (SSS) light transport representations from minimal input. Our method leverages a stereo projector-camera setup that captures only eight high-frequency phase-shift profilometry (PSP) images per view to pretrain an encoder in a multi-view, multi-object setting. We introduce a tailored augmentation strategy for PSP-based SSS data, and show that it significantly outperforms standard ImageNet-style augmentations for SSL pretraining. The pretrained encoder learns generalizable SSS representations that transfer effectively to downstream tasks, including spatially varying relighting and representation evaluation using a kNN classifier. Combined with a decoder, the model reconstructs dense scattering footprint responses, trained using a dedicated cost function that improves accuracy, particularly for anisotropic footprints. Despite using only eight input images per view, our approach generalizes to unseen objects with complex geometry and material properties, achieving high-fidelity reconstructions while requiring orders of magnitude fewer images than prior methods.

</details>


### [125] [MIRROR: Aligning Semantic Relations from Language to Image via Gromov--Wasserstein](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29462)
*Hong-Han Wang,Yuntao Wang,Hu Ding*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出MIRROR框架，通过最优传输的几何正则化方法，将语言模型中的关系先验迁移到视觉表示中，解决多模态大模型在视觉上下文中无法应用概念关系的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多模态大模型（MLLMs）继承了语言骨干中的丰富关系先验，但在视觉上下文中应用这些关系时经常失败。根本原因在于基于投影的对齐方式让每个视觉token携带正确的语义，但未确保概念间的关系能够从语言空间顺利跨越到视觉空间。

Method: 提出MIRROR框架，核心是Semi-Inverse Gromov-Wasserstein (SI-GW)问题，通过逆几何对齐将视觉表示与语言导出的关系先验对齐。该问题具有唯一闭式解，能高效计算。在仅解码器Transformer中，在层、头、token级别设计针对性策略，实现稳定提取且无需额外参数或推理成本。

Result: MIRROR在提升关系一致性的同时，保持了通用视觉-语言任务的性能。

Conclusion: 通过几何正则化将语言中的关系结构迁移到视觉表示中，可以有效解决多模态大模型的关系盲区问题，且无需额外参数和推理开销。

Abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) inherit rich relational priors from their language backbones, yet often fail when asked to apply these relationships in visual contexts. We trace this failure to a structural blind spot: projection-based alignment trains each visual token to carry the right semantics, but never asks whether the relationships between concepts survive the crossing from language to vision. To address this, we propose MIRROR (Mapping Inter-concept Relations from language to visual Representation via Optimal-transport-based Regularization), a geometric regularization framework that transfers relational priors from language to vision by exploiting the rich relational structure encoded in language representations. Specifically, we derive a surrogate loss from the proposed Semi-Inverse Gromov-Wasserstein (SI-GW) problem, an inverse geometric problem that aligns visual representations with language-derived relational priors. We show that this formulation admits a unique closed-form solution that prescribes the ideal visual relational structure implied by language geometry and cross-modal coupling. The structure of the formulation also enables efficient computation, making it applicable to long token sequences. Applying SI-GW inside decoder-only Transformers requires careful design. We introduce targeted strategies at the layer, head, and token levels to ensure stable extraction without additional parameters or inference cost. MIRROR improves relational consistency while preserving performance on general vision-language tasks.

</details>


### [126] [CellDETR: A Detection-Guided Framework for Scalable Cell Representation Learning from Histopathology Images](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29463)
*Shikang Zhang,Guojun Li,Yicong Mao,Chulin Sha*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: CellDETR是一种基于Deformable DETR的检测引导框架，通过位置特征解耦和框约束注意力机制实现WSI中可扩展的细胞级表征学习，在监督分类、对比预训练和跨数据集迁移中均表现出色。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有病理基础模型主要在斑块和切片级别进行表征学习，缺乏对细胞级别表征学习的探索，限制了细胞分辨的可解释性、生物学发现和临床转化。

Method: 基于Deformable DETR构建检测引导框架，提出位置特征解耦和框约束注意力机制实现细胞级嵌入的自动提取；并结合对比学习设计构建基于CellDETR的预训练模型。

Result: 在PanNuke数据上的监督细胞分类任务中优于现有SOTA方法；对比预训练提升下游分类性能；利用Xenium空间转录组学注释预训练后实现精确的跨数据集细胞分类。

Conclusion: CellDETR为可解释计算病理学提供了一种可扩展的通用细胞级表征学习框架，展示了所学细胞嵌入的可迁移性和生物学相关性。

Abstract: Recent advances in pathology foundation models have substantially improved patch and slide level representation learning from whole-slide images (WSIs).However, cell-level representations learning remain underexplored, limiting cell resolved interpretability, biological discovery, and clinical translation. We propose CellDETR, a detection-guided framework built on Deformable DETR for scalable cell representation learning from WSIs. By introducing location feature decoupling and box-constrained attention mechanism, CellDETR enables automated extraction of cell-level embeddings, and outperform existing state-of-the-art methods in supervised cell classification on PanNuke data. In addition, by incorporating contrastive learning design, we build a CellDETR-based pretraining model for scalable cell representation learning from unlabeled WSIs, which improves downstream cell classification performance. Furthermore, we show that after pretraining with Xenium spatial transcriptomics-derived cell annotations, CellDETR achieves accurate cross-dataset cell classification, demonstrating the transferability and biological relevance of the learned cell embeddings. Together, CellDETR provides a scalable route toward general cell-level representation learning framework for interpretable computational patholog

</details>


### [127] [Rank-Aware Hyperbolic Alignment for Vision-Language Dataset Distillation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29464)
*Jongoh Jeong,Sun-Kyung Lee,Kuk-Jin Yoon*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于秩感知的双曲对齐方法(RAHA)，通过将多模态表示提升到双曲空间并采用非对称目标优化蒸馏对，在共享子空间实现测地对齐同时正则化残差子空间以保留模态私有多样性，从而改进视觉-语言数据集压缩的效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLDD方法在欧几里得嵌入空间中强制执行全维对齐，但由于图像-文本相关性存在秩亏缺问题（共享语义集中在低维范围，剩余变化分布在弱相关残差子空间），这种对齐过于严格；LoRS虽通过低秩分解在相似度层面缓解对齐，但未能显式控制表示空间中的主导对齐容量和结构。

Method: RAHA方法包含三个关键设计：1) 将多模态表示提升到双曲空间，利用其层次几何特性；2) 采用非对称目标函数，在共享范围强制测地对齐；3) 对残差子空间进行正则化，保留模态私有多样性并提升迁移鲁棒性。

Result: 在基准测试上，RAHA在固定预算下展现了有竞争力的跨模态检索性能以及改进的迁移指标。

Conclusion: 通过显式控制对齐容量和利用双曲空间的层次几何，RAHA有效解决了VLDD中全维对齐过于严格的问题，在保留模态多样性的同时提升了迁移鲁棒性。

Abstract: Vision-language dataset distillation (VLDD) compresses a large image-text paired dataset into a small set of synthetic pairs that can efficiently train contrastive vision-language models under strict data and compute budgets. Most existing methods match expert trajectories or cross-modal statistics, yet still enforce full-dimensional alignment in a Euclidean embedding space. This is often overly restrictive due to rank-deficient image--text correlation, with shared semantics concentrated in a low-dimensional range and remaining variation spread across a weakly correlated residual subspace. LoRS relaxes alignment at the similarity level by low-rank factorization, but does not explicitly control dominant alignment capacity and structure in the representation space. We thus propose a rank-aware hyperbolic alignment (RAHA) that combines hierarchical geometry with explicit alignment-capacity control. RAHA lifts multimodal representations to hyperbolic space and optimizes distilled pairs with asymmetric objectives that enforce geodesic alignment in the shared range while regularizing the residual subspace to preserve modality-private diversity and improve transfer robustness. Experiments on benchmarks show that RAHA demonstrates competitive cross-modal retrieval and improved transfer indicators under fixed budgets.

</details>


### [128] [MAVIN: Multi-Shot Audio-Visual Generation with Narrative Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29473)
*Kaiqi Liu,Yunyao Mao,Ziqi Cai,Zheng Geng,Jing Wang,Qiulin Wang,Xintao Wang,Pengfei Wan,Kun Gai,Shuchen Weng,Boxin Shi*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: MAVIN是首个实现多镜头音视频生成并支持定制化叙事控制的框架，通过边界感知注意力、ID感知传播和多智能体脚本流水线解决了时间错位、可控性不足和脚本不完整等问题，在专业电影制作中达到最优性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有生成模型虽能生成高质量视频，但在多镜头音视频生成中缺乏复杂的叙事控制能力，存在时间错位、可控性有限和脚本不完整的问题。

Method: 提出边界感知注意力（利用层次化字幕和边界感知token路由对齐音视频元素的时间边界）、ID感知传播（利用身份嵌入和身份感知掩码绑定一致的外观和音色）、多智能体脚本流水线（将自由形式用户输入转化为层次化字幕），并构建了MAVINSet数据集。

Result: 大量实验表明MAVIN达到了最优性能，为生成模型融入专业电影制作流程开辟了新途径。

Conclusion: MAVIN是首个多镜头音视频生成框架，有效解决了时间错位、多主体可控性和叙事完整性问题，在专业电影制作领域具有重要应用价值。

Abstract: While recent generative models produce high-fidelity videos, they struggle with the complex narrative control required for coherent multi-shot audio-visual generation. Existing methods suffer from temporal misalignment, limited controllability, and incomplete scripting. In this paper, we propose MAVIN, the first framework for multi-shot audio-visual generation with customized narrative control. To resolve temporal misalignment, we propose boundary-aware attention, which leverages hierarchical captions and boundary-aware token routing to render audio-visual elements within their respective temporal boundaries. To improve the controllability for multi-subject scenarios, we propose ID-aware propagation, utilizing identity embeddings and an identity-aware mask to bind specific identities to consistent visual appearances and vocal timbres. To provide comprehensive audio-visual narratives, we present a multi-agent scripting pipeline to transform free-form user inputs into hierarchical captions. Furthermore, we construct MAVINSet, a multi-shot audio-visual dataset for robust training and evaluation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MAVIN achieves state-of-the-art performance, opening up a new avenue for integrating generative models into professional filmmaking workflows.

</details>


### [129] [VCS-SLAM: Geometry-Validated Semantic Evidence Fusion for 3D Gaussian SLAM](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29494)
*Raman Jha,Shuaihang Yuan,Yi Fang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: VCS-SLAM提出了一种几何验证的语义证据融合框架，通过评估语义观测的几何可靠性（可见性一致性、表面支撑边界证据、光线级冲突不确定性），改善了RGB-D 3D高斯SLAM中的语义一致性和重建质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有语义3D高斯SLAM方法对2D语义先验使用统一优化权重，但这些先验在线建图中并不可靠，遮挡、不支持的语义边界和模糊光线几何会引入持久的语义伪影。

Method: 提出VCS-SLAM框架，通过可见性一致性、表面支撑边界证据和光线级冲突不确定性来评估语义观测的几何可靠性，并构建可靠性感知的目标函数，抑制遮挡语义更新、减少不支持的语义渗漏、延迟模糊区域的标签分配。

Result: 在Replica数据集上实现了更优的语义一致性、边界保持和重建质量；在ScanNet上展示了在真实RGB-D输入下具有竞争力的跟踪性能。

Conclusion: 通过对语义观测进行几何可靠性验证，可以有效提升3D高斯SLAM在复杂真实场景中的语义建图质量和跟踪性能。

Abstract: Visual SLAM performance often deteriorates in complex real-world applications. Semantic 3D Gaussian SLAM commonly fuses 2D semantic priors into a persistent 3D map using uniform optimization weights. However, such priors are not equally reliable in online mapping: occlusions, unsupported semantic boundaries, and ambiguous ray geometry can introduce persistent semantic artifacts into the global Gaussian map. We propose VCS-SLAM, a geometry-validated semantic evidence fusion framework for RGB-D 3D Gaussian SLAM. Instead of treating all semantic observations as uniformly valid supervision, VCS-SLAM evaluates their geometric reliability through visibility consistency, surface-supported boundary evidence, and ray-level conflict uncertainty. The resulting reliability-aware objective suppresses occluded semantic updates, reduces unsupported semantic bleeding, and delays premature label assignment in ambiguous regions. Experiments on Replica demonstrate improved semantic consistency, boundary preservation, and reconstruction quality. Results on ScanNet further show that VCS-SLAM maintains competitive tracking performance under real RGB-D inputs

</details>


### [130] [Rectifying Mask via Entropy for Distractor-Free 3DGS in Ambiguous Scenarios](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29496)
*Wongi Park,Jiyeon Lim,Minjae Lee,Myeongseok Nam,Seongjun Choi,Jungwoo Kim,Soomok Lee,William J. Beksi,SangHyun Lee*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: RefineSplat是一个利用熵感知自适应掩码和密度控制方法来消除模糊干扰物（与静态场景颜色或语义相似），实现无干扰新视角合成的系统框架，在多个数据集上达到SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法难以区分与静态场景存在颜色或语义模糊性的瞬态元素（干扰物），导致新视角合成质量下降。作者旨在解决这一关键问题。

Method: 1) 提出熵感知自适应掩码方法，结合熵和实例掩码捕获模糊干扰物；2) 提出熵感知密度控制，利用熵感知位置梯度对齐高斯体；3) 构建并发布了Ambiguous wild数据集（18个场景），用于严格验证。

Result: 在多个数据集上，RefineSplat在新视角合成任务中达到SOTA性能，有效去除了干扰物。

Conclusion: RefineSplat通过熵感知机制系统性地解决了模糊干扰物识别与去除问题，显著提升了无干扰新视角合成的质量。

Abstract: We present RefineSplat, a systematic framework that effectively constructs transient masks to identify diverse ambiguous distractors. To do this, we qualitatively and quantitatively analyze issues and propose a novel entropy-aware adaptive masking method. Unlike existing approaches that struggle to distinguish transient elements from static scenes due to color or semantic ambiguity, RefineSplat captures ambiguous distractors leveraging entropy and instance masks. Furthermore, we propose a simple yet effective entropy-aware density control to align Gaussians in ambiguous scenarios considering Entropy-aware positional gradients. Additionally, to rigorously validate our method, we first create and release the Ambiguous wild dataset, including 18 scenes where distractors and static scenes are hard to distinguish due to color or semantic resemblances. Experimental results on various datasets demonstrate that RefineSplat shows state-of-the-art performance, showing distractor-free novel view synthesis.

</details>


### [131] [Learning Where and When: Patch-Based Spatiotemporal Localization in Weakly Supervised Video Anomaly Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29498)
*Hamza Karim,Nghia Nguyen,Lokman Bekit,Yasin Yilmaz*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于patch的时空弱监督异常检测框架，在无需边界框监督的情况下同时定位异常的时间和空间位置，在多个基准上取得了显著提升，并发布了带边界框标注的测试集。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有WSVAD方法主要关注异常的时间定位，忽略了空间范围，而空间定位对可解释性和实际部署至关重要。

Method: 构建基于网格级patch特征的时空框架，采用多实例学习范式学习区域级异常分数，并提出邻近感知的Top-k时空选择策略，无需边界框监督即可生成细粒度空间异常图。

Result: 在多个基准上超越现有最优方法，时空定位精度显著提升；发布了两个广泛使用数据集测试集的帧级边界框标注。

Conclusion: 该方法有效实现了弱监督下的时空异常联合定位，推动了空间定位在WSVAD中的发展，并提供新资源促进未来研究。

Abstract: Weakly supervised video anomaly detection (WSVAD) has predominantly focused on temporal localization, identifying when anomalies occur while largely neglecting their spatial extent within frames. Yet, spatial localization is essential for interpretability and practical deployment in real-world settings. We introduce a patch-based spatiotemporal framework for weakly supervised anomaly localization that jointly models where and when anomalies occur. Our approach operates on grid-level patch features and learns region-level anomaly scores under a multiple instance learning paradigm. We further propose a Proximity-Aware Top-k spatiotemporal selection strategy that enables the model to generate fine-grained spatial anomaly maps without requiring bounding-box supervision during training. Our method surpasses existing state-of-the-art approaches across multiple benchmarks, yielding substantial gains in spatiotemporal localization accuracy. In addition, we release frame-level bounding-box annotations for the test sets of two widely used datasets, along with our code and pretrained models, providing new resources to facilitate future research in spatially grounded WSVAD.

</details>


### [132] [Empirical Evaluation of Multi-Modal Touch Detection in Over-the-Shoulder Video Surveillance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29504)
*Mohammadreza Rashidi*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于视频的触摸检测框架，用于从物理手指交互中重建移动键盘击键事件，集成了四种并行检测模态。在120帧的第一人称分阶段密码输入视频上，多模态配置取得了16.7%的F1分数和3.0%的序列相似度。在真实的第三方手机视频上，系统因皮肤过滤器响应整个手部而非指尖接触，每帧产生中位数57个触摸点，无法实现可靠的击键重建。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索在不直接获取屏幕录制权限的情况下，通过视频智能监控（VIDINT）监控人机交互模式的可能性，即利用物理手指交互重建移动键盘上的击键事件。

Method: 集成四种并行检测模态：（1）MediaPipe解剖手部地标；（2）HSV肤色滤波；（3）时间帧差分用于运动检测；（4）形状引导的Canny边缘分析。将相对触摸坐标映射到参考屏幕布局以重建打字序列。

Result: 在120帧分阶段视频中：运动检测和边缘检测单独配置分别取得18.5%和18.2%的F1分数；多模态配置F1分数为16.7%，序列相似度3.0%。在真实视频中，皮肤过滤器每帧产生中位数57个触摸点（峰值205），比真实点击率高1-3个数量级。

Conclusion: 系统在分阶段设定下表现有限，且无法泛化到不受控制的真实场景中，无法实现可靠的击键重建。

Abstract: Video Intelligence Surveillance (VIDINT) on over-the-shoulder footage is a proposed vector for monitoring human-computer interaction patterns without direct screen recording access. In this paper, we evaluate a Behavioral Intelligence (BEHINT) touch-detection framework designed to reconstruct keystroke events on mobile keypad interfaces from physical finger interactions. Our system integrates four parallel detection modalities: (1) anatomical hand landmarks via MediaPipe, (2) HSV skin color filtering, (3) temporal frame differencing for motion detection, and (4) shape-guided Canny edge analysis. We map relative touch coordinates to a reference screen layout to reconstruct typing sequences. Evaluation on a 120-frame first-person staged video of passcode entry reveals that while MediaPipe and Skin Detection fail to run autonomously due to partial hand occlusion and ambient noise, Motion-Only and Edge-Only configurations achieve F1-scores of 18.5% and 18.2%, respectively. The combined multi-modal configuration achieves an F1-score of 16.7% and a sequence similarity of 3.0% when mapped to the iOS passcode layout. We conduct ablation, resolution decay, noise sensitivity, and proximity threshold tuning to characterize the system's operational envelope. We then audit generalization on 5 real, publicly licensed third-person phone videos and find that the detector emits a median of 57 touch points per frame (peaking at 205), one to three orders of magnitude more than the rate of real taps, because the skin filter responds to the whole hand rather than to fingertip contact. The staged keystroke result does not survive contact with uncontrolled footage; the system does not achieve reliable keystroke reconstruction outside the calibrated staged setting.

</details>


### [133] [Benchmark AUC Is Not Deployable Reliability: A Cross-Dataset Audit of Off-the-Shelf Features for Surveillance Video Anomaly Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29506)
*Mohammadreza Rashidi*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文发现当前AI监控异常检测领域的SOTA性能（高ROC-AUC）仅在“同相机同场景”的实验室条件下成立，一旦跨数据集（不同场景）测试，AUC直接跌落至随机水平（0.499），甚至低于随机。最强的骨干网络（DINOv2）反而造成最大的跨场景性能崩塌。虚假警报率高达每小时31,931次。结论：benchmark数字严重高估了实际部署的可靠性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视频异常检测的SOTA报告的高ROC-AUC都是“在同一相机同一场景”下训练和测试得到的，作者想知道当去掉这一假设（跨场景/跨数据集）时性能会如何崩塌。

Method: 使用无监督正态性模型：从数据集的全部正常训练帧中提取冻结的现成嵌入（CLIP、DINOv2、ResNet-50、EfficientNet-B0），用最近邻距离作为异常评分。在4个真实数据集（UCSD Ped1/Ped2、CUHK Avenue、ShanghaiTech）和4种骨干网络上，分别计算同数据集AUC和跨数据集AUC，并用PaDiM风格的马氏距离检测器作为对照。

Result: 同数据集AUC平均0.704，跨数据集AUC平均0.499（随机水平），若干数据对甚至低于随机。最强的DINOv2在同数据集Ped2上高达0.901，但跨数据集下降最大。马氏距离检测器复现了几乎相同的崩塌（跨数据集差距0.202 vs 0.208）。在有利操作点下，假警率高达每小时31,931次。

Conclusion: 当前监控异常检测的benchmark数字仅描述“校准过的实验室环境”，严重夸大了真实部署的可靠性；模型缺乏跨场景泛化能力，不具有实际可用性。

Abstract: Automated "suspicious behavior" flagging is a headline promise of AI surveillance, and the field reports high frame-level ROC-AUC on standard video anomaly detection benchmarks. Those numbers are measured by training and testing on the same camera and scene. We audit what happens when that assumption is dropped. We build an unsupervised normality model from the all-normal training frames of one dataset, using frozen off-the-shelf embeddings (CLIP, DINOv2, ResNet-50, EfficientNet-B0) and a nearest-neighbour distance, and score the test frames of the same and of other datasets. Across 4 real datasets (UCSD Ped1, UCSD Ped2, CUHK Avenue, ShanghaiTech) and 4 backbones, same-dataset AUC averages 0.704 but cross-dataset AUC averages 0.499, which is chance: a detector calibrated on one scene is no better than a coin flip on another, and in several pairs it is below chance. The strongest backbone makes this worse, not better: DINOv2 has the best same-dataset AUC (up to 0.901 on Ped2) and the largest cross-dataset drop. The collapse is not an artefact of the scoring rule: replacing the nearest-neighbour detector with a PaDiM-style Mahalanobis detector reproduces it almost exactly (cross-dataset gap 0.202 versus 0.208). Even at a favourable operating point the false-alarm rate is on the order of 31,931 per hour. We conclude that the benchmark numbers quoted for surveillance anomaly detection describe a calibrated laboratory setting and overstate deployable reliability by a wide margin, and we release the code that reproduces every number.

</details>


### [134] [MotionAtlas: Detailed Region Captioning for Motion-Centric Videos](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29531)
*Weisong Liu,Haochen Wang,Kuan Gao,Yuhao Wang,Yikang Zhou,Zhongwei Ren,Jacky Mai,Anna Wang,Yanwei Li,Jason Li,Zhaoxiang Zhang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: MotionAtlas是一个面向运动中心视频的细粒度描述系统，包含人工标注基准、高质量数据构建管道和视频多模态大模型，通过时空掩码实现区域感知的运动描述，有效缓解视觉杂乱和运动纠缠问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有运动描述数据集多为全局描述，难以处理视觉杂乱和运动纠缠，缺乏可靠的量化评估手段。作者旨在构建区域感知的运动描述系统，实现细粒度、可量化评估的运动理解。

Method: (1) 构建MotionAtlas-Bench基准，包含2,073道多项选择题，用于细粒度运动理解评估；(2) 设计基于自引导精炼的可扩展数据管道，生成15.9万高质量运动描述数据；(3) 设计定制化训练数据组合策略，在Molmo2、Qwen3-VL等基座模型上实现性能提升。

Result: MotionAtlas-4B在通用运动基准上平均超越Qwen3-VL-4B 5.2个百分点，在多项基座模型上均实现一致且显著的性能提升。

Conclusion: 区域感知的运动描述范式能有效解决视觉杂乱和运动纠缠问题，基于自引导精炼的数据管道可规模化生产高质量训练数据，所提训练策略具有良好的模型泛化性。

Abstract: We propose MotionAtlas, a system for detailed captioning of motion-centric videos, comprising (1) a dedicated human-annotated benchmark, (2) a scalable, high-quality pipeline to construct training samples, and (3) a family of powerful Video-MLLMs. Unlike conventional global motion captioning datasets, we focus on region-aware motion captioning: given a video and a spatiotemporal mask, the model generates precise descriptions of motion within the target region, thereby alleviating visual clutter and motion entanglement and enabling reliable, quantifiable evaluation. Concretely, we first build MotionAtlas-Bench, a comprehensive benchmark comprising 2,073 multiple-choice questions, meticulously annotated for a curated set of high-quality, motion-centric videos, to evaluate fine-grained motion understanding of the objects in question. Second, we design a rigorous and scalable data pipeline that leverages self-bootstrap refinement to suppress fine-grained hallucinations, yielding 159k high-quality motion captioning data. Third, we design a tailored training data composition strategy, which achieves consistent and substantial performance gains across diverse baseline Video-MLLMs, including Molmo2 and Qwen3-VL. For instance, MotionAtlas-4B surpasses Qwen3-VL-4B by an average of 5.2 percentage points across general motion benchmarks. The benchmark, dataset, and code have been released.

</details>


### [135] [GarmentZoom: Generating Zoomable Images from Garment Listings](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29535)
*Renjie Zhao,Jingwei Ma,Huy Huynh Cao,Brian Curless,Steven M. Seitz,Ira Kemelmacher-Shlizerman*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: GarmentZoom是一个无需空间对齐即可实现服装图片无缝缩放和平滑探索的系统，通过单模型支持3-20倍连续缩放，以极低训练成本达到与逐实例微调方法相当的质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在线服装商品列表中，概览图和特写图分别展示视野和细节，用户需要在两者间切换，破坏了浏览的连续性。现有超分辨率方法需要空间对齐或逐实例微调，无法直接应用于视野和细节不匹配的场景。

Method: 训练单一模型，无需空间对齐即可合成细节，支持3-20倍连续缩放尺度，适用于多种服装类别。

Result: 单模型在不需要逐实例微调的情况下，达到了与逐实例方法相当的质量，而训练成本仅为后者的一小部分。

Conclusion: GarmentZoom通过无需对齐的细节合成方法，有效解决了在线服装展示中视图切换带来的浏览中断问题，实现了高效且高质量的缩放浏览体验。

Abstract: Online product listings for garments often include an overview photo and a close-up to show garment details. However, each photo focuses on either field of view or garment detail, forcing users to alternate between views and breaking browsing continuity. We present GarmentZoom, a system that enhances the full-view photo to match the fidelity of its accompanying close-up, enabling seamless zoom-and-pan exploration. Unlike standard reference-based super-resolution, our setting involves close-up references that are spatially unaligned with the full view, and scale factors that vary substantially across garments 3-20$\times$. Prior work typically relies on alignment to transfer details or requires per-instance fine-tuning to memorize them. Instead, we train a single model that supports a continuous range of scales across diverse garments. Our approach synthesizes details without requiring spatial alignment and matches the quality of per-instance methods with a fraction of the training cost.

</details>


### [136] [Reliability-Prioritized Fine-Grained Generation in Multimodal Large](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29573)
*Xiaomeng Fan,Wu Wei,Yuwei Wu,Zhi Gao,Shiyu Luo,Mingyang Gao,Haoyu Zhao,Zhenxin Diao,Yuxuan Ba,Lijia Feng,Yunde Jia,Mehrtash Harandi*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文发现多模态大模型在细粒度描述时更容易出错，为此构建了粒度感知基准 GranFact，并提出可靠性优先的偏好优化方法，在提升细粒度生成能力的同时保持可靠性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多模态大模型被期望生成细粒度的视觉内容描述，但细粒度生成比粗粒度生成更容易出错，缺乏可靠的细粒度生成方法。

Method: 构建了由专家验证的多目标图像及其粗到细类别标注组成的粒度感知基准GranFact；设计了层次感知评估算法，同时衡量预测的视觉正确性和正确预测的具体程度；提出基于直接偏好优化的可靠性优先偏好优化方法，惩罚不可靠的细粒度声明，奖励可靠的细粒度声明。

Result: 在GranFact上的实验表明，所提方法在保持可靠性的同时提升了细粒度生成能力。

Conclusion: 模型应生成可靠前提下最细粒度的描述，而非单纯追求更具体的输出；所提方法有效改善了细粒度生成与可靠性之间的权衡。

Abstract: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) are increasingly expected to generate fine-grained descriptions of visual content. However, we observe and theoretically show that generating fine-grained responses poses a reliability challenge, \textit{i.e.}, fine-grained generation is more error-prone than coarse-grained generation. This phenomenon suggests that models should generate the finest description that remains reliable rather than simply produce more specific outputs. To investigate this problem, we develop \textsc{GranFact}, a granularity-aware benchmark consisting of expert-verified multi-object images with coarse-to-fine category annotations. Then, we design a hierarchy-aware evaluation algorithm, which assesses both whether model predictions are visually correct and how specific the correct predictions are. We also propose a reliability-prioritized preference optimization method based on Direct Preference Optimization, which penalizes unreliable fine-grained claims while rewarding reliable specificity. Experiments on \textsc{GranFact} show that our method improves fine-grained generation while preserving reliability. Code and data are available \href{https://github.com/WeiWu2025/GranFact}{here}.

</details>


### [137] [SHOVIR: A Benchmark for Evaluating Vision Shortcut Learning in Radiology Report Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30201)
*Filippo Ruffini,Marco Salmé,Rosa Sicilia,Valerio Guarrasi,Paolo Soda*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出SHOVIR基准，用于评估放射学报告生成中视觉捷径行为，发现当前报告级指标无法检测模型是否真正依赖视觉证据，且高报告质量并不等同于良好的空间基础。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有放射学报告生成评估指标（如词汇重叠或临床正确性聚合指标）无法检测模型是否真正从图像中的病理证据生成诊断陈述，模型可通过学习先验或虚假相关性（即视觉捷径）获得高分，暴露了评估体系的盲区。

Method: SHOVIR扩展了MIMIC-CXR和PadChest-GR两个胸部X光数据集，为每个边界框标注CheXpert标签；设计图像级和疾病级遮挡实验，对比干净图像与局部区域扰动下的模型预测，隔离直接捷径（移除视觉证据后发现仍存在）和上下文捷径（遮挡共现病理后目标检测退化）两类失效模式。

Result: 对8个先进VLM的基准测试发现，捷径行为在不同架构和数据集上差异显著；基线报告质量最高的模型在空间基础能力上并不一定排名最高，表明临床流畅生成可与对视觉证据的浅层依赖共存。

Conclusion: 当前RRG评估存在盲区，需要引入区域感知的评估协议以检测视觉捷径问题。

Abstract: Current evaluation protocols for Vision-Language Models (VLMs) in Radiology Report Generation (RRG) rely on report-level metrics that measure lexical overlap or aggregate clinical correctness. However, such metrics do not test whether individual diagnostic statements stem from the actual pathological evidence visible in the image. This allows models to achieve competitive scores by exploiting learned priors or spurious correlations, a failure mode we refer to as vision shortcut. We introduce SHOVIR, a benchmark for evaluating vision shortcut behavior in RRG. SHOVIR extends two spatially annotated chest X-ray datasets, MIMIC-CXR and PadChest-GR, with per-box CheXpert labels, and defines image-level and disease-level occlusion experiments that contrast baseline performance on clean images against localized, region-specific perturbations. Comparing predictions across these conditions isolates two failure modes at the disease-class level: direct shortcuts, where a finding persists after its visual evidence is removed, and contextual shortcuts, where detection degrades once co-occurring pathologies are occluded despite the target region remaining intact. Benchmarking eight state-of-the-art VLMs, we find that shortcut behavior varies substantially across architectures and datasets. Models achieving the highest baseline report quality do not necessarily rank highest in spatial grounding, revealing that clinically fluent generation can coexist with shallow reliance on visual evidence. These findings expose a blind spot in current RRG evaluation and motivate region-aware assessment protocols.

</details>


### [138] [ReMAP-PET: Beyond Visual Understanding -- Learning Region-Guided Metabolic Alignment Semantics from Brain PET](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29577)
*Dasen Dai,Yanteng Zhang,Shuoqi Li,Yuxiang Wei,Hongjie Yu,Qingxin Zhang,Qizhen Lan,Jagath C. Rajapakse,Vince D. Calhoun*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出ReMAP-PET框架，通过联合回归和对比学习将3D ResNet-50编码器与脑区标准化摄取值比（SUVR）对齐，使PET编码器学习代谢语义而非通用体积特征。在1015个样本上取得0.070 SUVR MAE和77.8% Recall@1，并通过对比对齐实现PET到临床报告的生成，线性探针验证了嵌入的临床相关性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有3D大脑基础模型将PET视为通用体积数据，忽略了其区别于结构性神经影像的结构化区域代谢信息，导致PET模态特有的代谢语义未被充分学习。

Method: 采用部分微调的MedicalNet 3D ResNet-50作为编码器，通过联合回归损失（预测SUVR）和对比损失（对齐SUVR嵌入）进行训练；随后通过对比对齐将代谢嵌入与冻结的BioClinicalBERT进行语言空间对齐，实现SUVR约束的PET到报告生成。

Result: 在1015个配对PET-SUVR样本上，SUVR MAE为0.070，PET SUVR Recall@1达77.8%，显著优于五个冻结预训练基线；线性探针在诊断分类和认知回归任务上保持临床相关性。

Conclusion: 将PET编码器锚定于区域代谢语义而非通用体积数据处理，可生成结构化、可解释且与语言兼容的表征，为代谢感知的PET理解开辟了新方向。

Abstract: Positron Emission Tomography (PET) reveals brain metabolism and is clinically central to neurodegenerative disease assessment, yet existing 3D brain foundation models treat PET as generic volumetric data, missing the structured regional metabolic information that distinguishes it from structural neuroimaging. To address these limitations, we propose ReMAP-PET, a framework that moves beyond visual encoding by supervising a partially-tuned MedicalNet 3D ResNet-50 with brain regional standardized uptake value ratio (SUVR) profiles through joint regression and contrastive objectives, enabling the encoder to learn the metabolic semantics underlying PET modality. On 1015 paired PET--SUVR samples, ReMAP-PET achieves 0.070 SUVR MAE and 77.8% PET SUVR Recall@1, substantially outperforming five frozen pretrained baselines. We further connect the metabolic embedding to clinical language via contrastive alignment with frozen BioClinicalBERT and demonstrate end-to-end PET-to-report generation through SUVR-constrained verbalization. Linear probing on diagnostic classification and cognitive regression tasks confirms that the embeddings retain clinically relevant information without task-specific fine-tuning. Our results show that grounding PET encoders in regional metabolic semantics -- rather than treating PET as generic volumetric data -- yields representations that are structured, interpretable, and language-compatible, pointing to a new direction for metabolic-aware PET understanding.

</details>


### [139] [ScAle: Attention Head Scaling as a Minimal Adapter for Spatial Reasoning in Vision Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29579)
*Rahul Chowdhury,Timothy A Rupprecht,Xuan Shen,Pu Zhao,Yanzhi Wang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出ScAle方法，通过仅学习少量标量系数（约1K参数）重新加权冻结VLM中最后token的注意力和MLP激活值，在空间推理任务上实现高达134.1%的相对准确率提升，以极低参数代价恢复标准PEFT（如LoRA）的大部分性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLM在空间推理上表现不佳，而改进通常需要大量额外参数进行微调。初步分析发现，不修改预训练权重，仅重新缩放选定Transformer层的激活值即可显著影响下游性能，这启发作者探索一种超轻量级适应方法。

Method: ScAle方法：学习一组少量标量系数，在完全冻结的骨干网络上重新加权最后token的注意力激活和MLP激活。仅需约1K可训练参数，无需像LoRA等标准PEFT方法那样需要数百万可训练参数。

Result: 在SpatialEval、COCOQA和VGQA数据集上，ScAle在多个模型族上相对准确率提升高达134.1%，以1K参数恢复了标准PEFT方法的大部分性能，同时保持非空间VQA准确率。

Conclusion: 有界激活重新加权是一种简单、架构无关且高度参数高效的预训练VLM适应方法，为空间推理等挑战性任务提供了极轻量级的替代方案。

Abstract: Spatial reasoning remains a persistent challenge for many vision language models (VLMs), and improving it typically requires fine-tuning with substantial additional parameters. Our preliminary analysis reveals that rescaling activations in selected transformer layers-without modifying pretrained weights-can significantly influence downstream performance. Motivated by this observation, we propose ScAle, an ultra-lightweight adaptation method that learns a small set of scalar coefficients to modulate last-token attention and MLP activations in a fully frozen backbone. We evaluate our method on the synthetic spatial reasoning benchmark SpatialEval and on real-world VQA datasets (COCOQA and VGQA) across multiple model families. Our method, ScAle, achieves up to 134.1% relative accuracy gains using only 1K trainable parameters without requiring millions of trainable parameters as in standard PEFT methods such as LoRA. Despite its extreme compactness, our approach recovers a substantial fraction of standard PEFT performance while preserving strong non-spatial VQA accuracy. These results demonstrate that bounded activation reweighting provides a simple, architecture-agnostic, and highly parameter-efficient alternative for adapting pretrained VLMs.

</details>


### [140] [SonoCLIP: Mask-Guided Region-Aware Vision-Language Pretraining for Fetal Ultrasound Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29586)
*Hang Su,Chao Sun,Zhaofan Li,Wei Hu,Juhua Liu,Bo Du*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: SonoCLIP是首个百万级区域可控的胎儿超声视觉-语言基础模型，通过将分割掩码作为视觉提示融入视觉编码器，实现全局-局部对比学习，并在144万张多模态胎儿超声数据集上预训练，在零样本迁移任务中表现优越。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有超声基础模型主要依赖全局图像-文本对齐，对临床关键的局部结构感知不足；超声图像存在严重的散斑噪声、采集变异性及模糊解剖边界，导致观察者间差异大，亟需能同时捕获全局和局部语义的视觉-语言模型。

Method: 1）在视觉编码器中引入分割掩码作为掩码通道视觉提示，实现区域可控的对比学习；2）提出基于Sigmoid的逐对对比损失（Sigmoid-based pairwise contrastive loss），提升大规模监督下的训练稳定性；3）构建了包含144万张图像、覆盖24个标准切面的多模态胎儿超声数据集。

Result: 在跨中心的评估中，SonoCLIP在全局和掩码引导两种推理模式下均取得了优越的零样本迁移性能。

Conclusion: SonoCLIP为胎儿超声分析建立了一个可控且面向临床的基础模型，代码和数据已开源。

Abstract: Vision-language foundation models have shown strong potential in medical image analysis. Although foundation models for ultrasound imaging have recently emerged, the domain remains particularly challenging due to severe speckle noise, acquisition variability, and subtle anatomical boundaries, leading to high inter-observer variability. Existing CLIP-based models rely primarily on global image-text alignment, limiting their sensitivity to clinically decisive local structures. We propose SonoCLIP, the first million-scale region-controllable fetal ultrasound vision-language foundation model that integrates segmentation masks as mask-channel visual prompts within the vision encoder, enabling joint global-local contrastive representation learning. To support scalable region-text alignment, we introduce a sigmoid-based pairwise contrastive loss that improves stability under large-scale supervision. We further curate a 1.44M-image multimodal fetal ultrasound dataset spanning 24 standard planes for large-scale pretraining. Extensive cross-center evaluations demonstrate that SonoCLIP achieves superior zero-shot transfer performance under both global and mask-guided inference, establishing a controllable and clinically oriented foundation model for fetal ultrasound analysis. Our code and data are available at https://github.com/Harrison-one/SonoCLIP.

</details>


### [141] [One Scene, Two Depths: Probing Geometric Ambiguity in Monocular Foundation Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29600)
*Xiaohao Xu,Feng Xue,Xiang Li,Haowei Li,Shusheng Yang,Tianyi Zhang,Matthew Johnson-Roberson,Xiaonan Huang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文指出单目深度估计将三维世界的多层几何结构压缩为单标量深度，存在歧义性。为此提出MD-3k基准和ML-SRA指标，测量深度模型的层偏好。发现不同深度基础模型对同一场景有不同层偏好，而拉普拉斯视觉提示（LVP）可显著改变冻结模型的输出层。最强组合DAv2-L达到75.5% ML-SRA，呼吁以歧义感知视角重新审视深度监督与评估。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有单目深度估计将一条光线上的多层几何结构简化为单深度值，而透明场景使这一歧义性可被观测。监督目标本质是标注、数据和训练约定的产物，而非场景固有真实值。因此需要量化模型对该约定的层偏好，揭示不同模型对同一多层几何结构的不同解析方式。

Method: 构建MD-3k稀疏两层序数基准数据集，提出ML-SRA指标测量多层空间关系准确性。引入拉普拉斯视觉提示（LVP），一种无需训练的频谱输入变换，用于改变冻结模型的预测层。通过RGB输入与LVP输入的对比实验，评估DAv2-L等深度基础模型的层偏好差异。

Result: 不同深度基础模型在MD-3k上表现出多样化层偏好；LVP可显著改变某些冻结模型的输出层；最强RGB/LVP组合（DAv2-L）达到75.5% ML-SRA。

Conclusion: 深度基础模型可能表达了互补的几何假设，而这些假设在标准RGB推理中未被表达。应通过歧义感知视角重新思考深度监督与评估，将多种有效的3D解释视为需要测量、保留和表达的几何结构。

Abstract: A faithful 3D world representation should account for layered geometry, where a single camera ray may contain multiple visible and geometrically valid surfaces. Monocular depth estimation, however, reduces this structure to one scalar depth per pixel. Transparent scenes make this ambiguity measurable: the same ray can pass through foreground glass and observe the background, turning the supervised target into a convention of annotation, data, and training rather than a scene-intrinsic truth. A learned predictor exposes this convention as its depth-layer preference. We introduce MultiDepth-3k (MD-3k), a sparse two-layer ordinal benchmark for measuring depth-layer preference and multi-layer spatial relationship accuracy (ML-SRA). On MD-3k, leading depth foundation models exhibit diverse layer preferences under standard RGB input, showing that the same layered geometry can be resolved differently across models. We further find that Laplacian Visual Prompting (LVP), a training-free spectral input transformation, can substantially change the reported layer for certain frozen models. The strongest RGB/LVP pair, DAv2-L, reaches 75.5% ML-SRA. These results suggest that depth foundation models may express complementary geometric hypotheses that standard RGB inference leaves unexpressed. We invite the community to rethink depth supervision and evaluation through an ambiguity-aware lens, where multiple valid 3D interpretations are treated as geometric structure to be measured, preserved, and expressed.

</details>


### [142] [Benchmarking Geospatial Foundation Models for Agriculture Applications](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29664)
*Zhuocheng Shang,Sanmay Das,Ahmed Eldawy*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文系统评估了三种地理空间基础模型（Prithvi、SpectralGPT、SatMAE）在农业领域的跨区域迁移能力，发现它们在面临区域分布偏移时性能显著下降，仅能预测常见作物而忽略稀有作物，并指出输入格式统一对不同模型影响各异，呼吁将区域感知评估作为必要标准。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 地理空间基础模型在遥感领域展现出广泛泛化潜力，但其跨地理区域的迁移能力尚未被系统检验，尤其是在农业应用中。现有研究缺乏针对区域分布偏移的受控评估。

Method: 构建受控基准，将训练集、验证集和测试集分别分配至不同区域（美国四个州：爱荷华、北卡罗来纳、加利福尼亚、明尼苏达），评估Prithvi、SpectralGPT、SatMAE三个模型在多时相作物分割和变化检测任务上的跨区域迁移表现。

Result: 三个模型在区域分布偏移下性能均严重下降，仅能预测最常见作物，遗漏稀有作物。将模型适配到统一输入格式对不同模型的影响存在差异，增加了直接架构比较的复杂性。

Conclusion: 当前地理空间基础模型在农业应用中存在关键局限性，区域感知的评估方法应成为标准实践。

Abstract: Geospatial foundation models pretrained on satellite imagery promise broad generalization across remote sensing tasks and regions, but their geographic transferability has not been systematically tested, especially in agriculture applications. This paper presents a controlled benchmark that evaluates three models, Prithvi, SpectralGPT, and SatMAE, on multi-temporal crop segmentation and change detection across four U.S. states, Iowa, North Carolina, California, and Minnesota. By assigning each train, validation, and test split to a separate region, we measure how well each model transfers to land it has not seen. All three degrade sharply under regional distribution shift, predicting only the most common crops while missing rare ones. We further find that fitting these models to a shared input format affects each one differently, which complicates direct architectural comparison. These results expose key limitations of current geospatial foundation models for agriculture and point to region aware evaluation as a necessary standard.

</details>


### [143] [Unlocking the Visual Record of Materials Science: A Large-Scale Multimodal Dataset from Scientific Literature](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29667)
*Subham Ghosh,Shubham Tiwari,Mohammad Ibrahim,Abhishek Tewari*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出MatMMExtract管道，从14,810篇开放获取论文的180,571张复合图中提取出391,606个面板级图像-文本对（MatSciFig数据集），解决了科学图表中多子图与单一标题难以直接配对的难题，并通过MaterialScope检测数据集和微调YOLO12-m模型实现高精度子图定位，验证了该数据集在视觉-语言学习中的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 材料科学文献中大量实验知识以图表形式存在，但这些视觉数据难以被AI大规模利用，核心困难在于大多数科学图表是复合图——单个标题对应多个子面板，直接进行图像-文本配对不可靠。

Method: 提出MatMMExtract端到端开源管道，通过分解复合图为单个子面板，并利用大语言模型结合材料科学分类体系生成结构化的、有依据的注释。同时构建MaterialScope领域检测数据集（2,811张人工标注图），微调YOLO12-m检测器实现精准子图定位，并评估六种语言模型以选取最优成本-质量平衡方案。

Result: YOLO12-m检测器在MaterialScope上达到mAP_50为0.9227；Gemini 3.1 Flash Lite在注释生成中82%输出被评为良好，幻觉率仅4.8%；基于MatSciFig的双编码器检索基线相比零样本CLIP在R@1上提升4.4倍。

Conclusion: MatMMExtract管道和MatSciFig数据集有效解决了科学复合图的结构性难题，为材料科学领域的视觉-语言学习提供了高质量的结构化数据资源，所有资源已开源。

Abstract: The materials science literature encodes decades of experimental knowledge in figures, yet this visual record remains locked away and inaccessible to AI at scale. The core difficulty is structural: most scientific figures are compound, with a single caption describing multiple sub-panels simultaneously, making direct image-text pairing unreliable. We present MatMMExtract, an end-to-end open-source pipeline that resolves this by decomposing compound figures into individual sub-panels and generating structured, grounded annotations using a large language model guided by a curated materials science taxonomy. Applied to 14,810 open-access articles, MatMMExtract produces MatSciFig; 391,606 panel-level image-text pairs from 180,571 figures, each annotated with a sub-caption, a two-level visualisation category spanning 19 classes and over 100 subtypes, and a scientific summary. To enable accurate panel localisation, we introduce MaterialScope, a domain-specific detection dataset of 2,811 manually annotated materials science figures, on which a fine-tuned YOLO12-m detector achieves mAP_50 of 0.9227. Among six benchmarked language models, Gemini 3.1 Flash Lite delivers the best cost-quality trade-off for annotation generation, with 82% of outputs rated good and a hallucination rate of 4.8%. A dual-encoder retrieval baseline on MatSciFig achieves a 4.4 times improvement in R@1 over zero-shot CLIP, demonstrating the dataset's immediate utility for vision-language learning. All resources are released openly to the community.

</details>


### [144] [PoseShield: Neural Collision Fields for Human Self-Collision Resolution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29686)
*Zhengyuan Li,Zeyun Deng,Yifan Shen,Liangyan Gui,Miaolan Xie,Joseph Campbell,Xifeng Gao,Kui Wu,Zherong Pan,Aniket Bera*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出PoseShield，一种直接在SMPL姿态空间中定义的神经碰撞约束，通过Eikonal正则化确保优化稳定性，作为生成器无关的后验碰撞校正器，在姿态和运动序列上实现95.8%的碰撞修复成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: SMPL-based人体姿态估计和运动生成中，极端姿态或随机运动合成下生成的网格频繁出现自穿透（self-penetration）问题，导致物理上不可信的结果。现有方法多在网格空间操作或依赖启发式惩罚，缺乏理论保证。

Method: 将碰撞校正形式化为约束优化问题，直接在低维SMPL姿态空间中学习神经碰撞约束，并将该约束与Eikonal方程连接，通过Eikonal正则化确保碰撞边界附近梯度非零，提升优化数值稳定性。该约束可扩展到运动序列，作为生成器无关的后验校正器。

Result: 在构建的SMPL姿态基准测试上达到95.8%的碰撞修复成功率，优于现有基线方法。

Conclusion: PoseShield在低维姿态空间中实现了理论上严谨的碰撞约束，兼具高成功率、数值稳定性和生成器无关性，适用于单帧姿态和运动序列的碰撞后验校正。

Abstract: Self-collision remains a persistent challenge in SMPL-based human pose estimation and motion generation.
