We leverage this property by modelling the distribution of features extracted from averaged images and training a normalizing flow to align the feature space of individual images with this distribution. This alignment yields a likelihood-based criterion that separates real and fake samples while promoting strong generalisation. We evaluate $μ$Flow on a fully out-of-distribution setting, where both real and fake datasets are unseen during training. Experimental results show that our method significantly outperforms SOTA detectors. Project page: https://opontorno.github.io/MuFlow.

</details>


### [252] [Orca: The World is in Your Mind](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30534)
*Yihao Wang,Yuheng Ji,Mingyu Cao,Yanqing Shen,Runze Xiao,Huaihai Lyu,Senwei Xie,Euan Liu,Klara Tian,Tianfeng Long,Yichi Zhang,Zhengliang Cai,Ruike Chen,Jifan Zhao,Ruochuan Shi,Zihan Tang,Jing Lyu,Wenxing Tan,Ningbo Zhang,Yangtao Hu,Yuming Gao,Xiansheng Chen,Junkai Zhao,Congsheng Xu,Boan Zhu,Ziqi Wang,Yupu Feng,Qiongqiong Zhang,Yingli Zhao,Yulong Ao,Shaoxuan Xie,You Liu,Guocai Yao,Leiduo Zhang,Xiaodan Liu,Yunyan Zhang,Yance Jiao,Xinyan Yang,Jiaxing Wei,Xu Liu,Tengfei Pan,Shaokai Nie,Chunlei Men,Sen Cui,Xiaojie Jin,Hongyang Li,Jianlan Luo,Yao Mu,Yunchao Wei,Jun Yan,Hang Zhao,Xiaolong Zheng,Jiaming Li,Yonghua Lin,Tiejun Huang,Zhongyuan Wang,Pengwei Wang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出Orca，一种通用世界基础模型，通过Next-State-Prediction（下一状态预测）统一建模方式，从多模态世界信号中学习统一的世界隐空间，并支持多种下游读出任务（文本生成、图像预测、具身动作生成）。模型采用无意识学习（连续视频）和意识学习（语言描述事件+VQA监督）两种互补范式，在125K小时视频和1.6亿事件注释上预训练，冻结骨干网络仅训练轻量解码器，实验表明其优于同规模专用基线模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有模型通常针对单一模态或任务（如next-token、next-frame、next-action）进行优化，缺乏统一的世界理解与预测框架。作者希望构建一个能够统一学习多模态世界信号、实现理解、预测和行动于一体的通用世界基础模型。

Method: 提出Next-State-Prediction建模范式；设计两种互补学习范式：无意识学习（从连续视频中学习密集自然状态转换）和意识学习（通过语言描述事件和VQA监督学习稀疏有意义状态转换）；构建包含125K小时视频和1.6亿事件注释的大规模预训练数据；冻结骨干网络，仅训练轻量级模态特定解码器进行下游任务适配。

Result: Orca在文本生成、图像预测、具身动作生成三个下游任务中，通过冻结骨干+轻量解码器的设置，均优于同规模专用基线模型。实验验证了范式可扩展性，表明更强的世界隐空间能带来更强的下游读出能力。

Conclusion: Orca作为通用世界基础模型，通过统一状态转换建模为理解、预测和作用于世界提供了一种有前景的方法。文中还讨论了当前局限性，为社区提供有益见解和启发。

Abstract: We introduce Orca, an initial instantiation of a general world foundation model. Orca learns a unified world latent space from multimodal world signals and exposes it through multimodal readout interfaces. Rather than optimizing isolated next-token, next-frame, or next-action prediction, we are centered on Next-State-Prediction modeling, offering a unified state-transition modeling route toward understanding, predicting, and acting upon the world. Orca learns through two complementary paradigms: unconscious learning captures dense natural state transitions from continuous videos, and conscious learning models sparse meaningful state transitions by language-described events and VQA supervision. For pre-training, we construct a large-scale world-learning inventory data, including 125K hours of video data and 160M event annotations. After pre-training, Orca learns a unified world latent space. To examine whether the learned latent supports downstream, we evaluate it by three representative downstream readouts: text generation, image prediction, and embodied action generation. Orca's backbone is frozen, and only the lightweight modality-specific decoders are trainable. Experiments show the scalability of the proposed paradigm and verify that stronger world latent enables stronger downstream readouts. Orca outperforms similar-sized specialized baselines. These results show that Orca, as a general world foundation model, presents a promising approach to understanding, predicting, and acting upon the world. Finally, we discuss the current limitations, aiming to provide useful insights and inspiration for the community.

</details>


### [253] [StereoGS: Sparse-View 3D Gaussian Splatting via Stereo Priors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30545)
*Wenhao Yuan,Yiyuan Ge,Deli Cai*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: StereoGS提出了一种基于立体先验的稀疏视图3DGS框架，通过构建虚拟双目对引入立体深度正则化，结合梯度感知的透明度衰减策略和一致性感知的密集初始化，在无需增加推理开销的情况下实现了稀疏视图下的SOTA新视角合成性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 3DGS在稀疏视图下因几何约束不足而易过拟合，现有单目深度先验方法存在尺度模糊性和跨视图不一致问题，导致几何缺陷。

Method: 1) 立体深度正则化：在优化过程中构建虚拟双目对，利用基础立体模型强制施加绝对尺度和双目一致结构；2) 梯度感知透明度衰减：根据高斯体的相对透明度梯度幅度动态惩罚，抑制过拟合并消除冗余基元；3) 一致性感知密集初始化：使用零样本多视图深度估计，将基元锚定到准确的场景表面。

Result: 在LLFF、DTU、Mip-NeRF360和Blender数据集上，StereoGS在稀疏视图设定下达到SOTA性能，且不增加额外推理开销。

Conclusion: 通过引入立体先验替代单目先验，有效解决了3DGS在稀疏视图下的几何约束不足问题，验证了双目一致性约束对提升稀疏视图新视角合成质量的显著作用。

Abstract: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has achieved remarkable success in real-time novel view synthesis, yet it suffers from severe overfitting under sparse-view settings due to insufficient geometric constraints. While recent methods introduce monocular depth priors to mitigate this, they inherently struggle with scale ambiguity and cross-view inconsistency, leading to defective geometry. In this paper, we propose StereoGS, a novel sparse-view 3DGS framework that integrates stereo priors to establish reliable binocular consistency. Unlike scale-agnostic monocular constraints, StereoGS introduces a Stereo Depth Regularization by constructing virtual stereo pairs during optimization and leveraging a foundation stereo model to enforce absolute scale and binocular-consistent structures. To further suppress overfitting and eliminate redundant primitives, we design a Gradient-Aware Opacity Decay strategy that dynamically penalizes Gaussians based on their relative opacity gradient magnitudes. Combined with a Consistency-Aware Dense Initialization using zero-shot multi-view depth estimation, StereoGS effectively anchors primitives to accurate scene surfaces. Extensive experiments on LLFF, DTU, Mip-NeRF360, and Blender datasets demonstrate that StereoGS achieves state-of-the-art performance in sparse-view settings without incurring any additional inference overhead. Project Page: https://stringerywh00.github.io/StereoGS_project_page/

</details>


### [254] [EcoVideo: Entropy-Orchestrated Video Generation Paradigm in Cloud-Edge Dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30557)
*Jiayu Chen,Hengyi Zhang,Maoliang Li,Minyu Li,Zihao Zheng,Xuanzhe Liu,Guojie Luo,Xiang Chen*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: EcoVideo提出了一种基于熵编排的动态帧间解耦框架，通过自注意力熵估计帧信息密度，利用云端大模型去噪稀疏关键帧、边缘轻量模型插值重建其余帧，并根据实时带宽和计算资源自适应调整关键帧预算和精化深度，实现最高2.9倍端到端加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: DiT视频生成因迭代式全帧去噪导致延迟极高，现有云边方法依赖静态帧间解耦，无法利用帧间相似性且无法适应系统动态变化。

Method: 提出EcoVideo框架：1) 利用早期自注意力熵作为无训练的信息密度估计进行帧选择；2) 云端大模型去噪稀疏高熵关键帧；3) 边缘轻量模型通过运动感知插值和精化重建剩余帧；4) 根据实时带宽和计算资源自适应调整关键帧预算和边缘精化深度。

Result: 在代表性DiT视频生成器上实现了更好的质量-效率权衡，在低带宽、计算受限的边缘场景中达到最高2.9倍端到端加速。

Conclusion: EcoVideo通过动态帧间解耦和自适应资源配置，有效解决了DiT视频生成在云边场景下的延迟问题，实现了质量与效率的优化平衡。

Abstract: DiT video generation is latency-intensive due to iterative full-frame denoising, while prior cloud-edge methods largely rely on static inter-step decoupling and cannot leverage inter-frame similarity or adapt to system dynamics. We propose EcoVideo, an entropy-orchestrated framework for dynamic inter-frame decoupling: early-stage self-attention entropy provides a training-free estimate of frame-wise information density for frame selection; a cloud large model denoises sparse high-entropy keyframes; and an edge lightweight model reconstructs the remaining frames via motion-aware interpolation with refinement for temporal stability. EcoVideo further adapts the keyframe budget and edge refinement depth to real-time bandwidth and compute availability, optimizing end-to-end latency under constraints. Experiments on representative DiT video generators show improved quality--efficiency trade-offs and up to 2.9x end-to-end speedup in low-bandwidth, compute-limited edge settings. Code is available at https://github.com/IF-LAB-PKU/EcoVideo.

</details>


### [255] [APRIL-MedSeg: A Modular Medical Image Segmentation Toolbox Embracing Modern Paradigms](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30577)
*Juntao Jiang,Jinsheng Bai,Linxuan Fan,Yali Bi,Jiangning Zhang,Yong Liu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: APRIL-MedSeg是一个基于YAML的模块化2D医学图像分割框架，通过注册配置系统和组件化设计，统一了半监督学习、域适应、知识蒸馏、弱监督学习、文本引导分割及基础模型支持等多种先进范式，支持灵活可复现的实验管理和实际部署。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有医学图像分割框架缺乏统一的模块化生态系统，难以灵活组合不同的学习范式和模型组件，且实验可重复性和部署可用性不足。

Method: 采用YAML驱动的模块化架构，将分割网络分解为可复用组件；基于注册机制的配置系统支持继承和灵活切换；提供统一接口集成多种学习范式、数据集、数据增强管道、部署工具和模型集成。

Result: 构建了一个统一且可扩展的生态系统，支持半监督学习、域适应、知识蒸馏、弱监督学习、文本引导分割及基础模型等多种先进范式，并实现了灵活可复现的实验管理。

Conclusion: APRIL-MedSeg是一个通用的医学图像分割研发平台，桥接了算法创新与实战部署，为系统化组织和复现该领域进展提供了结构化生态。

Abstract: We present APRIL-MedSeg, a YAML-driven modular framework for 2D medical image segmentation. It provides a unified and extensible ecosystem that decomposes segmentation networks into reusable components. Also, the framework integrates a broad spectrum of advanced paradigms, including semi-supervised learning, domain adaptation, knowledge distillation, weakly supervised learning, and text-guided segmentation as well as foundation model support. A registry-based configuration system with inheritance enables flexible and reproducible experiment management, supporting seamless switching across models, datasets, and training strategies. In addition, the framework provides a unified interface for medical datasets, augmentation pipelines, deployment utilities and model ensembling. Overall, APRIL-MedSeg is designed as a general-purpose research and development platform that bridges algorithmic innovation and practical deployment, while also serving as a structured ecosystem for systematically organizing and reproducing advances in medical image segmentation. The code is available at https://github.com/juntaoJianggavin/APRIL-MedSeg under an Apache 2.0 license.

</details>


### [256] [Learning from Reliable Latent Prompts for Visual Recognition with Missing Modalities](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30597)
*Taixi Chen,Nancy Guo*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于可学习潜在提示（Latent Prompts）的新范式，用于解决多模态大模型在模态缺失情况下的性能退化问题。与以往依赖不稳定实例级特征的输入条件化策略不同，该方法将可学习提示建模为与输入解耦的稳定潜在锚点，即使在极端缺失率（如90%）下也能提供鲁棒引导和跨模态知识补偿。实验表明该方法在三个基准数据集上取得了最优性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LMMs在模态完整数据上表现优异，但现实场景中模态缺失普遍存在，导致性能急剧下降。已有研究采用提示学习缓解该问题，但基于实例级特征的输入条件化策略在高缺失率下因特征不可靠而受限。

Method: 提出“Learn from Reliable Latent Prompts”范式，将可学习潜在提示建模为与输入无关（input-agnostic）的稳定潜在锚点，使其封装与损坏输入解耦的模态内在先验，从而在模态缺失时提供鲁棒引导和跨模态知识补偿。

Result: 在三个基准数据集上，该方法在各种模态缺失场景下均达到最先进性能，特别是在极端缺失率（如90%）下表现优异。

Conclusion: 所提出的从潜在提示学习范式为缺失模态问题提供了鲁棒解决方案，证明了与输入解耦的稳定潜在提示相比依赖实例级特征的方法更具优势。

Abstract: Large-scale multimodal models (LMMs) have achieved superior performance in visual recognition by synergizing information across diverse, massive-scale paired modalities. In real-world scenarios, however, missing-modality inputs are ubiquitous, causing models optimized for modality-complete data to exhibit precipitous performance degradation. Existing research has introduced prompt learning to mitigate this issue, typically by generating dynamic prompts from instance-level features, regardless of whether the input modalities are complete or partially absent. However, such input-conditioned strategies are hindered by the escalating unreliability of instance-level features; as higher missing rates increase the proportion of incomplete modalities, the resulting instability in prompt learning limits the model's performance. To address this limitation, we hypothesize that learnable latent prompts themselves encapsulate stable, modality-intrinsic priors that are decoupled from corrupted inputs. Consequently, we propose a novel paradigm: Learning from Reliable Latent Prompts. Unlike prior methods, we model input-agnostic learnable prompts as stable latent anchors that enable robust guidance and effective cross-modal knowledge compensation, even under extreme missing rates (e.g., 90%). Empirical results across three benchmark datasets demonstrate that our "learn-from-latent-prompts" approach achieves state-of-the-art performance across a wide range of missing-modality scenarios. Extensive experiments further confirm the effectiveness of this paradigm in providing a robust solution to the missing-modality problem.

</details>


### [257] [Towards in-the-wild Egocentric 3D Hand-Object Pose Estimation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30598)
*Siddhant Bansal,Zhifan Zhu,Shashank Tripathi,Jiahe Zhao,Michael J. Black,Dima Damen*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了EPIC-Contact数据集（2.3K野外第一人称视频片段，含密集3D手-物接触对应关系）和HOPformer端到端Transformer模型，联合预测双手和物体姿态。HOPformer在ARCTIC数据集上成功率82.4%（比SOTA高6.2个百分点），在EPIC-Contact数据集上成功率近乎翻倍且接触偏差降低75%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于学习的3D手-物姿态估计方法在野外场景中泛化能力差，且受限于监督信号的稀缺性。严重遮挡和模糊接触使得野外第一人称RGB图像中的精确手-物姿态估计极具挑战性。

Method: 1) 构建EPIC-Contact数据集：包含2.3K剪辑片段（62.3K帧），提供密集的双射3D手-物接触对应关系和姿态网格。2) 提出HOPformer：一种端到端Transformer架构，通过单个前向传播联合预测双手和物体姿态；使用交叉注意力解码器，以手部先验为条件调节物体特征，实现鲁棒姿态估计。

Result: 在ARCTIC数据集上达到82.4%成功率（比当前SOTA提升6.2个百分点）；在EPIC-Contact数据集上，成功率近乎翻倍，接触偏差降低75%。

Conclusion: EPIC-Contact数据集和HOPformer方法显著提升了野外第一人称场景中手-物姿态估计的准确性和鲁棒性，数据集和代码均已开源。

Abstract: Estimating accurate 3D hand-object pose from in-the-wild egocentric RGB remains challenging due to severe occlusions and ambiguous contact. Existing learning-based methods often struggle to generalise to in-the-wild scenes and are limited by the scarcity of supervision. We address these issues with two contributions. First, we introduce EPIC-Contact, an in-the-wild egocentric dataset of 2.3K clips (62.3K frames) with dense, bijective 3D hand-object contact correspondences and posed meshes. Second, we propose HOPformer, an end-to-end transformer that jointly predicts bi-manual hand and object pose in a single forward pass. A cross-attention decoder conditions object features on hand priors, producing robust pose estimation. We test HOPformer on the in-lab 3D dataset, ARCTIC, as well as our newly introduced EPIC-Contact dataset. HOPformer reaches 82.4% success rate on ARCTIC (+6.2 pts over current SOTA). On EPIC-Contact, it nearly doubles the success rate while reducing contact deviation by 75%. EPIC-Contact, HOPformer code and checkpoints are released: https://sid2697.github.io/epic-contact.

</details>


### [258] [Goku: A Million-Scale Universal Dataset and Benchmark for Instruction-Based Video Editing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30599)
*Sen Liang,Cong Wang,Zhentao Yu,Fengbin Guan,Zhengguang Zhou,Teng Hu,Youliang Zhang,Yuan Zhou,Xin Li,Qinglin Lu,Zhibo Chen*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了Goku数据集（200万高质量视频编辑对）和Goku-Edit模型，首次将视频编辑任务从单一外观编辑扩展到多任务和结构操控（如主体运动控制），并设计了高效的数据合成流程和渐进式过滤系统，同时在Goku-Bench基准上实现了最多8%的指令跟随提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于指令的视频编辑数据集仅关注单任务外观编辑，无法满足真实场景中复杂的创作需求，因此需要构建一个覆盖多任务和结构操控的大规模高质量数据集。

Method: 1) 设计高效数据合成流程，将复杂编辑分解为可控子问题；2) 引入渐进式过滤系统确保数据可靠性；3) 提出Goku-Edit模型，采用MLLM作为文本编码器，解耦双分支设计（掩码分支处理结构控制，主分支处理外观渲染）。

Result: 在Goku-Bench基准上，Goku-Edit在指令跟随方面比开源模型最高提升8%。

Conclusion: 通过大规模多任务数据集Goku和双分支解耦模型Goku-Edit，有效提升了视频编辑在复杂指令理解和结构操控方面的能力。

Abstract: Existing instruction-based video editing datasets commonly focus on single-task appearance editing, failing to meet the complex creative demands of real-world scenarios. To bridge this gap, we present Goku, a large-scale dataset featuring 2 million high-quality, instruction-aligned video editing pairs, which is the first to extend task boundaries from basic appearance editing to multi-task and structural manipulations(e.g., precise control of subject movement). To tackle the data synthesis challenges inherent in these complex tasks, we design an efficient data synthesis pipeline that decomposes complex edits into controllable sub-problems and introduce a progressive filtering system for data reliability throughout the whole process. Furthermore, we explore the optimal network structures on Goku, and propose Goku-Edit. To deeply comprehend complex editing instructions, Goku-Edit leverages an MLLM as its text encoder and adopts a decoupled dual-branch design: a dedicated mask branch handles structural control, freeing the main branch for appearance rendering. A comprehensive video editing benchmark, Goku-Bench, is also proposed with 1,000 human-verified test cases and 7 novel editing-specific metrics. Evaluated on Goku-Bench, Goku-Edit obtains up to +8% improvement on other open-source models in terms of instruction following.

</details>


### [259] [UnfoldArt: Zero-Shot Recovery of Full Articulated 3D Objects from Text or Image](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30608)
*Mohamed el amine boudjoghra,Ivan Laptev,Angela Dai*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出首个基于辩论驱动的智能体方法，通过高层智能体（利用视觉-语言与视频模型推理语义和运动）和低层智能体（估计关节参数与交互点）之间的两轮结构化辩论，结合视频生成先验，从文本或图像输入中联合推断关节结构并完整重建3D铰接物体（含隐藏几何与内部结构）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法受限于缺乏监督数据或先验知识，难以从稀疏观测中可靠恢复铰接物体的结构、隐藏几何与内部结构。

Method: 提出辩论驱动的智能体框架：(1) 高层智能体利用视觉-语言和视频模型推理语义与运动；(2) 低层智能体估计关节参数与交互点；(3) 两轮结构化辩论（先利用全局-局部不一致性，再将智能体锚定到自由生成的视频上）；(4) 利用视频生成先验驱动各部分运动，暴露被遮挡的内部几何。

Result: 能够联合推断关节结构并重建完整3D铰接物体，产生高保真几何、内部结构及运动一致的状态，超越直接观测的表面。

Conclusion: 结合智能体推理与视频生成先验，可有效解决从稀疏观测重建3D铰接物体的挑战，恢复关节运动、隐藏几何与内部结构。

Abstract: Articulated 3D objects are essential for interactive environments in embodied AI, robotics, and virtual reality, but reconstructing their structure and motion from sparse observations remains challenging. Existing approaches remain largely constrained by lack of supervised data or lack the priors needed to reliably recover articulation, hidden geometry, and internal object structure. We present the first debate-driven agentic approach to articulated 3D object reconstruction from text or image inputs that both grounds articulation reasoning in concrete motion and exposes the occluded geometry revealed under articulation. High-level agents reason about object semantics and motion using knowledge from vision-language and video models, while low-level agents estimate articulation parameters and interaction points; together, they engage in a two-round structured debate that first exploits global--local disagreement and then grounds the agents in freely generated video. The same video prior, conditioned on the agreed articulation, then drives each part through its motion to expose occluded interiors and geometry that cannot be inferred from a single static view. By combining agentic reasoning with a video generative prior, our approach jointly infers articulation and reconstructs complete 3D articulated objects, producing high-fidelity geometry, internal structure, and motion-consistent states beyond directly observed surfaces.

</details>


### [260] [Reweighting Framewise Attention in Video Transformers for Facial Expression Understanding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30611)
*Seongro Yoon,Donghyeon Cho,Jinsun Park,François Brémond*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出MiRA框架，通过注意力重分布增强ViT对细微面部动态的捕捉能力，无需额外可训练参数，在FER基准上取得一致提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有ViT视频模型的注意力机制倾向于关注全局运动和粗粒度时序动态，限制了其对细微面部变化的敏感性。

Method: 提出MiRA框架，包含精确模式（基于softmax后注意力重分布）和高效的flashLite模式（基于softmax前的轻量近似，集成到FlashAttention核中），从自注意力图中推导帧级置信度和帧内集中度统计量，实现注意力重分布。

Result: 在多个具有挑战性的面部表情识别基准上，相比强ViT基线取得一致的性能提升。

Conclusion: MiRA作为无参插件模块，能有效增强ViT对细微面部动态的时空选择性，兼顾效果与效率。

Abstract: Understanding facial expressions in videos requires modeling subtle and localized facial dynamics under unconstrained conditions. Although recent Vision Transformer~(ViT)-based video models have shown strong performance through large-scale self-supervised pretraining, their attention mechanisms often emphasize dominant global motions and coarse temporal dynamics, limiting sensitivity to fine-grained facial variations. To address this limitation, we propose MiRA (Marginal-induced Attention Redistribution), a plug-in frame-marginal attention redistribution framework for ViT backbones that enhances spatio-temporal selectivity toward subtle facial dynamics without introducing additional trainable parameters. MiRA derives frame-level confidence and intra-frame concentration statistics from self-attention maps to estimate frame-wise marginal importance and redistribute attention toward spatiotemporally localized facial cues. We first introduce a principled \textit{exact mode} based on post-softmax attention redistribution. To further improve efficiency, we propose \textit{flashLite mode}, a lightweight pre-softmax approximation that integrates frame-marginal redistribution into FlashAttention kernels while preserving the effectiveness of the exact formulation. Experimental results on challenging Facial Expression Recognition~(FER) benchmarks demonstrate consistent improvements over strong ViT baselines.

</details>


### [261] [Open-Vocabulary and Referring Segmentation for 3D Gaussians Using 2D Detectors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30638)
*Jameel Hassan,Yasiru Ranasinghe,Vishal Patel*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: GaussDet利用离散的、具备指代表达能力的开放词汇2D目标检测器，通过学习3D高斯实例特征并聚合多视图语义投票，实现了无需密集CLIP特征的开放词汇3D场景理解，在分割和指代定位任务上显著超越现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有3DGS语言驱动方法依赖密集CLIP特征，存在实例分组噪声大、需预定义实例数量、且仅能理解简单名词短语，无法支持复杂空间推理和指代表达定位等问题。

Method: 为每个3D高斯学习实例特征以分解场景为实例组；通过渲染这些组并聚合多视图2D检测的语义投票，生成视图聚合语义标签分布（VASD），利用视图聚合策略作为强正则化器抑制低质量分组产生的伪标签。

Result: 在开放词汇分割（LeRF-OVS、ScanNet）和指代表达定位（Ref-LeRF）任务上均一致优于现有方法，在严格零样本设置下指代定位mIoU提升16.7%。

Conclusion: GaussDet通过规避密集CLIP特征、利用离散2D检测器与视图聚合策略，实现了从简单语言查询到复杂指代定位的零样本扩展，为3DGS语言驱动理解提供了更鲁棒且可扩展的方案。

Abstract: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has emerged at the forefront of 3D scene reconstruction. Extending 3DGS with language-driven, open-vocabulary understanding has gained significant attention for real-world applications such as embodied AI. Recent methods achieve this by learning an instance feature attribute and assigning semantics by distilling high-dimensional Contrastive Language-Image Pretraining (CLIP) features directly into the scene representation. However, the instance grouping mechanisms of these methods either require a predefined number of instances or suffer from noise in their bottom-up grouping strategies. Furthermore, the reliance on CLIP restricts semantic understanding to simple noun phrases, preventing complex spatial reasoning and referential expression grounding. We present GaussDet, a method that circumvents the need for dense CLIP features by leveraging discrete, open-vocabulary 2D object detectors with referring expression capabilities. We learn instance features for individual Gaussians to decompose the scene into 3D instance groups. By rendering these groups and aggregating semantic votes from multi-view 2D detections, we generate a robust View-Aggregated Semantic Label Distribution (VASD) for each 3D instance. This view-aggregation strategy acts as a strong regularizer, attenuating spurious labels caused by low-quality instance grouping. Our approach enables a straightforward, zero-shot extension from simple language queries to complex referential grounding. Extensive evaluations across two key tasks -- open-vocabulary segmentation (LeRF-OVS, ScanNet) and referring expression grounding (Ref-LeRF) -- demonstrate that GaussDet achieves consistent improvements over existing methods. Most notably, we achieve a substantial 16.7% mIoU improvement in referential grounding within a strict zero-shot setting.

</details>


<div id='cs.CL'></div>

# cs.CL [[Back]](#toc)

### [262] [Generating in the Limit with Infinitely Many Hallucinations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28354)
*Irene Strauss,Alexandra Butoi,Ryan Cotterell*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文在语言生成极限的框架下，引入了精确率（precision）的概念，将问题重构为经典的召回率-精确率权衡（recall-precision trade-off）。核心贡献在于分析了允许无限次错误但错误频率趋近于零（精确率保持为1）的学习者，表明当对手永久隐藏大部分目标语言时，这种松弛能严格提升召回率。同时研究了新颖性约束的连续松弛版本，仅要求固定比例的输出是新颖的。这些结果向更现实的语言生成模型迈进，其中偶发错误和重复不可避免但可控制比率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 经典的语言识别极限范式将学习建模为对手揭示未知目标语言字符串与学习者识别该语言之间的博弈。近期提出的语言生成极限框架将目标调整为更贴近现代语言建模，要求学习者从目标语言中产生有效、未见过的字符串。相关工作揭示了基本张力：对目标语言的广泛覆盖往往以牺牲有效性为代价。本文旨在引入精确率概念，将其重新表述为经典的召回率-精确率权衡，并分析更接近大语言模型实际场景的约束条件。

Method: 本文定义了精确率的概念，将语言生成问题重新框架化为召回率-精确率权衡。分析了在不同枚举、新颖性和有效性约束下的极限生成问题，特别研究了不最终有效（not eventually valid）的学习者——允许无限次错误但错误频率趋近于零（精确率保持为1）。同时研究了新颖性约束的连续松弛版本。

Result: 证明了当对手永久隐藏大部分目标语言时，允许无限次错误但错误频率趋近于零的松弛条件能严格提升召回率。

Conclusion: 研究结果朝着更现实的语言生成模型迈进，其中偶发错误和重复是不可避免的，但它们的比率可以被控制。

Abstract: The classic paradigm of language identification in the limit models learning as a game between an adversary, who reveals strings from an unknown target language, and a learner tasked with identifying that language. The recently introduced framework of language generation in the limit shifted the objective to better reflect modern language modeling, requiring the learner to produce valid, unseen strings from the target language. Related work highlighted a fundamental tension: a broad coverage of the target often comes at the cost of validity. We introduce a new notion of precision and recast this problem as the classic recall-precision trade-off. We analyze generation in the limit under varying constraints on enumeration, novelty, and validity, aimed at reflecting settings closer to those encountered by large language models. A key contribution is our analysis of learners that are not eventually valid: we allow infinitely many mistakes, provided their frequency tends to zero so that precision remains one. We show that this relaxation can strictly increase recall when the adversary permanently withholds a large portion of the target language. We also study a continuous relaxation of the novelty constraint that requires only a fixed fraction of outputs to be novel. Taken together, our results move toward a more realistic model of language generation where occasional errors and repetitions are unavoidable, but their rates are controlled.

</details>


### [263] [Extracting Knowledge from an Arabic-English Machine-Readable Dictionary Using Information Extraction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28457)
*Diaa M. Fayed,Aly A. Fahmy,Mohsen A. Rashwan,Wafaa K. Fayed*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种从阿拉伯语-英语Al-Mawrid机器可读词典中自动提取词汇信息的方法，采用n-gram分析、关键词上下文分析和基于规则的信息提取技术，在语义信息提取上取得了高精度，但除同义词外召回率较低。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: NLP应用需要大量丰富的语言知识，而电子语言资源（词典、百科、语料库）的出现使得自动提取词汇信息成为可能，本文旨在克服知识获取瓶颈。

Method: 采用n-gram分析和关键词上下文(KWIC)分析发现词汇模式，然后使用手工编写的基于规则的信息提取方法提取形态、句法和语义信息；同时利用标点符号和启发式方法提取子词条中的同义词集。

Result: 所有类型的信息提取均获得高精度；同义词召回率高，其他类型信息召回率较低。Al-Mawrid词典包含大量派生词（形态信息）、同义词、领域标签和上下位关系（语义信息）。

Conclusion: 该方法能有效从Al-Mawrid双语词典中自动提取词汇知识，但召回率方面仍有改进空间，尤其是非同义词类型的信息提取。

Abstract: Natural language processing (NLP) applications need large and rich amount of linguistic knowledge. Furthermore, electronic language sources such as dictionaries, encyclopedia, and corpora became available. So, automatic methods are emerged to extract lexical information from those sources to overcome the knowledge acquisition bottleneck. We presented a method to automatically extract lexical information from a machine-readable version of the Arabic-English Al-Mawrid dictionary. We used n-gram analysis and key-word-in-context (KWIC) analysis to discover lexical patterns that manifest morphologic, syntactic, or semantic information. Then, we used hand-crafted rule-based information extraction to extract that information. Furthermore, we used punctuation marks and some heuristics to extract a set of synonyms in a subentry. This study registered high precision for all types of information, high recall for synonyms, and low recall for the other information. The study also showed that the Al-Mawrid has significant amount of derivations (morphologic information) and synonyms, domain labels, and hyponym/hypernym relations (semantic information).

</details>


### [264] [Developmental Trajectories of Situation Modeling and Mentalizing in Transformer Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28524)
*Pamela D. Rivière,Cameron Jones,Sean Trott*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 研究发现，大型语言模型（Olmo2和Pythia系列）在错误信念任务上的表现依赖于模型大小和足够的训练量，在预训练后期才出现，并通过后训练（SFT、DPO）得到显著提升。然而，这种表现是脆弱的：非事实性动词会干扰信念归因，且模型在情境建模中存在不一致性——目标智能体的知识状态会影响对始终知情的对抗智能体的知识判断。这表明模型以发展顺序形成部分连贯的情境模型，但表现出显著的脆弱性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究表明LLM对文本描述中的信念状态敏感，但对其构念效度（construct validity）存在持续担忧。作者从发展心理学视角出发，系统追踪心智推理能力在多训练阶段中的涌现模式及其前提条件。

Method: 在Olmo2和Pythia两个语言模型系列中，系统性地追踪了不同训练阶段（预训练、SFT、DPO）在错误信念任务（FBT）上的表现，同时评估情境建模能力（对场景基本事实属性的报告能力），并对比两者涌现顺序与关系。

Result: 1) 超过随机水平的FBT表现依赖于模型大小和足够训练量；2) FBT能力在预训练后期相对较晚涌现；3) 后训练干预（SFT、DPO）在最具心智化诊断性的条件（错误信念、隐式）下提升最大；4) FBT表现脆弱，非事实性动词（如"认为"）即使在真实信念条件下也会增加错误信念归因；5) 情境建模准确性普遍先于并高于FBT准确性，但情境表征在某些方面存在不一致——Olmo2 13b对始终知情的对抗智能体的知识判断受目标智能体知识状态和非事实性动词的影响。

Conclusion: 更大、训练充分的模型以发展性顺序形成部分连贯的情境模型，但在心智推理方面表现出显著的脆弱性，这凸显了采用发展性和压力测试方法评估LLM能力的价值。

Abstract: Recent work suggests that Large Language Models (LLMs) are sensitive to the belief states of agents described by text, as measured by the false belief task (FBT), yet persistent concerns of construct validity remain. We adopt a **developmental perspective**, tracing the pattern of mental state reasoning behavior -- and likely **preconditions** for this behavior -- across multiple training stages in the Olmo2 and Pythia language model suites. We find that above-chance FBT performance depends both on model size and sufficient training volume, emerges relatively late in pretraining, and is most improved by post-training interventions (SFT, DPO) in the condition most diagnostic of mentalizing (False Belief, Implicit). However, FBT performance is fragile: consistent with past work, the use of non-factive verbs (e.g., thinks) increases false belief attributions even in the True Belief condition. To contextualize these findings, we track the emergence of **situation modeling**: the ability to report on basic factual properties of a described scene. Situation modeling accuracy generally precedes and exceeds FBT accuracy, yet situational representations also prove surprisingly incoherent in certain respects: when asked about the knowledge states of the Antagonist agent -- who always knows the item's true location -- Olmo2 13b is consistently influenced both by the Target agent's knowledge state and the presence of non-factive verbs. Together, these results suggest that larger, sufficiently trained models build partially coherent situation models in a developmentally appropriate sequence, yet display surprising fragility -- highlighting the value of developmental and stress-testing approaches for evaluating LLM capabilities.

</details>


### [265] [Fast Numbers, Slow Language: Bridging Quantitative and Qualitative Earnings Signals](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29734)
*Ding Yu,Zhuo Liu,Hao Zhang,Hangfeng He*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文首次提出EarningsInOne语料库，统一了美股盈利公告中的定量数据（EPS/营收）与定性语言（管理层语气、问答可信度）分析框架，发现定量信息在公告后数分钟内被算法交易吸收，而定性信号（如ECT情绪）的收益峰值出现在下一个交易日，且此前被基于MSE的波动率评估所掩盖。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 金融经济学家与NLP研究者虽研究同一事件（盈利公告），但采用不兼容的框架（目标、交易设置、评估指标不同），导致两类信号无法直接比较与关联。

Method: 构建EarningsInOne语料库，涵盖SP 1500指数成分股（2022-2025年）的盈利新闻、ECT文本及日内/次日价格数据；对定量与定性信号应用统一的交易与评估工具进行对比分析。

Result: 定量惊喜在公告时达峰值，至下一个开盘前基本被消除；定性ECT情绪在下一个交易日才达到收益峰值，且该收益真实可交易，但被先前基于MSE的符号无关波动率优化评估所隐藏。

Conclusion: 两类信息存在清晰的速度分离：数字快、语言慢。统一框架揭示了定性信号的滞后但可交易价值，为跨社区协作提供了基础。

Abstract: Earnings announcements release two types of information sequentially: quantitative surprise (numeric earnings-per-share (EPS)/revenue versus analyst estimate) arrives first in press releases and financial news, processed by algorithmic traders within minutes; qualitative language (management tone, guidance, question-and-answer (Q&A) credibility) arrives 30-90 min later in the earnings conference call transcript (ECT), requiring human interpretation overnight. Financial economists have studied quantitative surprise for 50 years; natural language processing (NLP) researchers have studied qualitative ECT signals for a decade. Despite studying the same event, the two communities used incompatible frameworks: different targets (return vs. volatility), trading setups (long top-decile and short bottom-decile vs. trade-all), and metrics (return spread between top and bottom 20% (Q5-Q1) vs. mean squared error (MSE)), making direct comparison and connection challenging.
  We bridge these communities with EarningsInOne, the first corpus aligning earnings news, ECTs, and intraday and next-day prices across SP 1500 (broad U.S. equity universe, 2022-2025). Applying unified trading and evaluation tools to both signal types, we confirm a clean speed separation, fast numbers, slow language: quantitative surprise peaks at announcement and is largely eliminated by the next market open; qualitative ECT sentiment peaks on the next trading day, real and tradeable, but hidden under prior transcript-based evaluation that optimised sign-agnostic volatility with pointwise MSE.

</details>


### [266] [A French OSCE Dialogue Dataset and Controllable Virtual Patient System for Clinical Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28526)
*Doria Bonzi,Tom Bourgeade,Fabrice Lefèvre,Irina Illina*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文介绍了法语的OSCE医患对话数据集（240个交互），提出了基于LLM的可控合成对话生成流程（含检索增强和反思循环），并构建了多层级评估框架（使用LLM-as-a-Judge评估患者逼真度、学生表现和语言质量）。实验表明可控性模块提升了患者逼真度和评估一致性，最后实现了学生可与虚拟病人交互并接收自动反馈的原型系统。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准化病人（SP）资源稀缺，限制了医学生临床沟通技能的训练机会，因此需要开发高质量的虚拟病人系统来补充传统的OSCE训练。

Method: 1) 构建法语OSCE对话数据集；2) 设计可控LLM管线，集成检索增强（retrieval-based grounding）和反思循环（reflection loop）确保患者一致性和真实性；3) 提出多层级评估框架，利用LLM-as-a-Judge评估患者模拟质量、学生表现和语言质量。

Result: 可控性模块（检索增强和反思循环）总体上提升了虚拟病人的逼真度和学生评估的一致性。

Conclusion: 该工作验证了基于LLM的可控虚拟病人管线在OSCE训练中的有效性，为医学生提供了可扩展的练习和自动反馈工具。

Abstract: The clinical and communication skills of medical students are commonly assessed through Objective Structured Clinical Examinations (OSCEs), which consist of brief scenario-driven simulations of doctor-patient interactions. However, training is often limited by the low availability of human standardized patients, motivating the development of realistic virtual patients (VPs). To address this gap, we introduce a French OSCE dialogue dataset comprising 240 student-patient training interactions. We build upon it a controllable LLM-based pipeline to generate synthetic OSCE dialogues. The pipeline integrates modular components, such as retrieval-based grounding and a reflection loop, to ensure patient fidelity, coherence, and realism. Additionally, we propose a multi-level evaluation framework assessing patient simulation quality, student performance, and linguistic quality, using an LLM-as-a-Judge approach. Experiments suggest that controllability modules generally improve patient fidelity and student evaluation consistency. Finally, we implement an interactive prototype in which students can practice with a VP and receive automatic feedback.

</details>


### [267] [Legal Domain Adaptation of Modern BERT Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28538)
*Dominik Stammbach,Peter Henderson*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文对ModernBERT在法律领域进行领域自适应，通过在美国法院意见语料上继续预训练（MLM目标），发现即使ModernBERT已比原始BERT多训练500倍数据，继续预训练仍能显著提升法律相关任务性能，但从头训练不如基于现有检查点继续预训练。模型支持8192 token序列，可用于法律文本嵌入和检索重排序，所有检查点已公开。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究现代BERT模型（ModernBERT）在法律领域是否需要进一步的领域自适应，验证在大规模通用预训练基础上，法律领域特化预训练是否仍能带来性能增益。

Method: 使用掩码语言建模（MLM）目标，在美国法院意见（US court opinions）语料上对ModernBERT进行继续预训练（further pre-training），并与原始ModernBERT及从头预训练（from-scratch pre-training）方案进行对比。

Result: 在美国法院意见相关的所有数据集上，继续预训练的ModernBERT显著优于原始ModernBERT，增益幅度与早期BERT领域自适应工作相当；但从头预训练效果不及基于现有检查点继续预训练。

Conclusion: 即使预训练数据量已大幅增加，领域特定的继续预训练仍能带来显著性能提升；推荐采用继续预训练而非从头训练的策略进行法律领域自适应。

Abstract: We investigate domain adaptation of modern BERT models in the legal domain. We further pre-train ModernBERT on all US court opinions using the masked language modeling objective. Although ModernBERT has been trained on roughly 500x more data than original BERT, we still find that this model benefits from further pre-training and domain adaptation in the legal domain: we report significant improvements compared to vanilla ModernBERT on all datasets connected to US court opinions. We find gains similar to those reported in early work on domain adaptation of BERT-like models. However, from scratch pre-training does not match the performance of further pre-training an existing ModernBERT checkpoint in our experiments. The resulting models are capable of processing sequences up to 8,192 tokens, and can be used to compute meaningful embeddings of legal passages, or could quickly rerank hundreds of legal passages for a given search query. We release all model checkpoints publicly.

</details>


### [268] [Turn-Averaged SAEs for Feature Discovery and Long-Context Attribution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28548)
*Kevin Der,Harish Kamath,Ben Thompson*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出"轮次平均稀疏自编码器"(turn-averaged SAEs)，通过重建模型在单个对话轮次中的平均激活值，用固定数量的特征表示一个轮次，避免了标准SAE中特征数量随上下文线性增长的问题，提升了长文本场景下的可解释性效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准SAE基于单个token激活操作，导致激活特征数量随上下文长度线性增长，使得分析长模型转录变得困难。需要一种能够在长上下文中保持可解释性效率的方法。

Method: 提出turn-averaged SAEs：学习重建模型在单个Human或Assistant轮次中的平均激活值，从而用一个固定数量的特征向量来表示整个轮次，而非逐token处理。

Result: 1) 轮次平均特征比逐token特征更完整地描述了一个轮次的高层特征（经LLM评估）；2) 显著简化了归因图等下游SAE应用；3) 使可解释性技术在长上下文长度下变得实用。

Conclusion: Turn-averaged SAEs通过将SAE的作用单元从token级别提升到轮次级别，有效解决了标准SAE在长上下文中特征数量膨胀的问题，为长序列模型的可解释性分析提供了一种实用的解决方案。

Abstract: Sparse autoencoders (SAEs) have become a useful tool for extracting interpretable features in language models. However, standard SAE architectures operate on individual token activations, meaning that the number of active features scales linearly with context length, and studying long model transcripts becomes difficult. We introduce turn-averaged SAEs, which represent a single Human or Assistant turn with a fixed number of features by learning to reconstruct the average model activation across the turn. We find that turn-averaged features describe a single turn's high-level characteristics more completely than per-token features when judged by an LLM. We also demonstrate that turn-averaged SAEs greatly simplify common downstream uses of SAEs like attribution graphs. Broadly, turn-averaged SAEs make interpretability techniques practical at long context lengths.

</details>


### [269] [Depth-Staggered Fibonacci Spacing for Sparse Attention: Static Schedules Beat Learned Dilation and Extrapolate Where Dense Attention Fails](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28560)
*Chad A. Capps*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 研究Fibonacci间隔稀疏自注意力机制中每层缩放因子α的配置方式，发现静态逐层交错（stagger）策略在困惑度上优于固定和学习型α，且所有稀疏变体在4倍训练长度外推时几乎无退化，而稠密基线崩溃（困惑度上升201%）。但最优稀疏模型在训练长度上困惑度比稠密基线高26%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索稀疏自注意力中每层缩放因子α的不同配置方式（固定、学习、静态交错、互质重分配）对模型性能和外推能力的影响，寻找最优配置。

Method: 在21个匹配配置（60M参数、512隐藏维、16层、426M tokens）的语言模型上，比较四种α设置方式（固定、每层学习、静态线性交错、互质重分配），并与幂为2的基线及稠密基线对照。每个查询关注稠密局部窗口加一组Fibonacci间隔偏移。

Result: 1) 静态逐层交错优于固定和学习型α，且增益与基数无关；2) 学习型α无优势，推理延迟高约5倍；3) 所有稀疏变体在4倍训练长度外推时几乎无退化，稠密基线崩溃（困惑度+201%）；4) 最优稀疏模型训练长度困惑度比稠密高26%；5) 交错增益在上下文位置上均匀，而非集中于长程。

Conclusion: 静态逐层交错是稀疏注意力中成本效益最优的α配置方式；稀疏注意力具有天然的长度外推优势（归因于固定偏移只查询训练中见过的相对位置）；但稀疏注意力在训练长度上的性能损失仍显著。

Abstract: We study sparse self-attention in which each query attends to a dense local window plus a set of Fibonacci-spaced offsets, with a per-layer scalar alpha that compresses or expands the spacing. Across 21 language models trained under one matched recipe (60M parameters, 512 hidden, 16 layers, 426M tokens), we compare four ways of setting alpha across depth: fixed, per-layer learned, a static linear stagger, and a coprime (anti-gridding) reassignment of that stagger, together with a reach-matched power-of-2 control. Three results stand out. First, a static per-layer stagger improves perplexity over both fixed and learned alpha, and the gain is base-agnostic: applying the same stagger to a power-of-2 base lifts it above fixed Fibonacci and to parity with learned Fibonacci attention. Second, learning per layer is inert: it does not beat the static schedule and costs roughly five times the inference latency. Third, and most consequential, all sparse variants extrapolate to four times their training length with little or no degradation, whereas a recipe-matched dense baseline collapses (perplexity rises by 201% at 4x length); we attribute this to fixed-offset attention only ever querying relative positions seen during training. We also report two honest negatives: at training length the best sparse model has about 26% higher perplexity than the dense baseline, and the staggering gain is uniform across context positions rather than concentrated at long range.

</details>


### [270] [SEAD: Competence-Aware On-Policy Distillation via Entropy-Guided Supervision](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28562)
*Chia-Hsuan Lee,Zelei Cheng,Yu Wang,Renkun Ni,Sambit Sahu,Shi-Xiong Zhang,William Campbell*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: SEAD利用熵作为统一探针，在三种尺度上解决同策略蒸馏中教师质量随学生能力变化导致的浪费问题，在OLMo-3上相比普通OPD平均准确率提升4.8%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 同策略蒸馏（OPD）中教师监督质量取决于学生能力，不连贯的rollout产生噪声梯度，已掌握的token产生冗余梯度，在token、训练阶段和prompt三个尺度上存在浪费，但现有方法采用统一监督方式，未能解决这一问题。

Method: SEAD方法包含三个组件：(1) 联合师生熵将token分区，分配不同的散度或零梯度（约50%跳过）；(2) 余弦调度从前向KL退火到反向KL；(3) 能力门控课程引入从易到难的prompt。三者共生协同依赖。

Result: 在OLMo-3（7B到32B）上，SEAD在六个数学基准上相比普通OPD平均准确率提升4.8%，消融实验证实组件之间存在超加性相互作用。

Conclusion: SEAD通过熵引导的三种尺度优化策略有效解决了OPD中的监督质量依赖问题，实现了显著的性能提升，且组件间的协同效应证明了方法的必要性。

Abstract: On-policy distillation (OPD) has a property absent in offline distillation and RL: teacher supervision quality depends on student competence. Incoherent rollouts yield noisy gradients; already-mastered tokens yield redundant ones. This creates waste at three scales (tokens, training phases, and prompts) yet existing methods supervise uniformly. We introduce SEAD, which uses entropy as a unified probe of this competence-dependent degradation at three scales: (1) joint teacher-student entropy partitions tokens into zones receiving tailored divergences or zero gradient (approx. 50% skipped); (2) a cosine schedule anneals from forward to reverse KL as competence grows; (3) a competence-gated curriculum introduces prompts easy-to-hard. These components are symbiotically necessary: token selection requires coherent rollouts (curriculum), annealing requires monotonic improvement (also curriculum). On OLMo-3 (7B to 32B), SEAD achieves +4.8 avg accuracy over vanilla OPD across six math benchmarks, with ablations confirming super-additive interactions.

</details>


### [271] [Correct codes for the wrong reasons? validating LLMs as measurement instruments for theoretical constructs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28574)
*Manuel Pita*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出"粒度校准"（grain calibration）方法，通过将构念分解为从句级组件、提取证据并基于理论规则组合结果，解决LLM作为编码器时构念效度缺失的问题，将验证从输出评分转向过程证据。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM作为文本编码器时，其与人类标注者的一致性只能证明可靠性（reliability），但无法保证构念效度（construct validity）。模型可能通过理论无关的相关物达到正确编码，现有方法无法区分这种虚假测量与真实测量。

Method: 提出粒度校准方法：将目标构念分解为从句级（clause-level）组件；对每个组件在文本中提取抽取式证据（extractive evidence）；通过显式、源自理论的规则组合各组件结果。规则以陈述形式给出而非隐藏在单次黑箱推理中。

Result: 该方法使验证从"将仪器输出与标注者评分比对"转向"证明仪器运行在理论所指定的构念上"。规则结构本身提供了关于过程而非输出的证据，能显示哪些组件决定了编码结果，并且在编码错误时能区分是组件遗漏还是混淆了邻近构念。

Conclusion: 粒度校准通过显式化编码的中间过程，将构念效度验证从结果一致性转移到过程透明度，从而弥合了LLM作为编码器时可靠性与构念效度之间的鸿沟。

Abstract: When a large language model (LLM) codes a construct in text as a human annotator would, that agreement makes the LLM a reliable coder. Yet reliability leaves construct validity untouched. The instrument may be theory-naive, reaching the code through a correlate that meets none of the demands the construct's theory makes, and no current method tells that apart from genuine measurement. We propose grain calibration as a method that closes the gap. It decomposes a construct into clause-level components, tests each against the text with extractive evidence, and combines the results through an explicit, theory-derived rule. Because the rule is stated rather than lodged in one opaque pass, its structure is evidence about the process rather than the output. It shows which components settled a code, and, when the code is wrong, whether a component was missed or an adjacent construct mistaken for it. Validation shifts from scoring an instrument's outputs against an annotator to showing that the instrument runs on the construct its theory specifies.

</details>


### [272] [Phonological Perception of Sign Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28667)
*Kayo Yin,Jessica Carter,Alex Xijie Lu,Annemarie Kocab*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文评估了手语识别（SLR）模型对手语音位参数（如手形、位置、运动）的感知能力，发现模型具有 emergent 音位敏感性，但存在架构权衡：基于姿态的模型对手形敏感，基于像素的模型对位置敏感；姿态模型学到的潜在表征与人类相似性判断相关（r~0.49）。当前训练范式不足以克服架构归纳偏置。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管SLR模型在翻译基准上表现提升，但尚不清楚它们是否真正区分抽象音位特征，抑或仅依赖低级统计相关性。本文旨在探究SLR模型是否具备音位感知能力。

Method: 使用最小对（minimal pairs）探测SLR模型对音位参数的敏感性，并将模型表征与人类行为相似性判断数据进行对齐分析，评估架构差异性（基于姿态 vs 基于像素）。

Result: 模型展现了 emergent 音位敏感性，但存在架构权衡：pose-based 模型对手形对比敏感，pixel-based 模型对位置变化敏感。Pose-based 模型表征与人类感知相似性判断存在中度正相关（r~0.49）。

Conclusion: SLR模型虽然表现出 emergenet 音位学习能力，但当前训练方法无法使其超越架构固有的归纳偏置，难以实现更全面的音位感知。

Abstract: Sign languages are compositional systems where meaning arises by combining sublexical phonological parameters, such as handshape, location, and movement. While deep learning models for Sign Language Recognition (SLR) have achieved increased performance on translation benchmarks, it remains unclear whether these models distinguish abstract phonological features or merely rely on low-level statistical correlations. This work evaluates the phonological perception of SLR models trained on American Sign Language (ASL) by probing phonological sensitivity using minimal pairs and evaluating representational alignment with human behavioral data. Our results reveal that SLR models exhibit emergent phonological sensitivity, but with clear architectural trade-offs: pose-based models are sensitive to handshape contrasts, while pixel-based models better capture location changes. Furthermore, pose-based models learn latent representations that correlate with human perceptual similarity judgments (r~0.49). These findings suggest that while SLR models exhibit emergent phonology, current training paradigms are insufficient to scale them beyond their architectural inductive biases.

</details>


### [273] [AnTenA: Actionable and Explainable Tensor Analysis System with Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28708)
*Dawon Ahn,Auder Der,Evangelos E. Papalexakis*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出AnTenA方法，利用大语言模型（LLMs）的知识来解释多视角数据中的隐藏模式，通过任务无关和任务相关的提示来解释张量分解提取的共聚类潜在模式，并在前向和反向推理任务上评估解释质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的多视角数据模式解释依赖标签或辅助元数据，但这些数据可能不准确、不充分或不可用，亟需一种不依赖这些条件的解释方法。

Method: 提出AnTenA方法，结合张量分解提取共聚类潜在模式，再利用LLMs通过任务无关和任务相关的提示来生成对这些模式的自然语言解释，并通过前向和反向推理任务进行评估。

Result: 在两种推理任务上验证了LLMs对张量分解所得隐藏模式的解释能力，表明该方法能有效生成可理解且有意义的解释。

Conclusion: AnTenA成功利用LLMs的知识解释多视角数据中的隐藏模式，为缺乏准确标签或元数据的场景提供了可行的替代方案。

Abstract: Accurately explaining hidden patterns in multi-aspect data has typically been done by leveraging labels and/or accompanying auxiliary metadata. However, labels and auxiliary data may be inaccurate (e.g. nonstandard, inconsistent), insufficient (e.g. static tabular metadata for time-dependent recordings), or unavailable. %
We propose \fullmethod (\method), which leverages the knowledge of large language models (LLMs) to explain the hidden patterns in human narratives. \method uses task-agnostic and task-specific prompts to explain extracted co-clustered latent patterns from tensor decomposition. To evaluate these explanations, we test the LLMs on forward and backward inference tasks. % Our demo system is available at https://github.com/dawonahn/ECML_PKDD_AnTenA.

</details>


### [274] [SEATauBench: Adapting Tool-Agent-User Evaluation Into Low-Resource Southeast Asian Languages](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28715)
*My Chiffon Nguyen,Aulia Adila,Saksorn Ruangtanusak,Kittiphat Leesombatwathana,Vissuta Gunawan Lim,Patomporn Payoungkhamdee,Samuel Cahyawijaya*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: SEATauBench 是首个针对东南亚主权AI的智能体评估框架，将TauBench适配至五种区域语言（中文、越南语、泰语、印尼语、菲律宾语），发现英文智能体能力在仅改变对话语言时迁移良好，但随任务上下文本地化程度加深，质量和鲁棒性急剧下降，揭示了纯英文评估的局限性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 东南亚AI开发与评估虽快速发展，但区域语言的智能体能力仍缺乏理解，这对主权AI至关重要。现有评估多聚焦英文，无法反映多语言环境下的真实表现。

Method: 将TauBench适配至五种东南亚语言，设置渐进式本地化场景（仅对话语言变化→工具规范本地化→任务领域完全本地化），在三个近期模型上评估智能体性能。

Result: 英文智能体能力在仅对话语言变化时迁移较好，但随任务上下文本地化程度加深，质量和鲁棒性急剧下降，完全领域适配时损失最大。纯英文评估无法准确衡量东南亚语言环境下的智能体能力。

Conclusion: SEATauBench提供了诊断性基准和可复用的适配流程，对于构建面向语言多样性区域的多语言可靠智能体具有重要意义。数据和代码已开源。

Abstract: While AI development and evaluation for Southeast Asia (SEA) has grown rapidly, agent capabilities in regional languages are still poorly understood despite its importance to sovereign AI. To fill this gap, we introduce SEATauBench, the first agent-focused evaluation framework for SEA sovereign AI. SeaTau adapts TauBench to five languages -- Mandarin, Vietnamese, Thai, Indonesian, and Filipino -- and evaluates agents across progressively localized settings that vary the language of user-agent interaction, tool specifications, and task domains. Across three recent models, we find that English agent capabilities transfer reasonably well when only the conversation language changes, but quality and robustness degrade sharply as more task contexts are localized, with the largest losses in full domain adaptation. We also the limits of English-only agent assessment for measuring agent capabilities in SEA languages. More broadly, SeaTau provides a diagnostic benchmark and reusable adaptation pipeline for building reliable multilingual agents for linguistically diverse regions. Data and code can be accessed at github.com/SEACrowd/SEATauBench.

</details>


### [275] [DriftGuard: Safety-Aware Multi-Monitor Detection and Selective Adaptation for Evolving Toxicity Moderation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28725)
*Yuting Xin,Hanyu Cai,Binqi Shen,Lier Jin,Lan Hu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出 DriftGuard，一个安全感知的自适应审核框架，通过多监测器漂移检测与硬混合模型更新相结合，在毒性内容审核中实现更鲁棒的漂移适应，在 Civil Comments 和 Jigsaw-to-DynaHate 数据集上显著提升了毒性召回率并降低了假阴性率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的毒性审核系统面临在线环境中有害行为通过编码语言、目标转移等方式不断演变的问题，而传统的漂移检测方法仅关注全局分布变化，容易遗漏局部有害子空间或高风险模型错误区域中的安全相关漂移，亟需一种安全感知的漂移检测与模型更新方法。

Method: DriftGuard 框架包含两方面：一是多监测器漂移检测，同时追踪全局文本漂移、身份有害漂移、模型不确定性、毒性风险漂移和假阴性风险漂移；二是安全感知的模型更新，当检测到安全相关漂移时，采用硬混合适应集（Hard-mix Adaptation Set）优先选择假阴性、身份高危、假阳性风险和边界不确定样本进行模型更新。

Result: 在 Civil Comments 时序漂移和 Jigsaw-to-DynaHate 跨数据集漂移实验中，安全感知监测器能检测到全局漂移无法发现的漂移信号；硬混合适应在 Civil Comments 上将毒性召回率提升至 0.8777，在 DynaHate 上从 0.7107 提升至 0.8523；Bootstrap 分析显示 DynaHate 毒性召回率提升 0.1418，假阴性率降低 0.0781。

Conclusion: DriftGuard 通过将安全感知的漂移检测与轻量级目标模型更新相结合，能够更有效地适应动态环境中的毒性演化，提升审核系统的鲁棒性，尤其在高风险的局部有害子空间中表现优越。

Abstract: Automated toxicity moderation systems operate in dynamic online environments where harmful behavior evolves through coded language, shifting targets, and strategic adaptation to enforcement. Existing drift detection methods often focus on global distributional change, but such signals may miss safety-relevant shifts that emerge in localized harm subspaces or high-risk model-error regions. This paper introduces DriftGuard, a safety-aware adaptive moderation framework that combines multi-monitor drift detection with selective model updating. The framework tracks global text drift, identity-harm drift, model uncertainty, toxic-risk drift, and false-negative-risk drift. When safety-relevant change is detected, the model is updated using a hard-mix adaptation set that prioritizes likely false negatives, identity-related high-risk examples, false-positive-risk examples, and uncertain boundary cases. Experiments on Civil Comments temporal shift and Jigsaw-to-DynaHate cross-dataset shift show that safety-aware monitors detect risks missed by global drift alone. Hard-mix adaptation improves toxic recall and accuracy over no-update and random-balanced baselines, raising toxic recall to 0.8777 on Civil Comments and from 0.7107 to 0.8523 on DynaHate. Bootstrap analysis further shows stable DynaHate safety gains, with toxic recall increasing by 0.1418 and false-negative prevalence decreasing by 0.0781. Overall, DriftGuard links safety-aware drift detection to targeted, lightweight model updating for more robust adaptive toxicity moderation.

</details>


### [276] [5ting at SemEval-2026 Task 8: Strong End-to-End Multi-Turn RAG via LLM-Based Reranking and Faithfulness Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28737)
*Thien-Qua-T-Nguyen,Chi Hoang,Nguyen Tran,Tri Le,Khanh Truong,Chinh Trong Nguyen*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文介绍了5ting系统，用于SemEval2026 Task 8 (MTRAGEval)多轮检索增强生成评估。系统采用BGE-M3密集检索+FAISS索引、双查询合并检索、LLM重排序以及角色分离生成约束于检索证据。检索器在Task A获得nDCG@5=0.4719，端到端系统在Task C获得谐波分数0.5597和RL_F=0.7692。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多轮RAG系统面临语境漂移、查询不明确和幻觉风险等挑战，现有方法难以有效应对，因此需要开发更鲁棒的多轮RAG系统。

Method: 系统采用BGE-M3密集检索模型进行语义检索，结合FAISS进行高效索引；使用双查询合并检索策略融合当前查询和对话历史；通过LLM进行重排序优化相关性；最后采用角色分离生成机制，约束生成内容仅基于检索到的证据。

Result: 检索器在Task A上nDCG@5=0.4719；端到端系统在Task C上谐波分数0.5597，RL_F=0.7692。

Conclusion: 提出的5ting系统通过密集检索、双查询合并、LLM重排序和角色分离生成等模块组合，在多轮RAG评估中取得了有竞争力的性能，验证了各模块协同工作的有效性。

Abstract: We introduce 5ting, our system for the SemEval2026 Task 8 (MTRAGEval), which evaluates multi-turn Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) systems. Multi turn RAG involves context drift, under specification, and hallucination risk. Our system combines BGE-M3 dense retrieval with FAISS indexing, dual-query merged retrieval, and LLM based reranking, followed by role separated generation constrained to retrieved evidence. The retriever achieved nDCG@5 = 0.4719 in Task A, while the end to end system ranked in Task C with a harmonic score of 0.5597 and RL_F = 0.7692.

</details>


### [277] [Majority Vote Silences Minority Values: Annotator Disagreement at the Hate/Offensive Boundary in HateXplain](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28772)
*Joshua Muhumuza,Joab Ezra Agaba,Mercy Amiyo*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 研究表明，仇恨言论标注流程中多数投票聚合并非中立，42.6%的标注者分歧集中在仇恨/冒犯边界。传统硬标签和软标签模型在分歧样本上准确率下降22个百分点，而多头部模型在冒犯性分歧上的准确率低至0.245。标准评估指标无法检测模型中边界错误的高置信度问题，三种下游干预均失败，问题本质上是结构性的。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 揭示传统仇恨言论标注流程中多数投票聚合方法的非中立性，以及由此导致的模型在边界案例上的系统性失败和评估盲区。

Method: 使用HateXplain数据集，对比硬标签BERT（Model A）、软标签模型（Model B）和多头部逐标注者模型（Model C）的表现，并进行三种下游干预实验。

Result: 42.6%的分歧集中在仇恨/冒犯边界；Model A和Model B在分歧样本上准确率下降22个百分点（p<0.0001）；Model C在冒犯性分歧上准确率仅0.245；Model A边界错误置信度（0.710）显著高于Model C（0.495）。三种下游干预均无法恢复边界准确率。

Conclusion: 多数投票将争议性判断呈现为地面真相，模型继承了这种虚假确定性。干预必须发生在标注设计的上游环节，而非下游。

Abstract: Hate speech annotation pipelines routinely collapse annotator disagreement into majority vote labels before training. We show that this aggregation is not neutral: 42.6% of all annotator disagreement in HateXplain concentrates specifically at the hate/offensive boundary, a pattern consistent with annotators applying different thresholds for where hate begins (chi-squared = 135.199, df = 2, p < 0.0001). Both a hard-label BERT model (Model A) and a soft-label model (Model B) drop 22 percentage points in accuracy from agreed posts (~80%) to disagreement posts (~58%), confirmed at p < 0.0001. A per-annotator multi-head model (Model C) widens this gap further to 28 points while collapsing offensive disagreement accuracy to 0.245. Critically, Model A expresses significantly higher confidence on boundary case errors than Model C (0.710 vs. 0.495, p < 0.0001), meaning standard evaluation metrics will not detect the failure. Three downstream interventions of increasing sophistication all fail to recover boundary accuracy. We argue the problem is structural. Majority vote presents a contested judgment as ground truth, and models inherit that false certainty. The intervention must be upstream in annotation design.

</details>


### [278] [Structure-Preserving Document Translation via Multi-Stage LLM Pipeline: A Case Study in Marathi](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28796)
*Manasi Waghe,Danish Chandargi,Mohammad Aamir Rayyan,Raviraj Joshi,A. R. Deshpande*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出了一种保持文档结构的马拉地语→英语政府文档翻译框架，集成布局感知OCR、坐标文本提取、LLM翻译和HTML重建，在真实政府PDF上实现了优于传统文本翻译管线的结构保真度、翻译连贯性和术语一致性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 印度政府文档多以马拉地语等地区语言发布，非母语读者、跨州行政机构及政策分析者面临严重的可访问性障碍。现有神经机器翻译虽在句子级表现良好，但忽视了文档结构、格式完整性和领域术语，无法直接应用于官方文档处理。

Method: 提出端到端的结构保持翻译框架，包含四个模块：布局感知OCR（识别文档布局结构）、基于坐标的文本提取（保留空间位置信息）、大语言模型翻译（处理领域术语和翻译连贯性）、基于HTML表示的文档重建（维持层级结构和布局对齐）。

Result: 在真实马拉地语政府PDF上的实验表明，该方法在结构保真度、翻译连贯性和术语一致性方面均优于传统纯文本翻译管线。

Conclusion: 该框架为电子政务和行政文档处理提供了可扩展的多语言可访问性解决方案，填补了现有翻译系统在文档结构保持方面的空白。

Abstract: Government documents in India are predominantly issued in regional languages such as Marathi, creating substantial accessibility barriers for non-native readers, interstate administrative bodies, and policy analysts. Although recent advances in neural machine translation have improved sentence-level translation quality, existing systems largely neglect document structure, formatting integrity, and domain-specific terminology, thereby limiting their applicability to official documentation. This paper presents a structure-preserving Marathi-to-English government document translation framework capable of performing end-to-end document transformation while maintaining layout fidelity. The proposed system integrates layout-aware optical character recognition, coordinate-based text extraction, large language model based translation, and structured document reconstruction through HTML representations. By enforcing spatial alignment constraints and preserving hierarchical document elements, the framework ensures structural consistency between the source and translated documents. Experimental evaluation on real-world Marathi government PDFs demonstrates improved structural preservation, translation coherence, and terminological consistency compared to conventional text-only translation pipelines. The proposed framework contributes toward scalable multilingual accessibility solutions for e-governance and administrative document processing.

</details>


### [279] [Labeling Training Data for Entity Matching Using Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28823)
*Aaron Steiner,Christian Bizer*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文研究了利用知识蒸馏工作流，让大语言模型（LLM）作为教师模型标注训练数据，训练小模型（如RoBERTa、Ditto）进行实体匹配。实验表明，学生模型在使用机器标注数据时的性能与使用基准训练集相当（F1差距<2点），且推理速度比直接使用LLM快41.5-534倍，标注成本仅需$28-$41，而人工标注需470小时。该方法可大幅减少甚至消除实体匹配中人工标注的需求。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM在实体匹配任务上表现优异但推理慢、成本高；传统小模型推理快但需要大量任务特定的训练数据。本文探索是否可以通过知识蒸馏避免提供任务特定训练数据的需求，从而结合两者优势。

Method: 采用知识蒸馏工作流：LLM作为教师模型标注训练对，再训练小型学生模型。研究涉及四个维度：候选对选择策略、教师模型、标签后处理方法、学生模型。在Abt-Buy等五个基准上评估学生模型性能，并与基准训练集训练的结果对比。

Result: 学生模型用机器标注数据训练与用基准训练集训练的性能相当，F1差距在±2点以内。使用GPT-5.2标注五个基准的总成本$28-$41，而人工标注需470小时。推理时Ditto比直接使用LLM快41.5-534倍。

Conclusion: 当前LLM结合合适的候选对选择方法，可以显著减少甚至消除实体匹配中人工标注使用案例特定训练数据的需要，为实际部署提供了高效且经济的解决方案。

Abstract: Recent large language models (LLMs) achieve strong performance on entity matching without requiring task-specific training data. However, applying these models to large sets of candidate pairs remains slow and costly. In contrast, entity matchers using traditional machine learning methods or small language models (SLMs), such as RoBERTa, offer much faster inference but require task-specific training data.
  This paper investigates whether the need to provide task-specific training data can be avoided by using knowledge-distillation workflows, in which an LLM serves as a teacher model to label training pairs that are subsequently used to train a smaller student model. We investigate knowledge distillation for entity matching along the following dimensions: pair-selection strategy, teacher model, label post-processing method, and student model. We evaluate the workflows using the Abt-Buy, Walmart-Amazon, WDC Products, DBLP-ACM, and DBLP-Scholar benchmarks, and compare the performance of student models trained with machine-labeled data to the performance of the same models trained using the benchmark training sets.
  Our experiments show that student models trained using the machine-labeled sets perform approximately on par with models trained on the benchmark training sets, with the remaining differences in both directions staying below two F1 points. Using GPT-5.2 to label the training sets for all five benchmarks costs US\$28.31 to US\$40.88, whereas manually labeling the same training sets is estimated to require 470 hours of work. At inference time, Ditto is 41.5 to 534 times faster than directly using an LLM to perform the matching tasks.
  These results indicate that current LLMs, when combined with a suitable pair-selection method, can substantially reduce or even eliminate the manual effort required to label use case-specific training data for entity matching.

</details>


### [280] [The Heterogeneous Safety Impacts of Benign Multilingual Fine-Tuning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28843)
*Will Hawkins,Kaivalya Rawal,Jonathan Rystrøm,Stratis Tsirtsis,Zihao Fu,Greta Warren,Ryan Brown,Eoin Delaney,Sandra Wachter,Brent Mittelstadt,Chris Russell*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文首次系统性地研究了多语言环境下大语言模型在非对抗性微调后出现的安全退化现象。通过对Llama-3.2、Qwen3和Gemma-3三种模型在9种语言上进行良性数据微调，发现安全结果高度依赖于微调语言和评估语言的选择，某些设置下对抗性指令遵从率增加四倍，且多语言安全漂移与通用能力指标脱钩，评估仅用英语不足以保障部署安全。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究已发现大语言模型在非对抗性数据微调后，虽然提升了特定任务能力，但会增加对不安全对抗性提示的响应倾向。然而这一现象在多语言环境下的表现尚缺乏系统性研究，现有的单一英语评估无法揭示跨语言安全盲区，因此需要全面实证研究。

Method: 选取Llama-3.2、Qwen3、Gemma-3三种大语言模型，使用9种语言的良性翻译数据进行微调，通过测量对抗性指令遵从率的变化来评估多语言安全漂移，并分析内部表示漂移与安全行为变化之间的关系。

Result: 安全结果高度依赖于微调语言和评估语言的选择；某些设置下对抗性遵从率增加四倍；多语言安全漂移与通用能力指标脱钩；非英语微调导致的内部表示漂移更小，但会导致模型倾向于过度遵从或过度拒绝。

Conclusion: 仅用英语评估微调影响不足以保障多语言部署安全；发布Multilingual-Benign-Tune数据集和SORRY-Bench-Multilingual评估套件以促进跨语言安全盲点的进一步研究。

Abstract: Fine-tuning a large language model is a ubiquitous method for enhancing its capability on a specific downstream task. However, prior work has shown that this increase in capability comes with a cost: it can increase a model's tendency to respond to unsafe adversarial prompts, even when fine-tuning with non-adversarial data. We present the first comprehensive empirical study of this phenomenon in multilingual settings by fine-tuning Llama-3.2, Qwen3, and Gemma-3 models using benign data translated across nine languages. We find that safety outcomes are highly sensitive to both the choice of fine-tuning language and the evaluation language, with adversarial compliance rates increasing four-fold in some settings. Multilingual safety drift is decoupled from general capability metrics, and occurs heterogeneously across languages and models. Fine-tuning in non-English languages often induces smaller internal representational drifts than English, but these shifts lead models to default to either exaggerated compliance or refusal. As such, assessing fine-tuning impacts solely in English provides inadequate assurance for deployment. To facilitate further research into these cross-lingual safety blind spots, we release the Multilingual-Benign-Tune dataset and the SORRY-Bench-Multilingual evaluation suite.

</details>


### [281] [Open but Incompatible: A License Compatibility Analysis of Corpora for Low-Resource African Languages](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28867)
*Ernst van Gassen*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文审计了非洲自然语言处理中二十多个语料库家族的许可来源，构建了六层兼容性矩阵，并通过三个案例语言（基图巴语、扎尔马语、莫西语）揭示了四种许可违规模式：明确禁止、复合许可误导、隐藏NoDerivs条款、数据持久性失败。最后提供了合规检查清单和法律清洁的数据增强方案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 非洲NLP领域大量使用Creative Commons许可发布语料库，但社区对CC许可的兼容性规则普遍忽视，导致数据集组合、衍生发布时存在法律风险，亟需系统性审计和合规指导。

Method: 1) 审计二十多个语料库家族的许可来源；2) 构建六层许可兼容性矩阵；3) 以基图巴语/穆努库图巴语、扎尔马语、莫西语为案例进行深入分析；4) 用原始来源证据记录四种失败模式。

Result: 发现四种许可失败模式：JW300因违反服务条款被OPUS移除；WAXAL声称CC-BY 4.0但与自身HuggingFace数据集卡矛盾；Tanzil在CC-BY标签下隐藏了NoDerivs条款；刚果广播语料库中402/405个URL已失效。

Conclusion: 提供预标注合规检查清单和法律上清洁的数据增强机会调查，以指导非洲NLP社区在许可合规的前提下构建和发布数据集。

Abstract: Creative Commons licenses dominate African NLP corpus releases, but their compatibility rules are rarely applied. CC-BY-SA and CC-BY-NC cannot be combined in a single published dataset; a NoDerivs clause silently prohibits tokenisation and annotation. This paper audits the license provenance of over twenty corpus families used in African NLP, constructs a six-tier compatibility matrix, and applies it to three case-study languages: Kituba/Munukutuba, Zarma, and Moore. Four failure modes are documented with primary-source evidence: outright prohibition (JW300, removed from OPUS after a legal audit confirmed Terms of Service violation); composite license misrepresentation (WAXAL, whose CC-BY 4.0 claim is contradicted by its own HuggingFace dataset card); a NoDerivs clause hidden behind a CC-BY label (Tanzil); and data persistence failure (the Congolese Radio Corpus, where 402 of 405 source URLs are now dead). A pre-annotation due diligence checklist and a survey of legally clean enrichment opportunities close the paper.

</details>


### [282] [Memory-Managed Long-Context Attention: A Preliminary Study of Editable Request-Local Memory](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28876)
*Junyi Zou,Avrova Donz*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文研究记忆管理的长上下文注意力机制，提出将快速循环/稀疏主干网络与可编辑的请求局部记忆槽和查询时稀疏回退相结合的方法。通过多种结构化合成任务、生成自然语言和局部冻结模型诊断，证明纯固定状态或纯稀疏方法在某些写入、版本、抗污染或无写入信号场景中会失败，而混合方法能覆盖两种路线。实验结果包括：2,097,152令牌机制压力测试达到50/50汇集准确率（2-132个活动块），2.74M参数最小因果事件令牌模型在轻量写入监督下达到595/600等。论文区分了三个主张：受控槽生命周期可行、当写入缺乏未来查询信号时需要稀疏回退、学习型开放域选择仍是主要架构瓶颈。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 长上下文语言模型常常混淆两个目标：将历史压缩为高效状态，以及维护可靠的长期记忆。线性、循环和稀疏注意力虽然降低了长序列处理成本，但并未指定事实何时应该写入、覆盖、保护免受干扰或丢弃。研究者希望探索明确管理记忆生命周期的方法，以弥补纯固定状态或纯稀疏方法的不足。

Method: 提出记忆管理的长上下文注意力机制，将快速循环或稀疏主干网络与显式可编辑的请求局部记忆槽和查询时稀疏回退相结合。通过结构化合成任务、令牌/块/序列桥接、生成自然语言和局部冻结模型诊断等多种设置进行系统性评估。

Result: 2,097,152令牌压力测试达到50/50汇集准确率（2-132个活动块）；2.74M参数最小因果事件令牌模型在轻量写入监督下达到595/600；六族冻结隐藏状态桥接达到1079/1080受控指针对准确率（但使用生成器提供的整数键ID和单独编码的规范键字符串）；RULER 4K诊断接近全上下文；LongBench v1 16K子集显示朴素词汇选择不具备通用性。

Conclusion: 论文区分并支持三个关键主张：（1）受控槽生命周期是可行的；（2）当写入操作缺乏未来查询信号时需要稀疏回退；（3）学习型开放域选择仍然是主要的架构瓶颈。论文未声称提出最终生成架构、全局槽轨迹收敛或系统优越性。

Abstract: Long-context language models often conflate two different goals: compressing history into an efficient state, and maintaining reliable long-term memory. Linear, recurrent, and sparse attention reduce the cost of processing long sequences, but they do not by themselves specify when a fact should be written, overwritten, protected from distractors, or discarded. We study memory-managed long-context attention, a research route that separates a fast recurrent or sparse backbone from explicit editable request-local memory slots and query-time sparse fallback. Across structured synthetic tasks, token/chunk/sequence bridges, generated natural language, and local frozen-model diagnostics, pure fixed-state or pure sparse methods fail some overwrite, version, anti-pollution, or no-write-signal cases, while a hybrid covers both routes. A small 2,097,152-token mechanism stress test reaches 50/50 pooled accuracy with 2-132 active chunks. A 2.74M-parameter minimal causal event-token model reaches 595/600 with lite write supervision, supporting proof of trainability rather than scale. A six-family frozen-hidden-state bridge reaches 1079/1080 controlled pointer accuracy, but it uses generator-provided integer key IDs and separately encoded canonical key strings; it is an oracle-metadata probe, not open-text entity resolution. Local non-leaderboard RULER 4K diagnostics remain close to full context, whereas a 33-record LongBench v1 16K subset shows that naive lexical selection is not general. The evidence separates three claims: controlled slot lifecycle is feasible, sparse fallback is needed when writes lack future-query signals, and learned open-domain selection remains the main architectural bottleneck. We do not claim a final generative architecture, global slot-trajectory convergence, or systems superiority.

</details>


### [283] [PASTA: A Paraphrasing And Self-Training Approach for Knowledge Updating in LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28898)
*Takayuki Yamamoto,Daisuke Kawahara*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: PASTA框架通过数据增强、问答生成和自学习DPO过程，成功将新闻文章中的事实知识集成到预训练LLM中，在保持通用语言能力的同时，将知识更新后的问答准确率从0.02提升至0.82。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 预训练LLM存在知识更新困难，且难以准确回答关于特定事实信息（如新闻文章）的问题，亟需一种有效的方法将新的事实知识注入模型。

Method: 提出PASTA框架，结合数据增强、问答生成和自学习DPO（直接偏好优化）过程，实现知识覆写与幻觉抑制的同步进行。

Result: 在基于模型知识截止日期后发布的网络文章实验评估中，PASTA将问答准确率从0.02提升至0.82，同时保持了通用语言能力。

Conclusion: PASTA是一种简单而有效的知识更新框架，能够构建面向特定领域的专业化LLM，在注入新知识的同时有效抑制幻觉。

Abstract: Knowledge updating in pre-trained Large Language Models (LLMs) remains an important challenge. While continual training provides a potential avenue for knowledge updating, it continues to present substantial technical difficulties. Furthermore, LLMs often struggle with accurately answering questions about specific factual information, such as news articles - a capability limitation widely recognized in the research community. This paper proposes PASTA, a simple yet powerful framework for integrating detailed factual information from news articles as new knowledge into LLMs, with the primary goal of building specialized models that accurately answer questions about this knowledge. Our framework combines data augmentation, question-answering generation, and a novel self-learning DPO process that simultaneously enables knowledge overwriting and hallucination suppression. We provide insights into effective knowledge updating through systematic analysis of learning parameters and data configurations. In our experimental evaluation with web articles published after the base model's knowledge cutoff, PASTA achieved remarkable improvement from 0.02 to 0.82 accuracy while maintaining general language capabilities, demonstrating its effectiveness for creating domain-specialized LLMs.

</details>


### [284] [Information Dynamics of Language Communication](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30096)
*Leonardo S. Goodall,Andrea I. Luppi,Pedro A. M. Mediano*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个信息论框架，利用大语言模型作为概率估计器，通过语义转移熵（STE）和语义部分信息分解（SPID）两个指标来量化对话中语义内容的定向流动和多源贡献（冗余、独特、协同成分）。四个实验验证了该框架在检测认知僵化对话中的信息流减少、识别说服者主导作用、区分高低质量心理治疗对话方向性、以及揭示议论文中协同前提贡献等方面的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 计算语言学中缺乏量化对话中语义内容如何通过交流传播的成熟方法，现有研究未能有效分解多源信息贡献的冗余性、独特性和协同性成分。

Method: 基于信息论，利用大语言模型作为自然语言概率估计器，提出了语义转移熵（STE）和语义部分信息分解（SPID）两种度量方法，分别用于捕获说话者之间的定向预测影响和解析多源信息对目标的联合贡献。

Result: 四个实验表明：该框架能检测认知僵化对话中信息流减少；识别说服者在话语塑造中的主导作用；通过信息方向性区分高质量与低质量心理治疗；揭示议论文中前提的协同贡献。

Conclusion: 该框架为研究数字话语、教学互动、临床对话等任何语言交换结构相关的领域中的信息动力学提供了新途径。

Abstract: Quantifying how meaning propagates through communicative exchanges remains underdeveloped in computational linguistics. Here we introduce an information-theoretic framework that quantifies the directed flow of semantic content between interlocutors and decomposes multi-source contributions into redundant, unique, and synergistic components. Our approach leverages large language models as probabilistic estimators of natural language to compute two measures: semantic transfer entropy (STE), which captures directed predictive influence between speakers, and semantic partial information decomposition (SPID), which resolves how multiple sources jointly shape a target's language. Across four experiments we show that the framework detects reduced information flow in cognitively rigid dialogue, captures the dominant role of persuaders in shaping discourse, distinguishes high- from low-quality psychotherapy by the directionality of therapist-client information exchange, and reveals synergistic premise contributions in argumentative essays. This framework opens new avenues for studying information dynamics in digital discourse, pedagogical interactions, clinical dialogues, and any domain in which the structure of linguistic exchange is of research relevance.

</details>


### [285] [Latent Bridges for Multi-Table Question Answering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28916)
*Simone Varriale,Tamara Cucumides,Floris Geerts,Paolo Papotti*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: GRAB是一个用于表格问答的构造器-编码器-桥接流水线，通过异构图表征、消息传递编码和查询条件潜在令牌，将关系数据压缩传递给冻结的LLM，仅训练轻量级图编码器和桥接模块（91M参数），显著提升关系问答性能，尤其在多表场景中表现突出。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法直接将表格展平为文本输入LLM，忽略了表格的结构化关系信息，且全模型微调成本高昂并可能损害LLM的泛化推理能力。本文旨在以高效、原则性的方式将关系深度学习与LLM连接起来。

Method: 提出GRAB流水线，包含三个部分：1）构造器将关系数据提升为异构图表征；2）编码器通过消息传递机制对图进行编码；3）桥接器通过一组查询条件潜在令牌将图编码信号传递给冻结的LLM。LLM保持完全冻结，仅训练图编码器和潜在桥接模块（共91M参数）。

Result: 在关系问答任务上显著提升了性能，尤其在更具挑战性的多表设置中取得了最大的性能增益。

Conclusion: GRAB提供了一种高效、原则性的方法，通过轻量级图编码和潜在桥接将结构化关系信息注入冻结的LLM，在保持LLM通用推理能力的同时大幅提升表格问答性能。

Abstract: We introduce GRAB, a constructor-encoder-bridge pipeline for table question answering. Our method lifts relational data into an heterogeneous graph, encodes it via message passing, and transfers the signals to an LLM through a small set of query-conditioned latent tokens. This provides the LLM with a compact, task-relevant structural representation together with the flattened text. Crucially, the LLM remains strictly frozen to preserve its general reasoning capabilities; we train only the lightweight graph encoder and latent bridge (91M parameters), allowing the entire pipeline to be trained efficiently. Our pipeline significantly improves performance on relational Question Answering, with the largest gains in demanding multi-table settings, offering an efficient, principled way to connect relational deep learning with LLMs.

</details>


### [286] [FinInvest-GTCN: Explainable Graph-Temporal-Causal Modeling for Risk-Aware Investment Decision Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28933)
*Junyan Tan,Yifan Li,Minghao Wang,Zihan Chen,Haoyu Zhang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出了FinInvest-GTCN，一种结合图网络、时间序列和因果推理的风险投资决策模型，在RA-MSE（2.51 vs 3.05）和模拟组合回报（+18.7%）上显著优于基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 风险投资决策面临多源异构数据、非平稳时间序列以及高风险低数据场景下可解释性需求等挑战，传统方法难以同时应对这些问题。

Method: 提出图-时序-因果网络（GTCN），包含关系图编码器、多尺度时序融合模块和因果决策头；核心创新为元因果自适应（MCA）策略，通过对齐因果结构实现数据稀缺领域的鲁棒微调。

Result: 在专有VC数据集上，RA-MSE从3.05降至2.51，模拟组合累计回报提升18.7%；消融实验验证了各组件的必要性。

Conclusion: 本文开创了一种数据驱动、可解释的投资决策支持框架，在稳定性、可解释性和适应性上均有提升。

Abstract: Venture capital (VC) investment decisions face distinct challenges, such as multi-source heterogeneous data, non-stationary time series, and the demand for explainable predictions in high-stakes, low-data settings. To overcome these issues, we introduce \textbf{FinInvest-GTCN}, a Graph-Temporal-Causal Network that redefines the task from content recommendation to quantitative risk-return assessment. This architecture combines a relational graph encoder to capture the investment ecosystem's topology, a multi-scale temporal fusion module to handle long-term dependencies and non-stationarity, and a causal decision head that generates risk-adjusted predictions with interpretable causal attributions. A core innovation is the Meta-Causal Adaptation (MCA) strategy, which facilitates robust fine-tuning for new, data-scarce sectors by aligning updates with causally-plausible structures derived from meta-pretraining. Comprehensive experiments on proprietary VC datasets show that FinInvest-GTCN delivers state-of-the-art results, markedly lowering the primary Risk-Adjusted Mean Squared Error (RA-MSE) to 2.51 from a baseline of 3.05 and boosting the cumulative return of a simulated portfolio by 18.7\%. Ablation studies underscore the essential role of each component, while additional analyses confirm the model's stability, interpretability, and enhanced adaptability. This work pioneers a data-driven, explainable framework for investment decision support.

</details>


### [287] [EVLA: An Electro-Aware Multimodal Assistant for Physically-Grounded Driving Reasoning and Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28938)
*Yuxin Liu,Zihan Chen,Haoyu Wang,Mingxuan Zhang,Ruijie Lin,Siyuan Zhao*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出EVLA框架，通过统一共态编码器（UCSE）融合视觉、文本和车辆状态信息，并引入电动感知结构化推理链（ESRC）进行物理约束下的确定性推理，实现上下文感知且能量最优的驾驶决策，相比强VLM基线在驾驶QA基准上最终得分提升0.0871，准确率提升5.6%，推理速度提升36%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLM驾驶助手将车辆动力学视为黑箱，缺乏对车辆实时机电状态（如电机扭矩、电池SOC）的感知能力，导致决策无法结合物理约束和能量优化目标。

Method: 提出EVLA框架，包含两大核心创新：1）统一共态编码器（UCSE），将视觉、文本和车辆状态输入融合到共享潜在表示中，并引入能量效率场（Energy-Efficiency Field）建模空间能量成本；2）电动感知结构化推理链（ESRC），以内部门控确定性推理过程替代外部思维链提示，基于物理约束和优化目标进行推理。采用物理引导联合损失进行端到端训练。

Result: 在驾驶QA基准上，EVLA相比强微调VLM基线，最终得分提升0.0871，准确率提升5.6%；消融实验验证了各组件必要性；效率分析显示推理速度比多阶段管线快36%。

Conclusion: 融合车辆状态感知和结构化物理推理对于开发下一代物理具身的驾驶助手至关重要。

Abstract: Modern vision-language models (VLMs) for driving assistants typically treat vehicle dynamics as a black box, resulting in decisions that lack awareness of the vehicle's real-time electro-mechanical state. To bridge this gap, we introduce the Electro-Visual-Language Assistant (EVLA) -- a novel framework that combines multi-modal scene understanding with real-time perception of the electrified powertrain state (e.g., motor torque, battery SOC). Our approach features two key innovations: first, a Unified Co-State Encoder (UCSE) that fuses visual, textual, and vehicle-state inputs into a shared latent representation, augmented with an Energy-Efficiency Field to model spatial energy costs; and second, an Electro-aware Structured Reasoning Chain (ESRC), which replaces external chain-of-thought prompting with an internal, deterministic reasoning process grounded in physical constraints and optimization objectives. Trained end-to-end with a physics-guided joint loss, EVLA learns to generate context-aware and energy-optimal driving decisions. Extensive evaluations on a driving QA benchmark demonstrate that EVLA substantially outperforms strong fine-tuned VLM baselines, improving the final score by +0.0871 and accuracy by +5.6\%. Ablation studies validate the necessity of each component, and efficiency analyses show that EVLA achieves 36\% faster inference than multi-stage pipelines. This work underscores that integrating vehicle-state awareness and structured physical reasoning is crucial for developing next-generation, physically-grounded driving assistants.

</details>


### [288] [A3M: Adaptive, Adversarial and Multi-Objective Learning for Strategic Bidding in Repeated Auctions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28943)
*Junhan Li,Yuxin Zhang,Haoran Wang,Minghao Chen*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出A3M框架，集成深度强化学习、对手建模与多目标奖励设计，用于重复多单位拍卖中的竞价优化，相比基线方法在标准设置下降低30-40%的遗憾值，并能应对非平稳对手和可调节的多目标权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有重复拍卖竞价方法依赖于固定的探索-利用调度、假设平稳对手、且只优化竞标者效用，导致适应性和策略鲁棒性受限，亟需一种更灵活鲁棒的竞价策略框架。

Method: A3M框架包括三个核心组件：①基于演员-评论家深度强化学习的主干网络动态平衡探索与利用；②对手模型通过虚构博弈应对非平稳对手；③复合奖励函数联合优化竞标者效用、拍卖人收益和公平性。

Result: 在歧视性和统一价格拍卖中，A3M在标准设置下降低30-40%的最终遗憾值，在对手策略突变时保持鲁棒性，随单位数量K扩展良好，并支持可调节的多目标权衡；消融实验验证了各核心组件的必要性。

Conclusion: A3M是一个强大且灵活的在线拍卖竞价学习框架，通过DRL、对手建模和多目标优化的有机结合，有效克服了现有方法的局限性。

Abstract: Learning to bid in repeated multi-unit auctions with bandit feedback poses a fundamental challenge. Existing methods often rely on rigid explore-then-exploit schedules, assume stationary adversaries, and optimize solely for bidder utility, thereby limiting adaptability and strategic robustness. To address these limitations, we introduce the A3M framework, which integrates adaptive deep reinforcement learning (DRL), explicit adversarial reasoning, and principled multi-objective reward design for online auction strategy optimization. A3M employs an actor-critic DRL backbone to dynamically balance exploration and exploitation, an opponent model for fictitious play against non-stationary adversaries, and a composite reward function to jointly maximize utility, auctioneer revenue, and fairness. We provide the first comprehensive empirical evaluation of this integrated approach against established baselines in both discriminatory and uniform price auctions. Results show that A3M reduces final regret by 30--40\% in standard settings, maintains robust performance against adversarial strategy shifts, scales favorably with the number of units $K$, and enables tunable multi-objective trade-offs. An extensive ablation study confirms the necessity of each core component. Our work establishes A3M as a powerful and flexible framework for learning in complex auction environments.

</details>


### [289] [Beyond the Mean: Three-Axis Fidelity for Aligning LLM-Based Survey Simulators from Small Pilot Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28963)
