### [362] [Before Thinking, Learn to Decide: Proactive Routing for Efficient Visual Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30217)
*Yinan Zhou,Haokun Lin,Yichen Wu,Caifeng Shan,Zhenan Sun,Yuxin Chen,Teng Wang,Chen Ma,Li Zhu,Ying Shan*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出PRP（主动路由范式），通过联合评估草稿模型和目标模型的能力，在推理早期做出路由决策，从而在多模态推理中实现高效协同推理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多模态大模型在复杂视觉任务中推理效率受限于长思维链，现有语言模型的路由方法（基于后验token概率或监督微调）在多模态场景下效果不佳，且仅在完整输出后进行路由，忽视了目标模型是否真正能解决被路由的实例。

Method: 提出PRP主动路由范式，包含两个核心组件：1) Draft Rating Learning (DRL) - 为草稿模型配备内部置信度估计器；2) Joint Rating Learning (JRL) - 预测目标模型处理给定查询的能力，优先分配目标模型擅长的样本而非最难的样本。

Result: 在多个多模态推理基准上验证了方法的有效性和效率，显著加速推理同时不损害整体性能。

Conclusion: 通过主动路由范式实现细粒度、实例级别的路由决策，有效解决了多模态场景下协同推理的效率瓶颈。

Abstract: Large multimodal models have achieved strong reasoning on complex visual tasks, but their inference efficiency is often restricted by long chains of thought. A promising solution is to pair a small draft model with a large target model, enabling cooperative inference employing a routing signal that adaptively routes queries to either the draft or target model based on their difficulties for optimal efficiency and accuracy. Yet, the remaining bottleneck is to establish a reliable query difficulty signal under multimodal settings. Existing approaches designed for language models either rely on post-hoc token probabilities, which fall short in multimodal scenarios, or depend on supervised fine-tuning, which is a data-sensitive strategy. Both paradigms perform routing only after a complete output, and ignore whether the target model can actually solve the routed instances. To address this, we propose PRP, a Proactive Routing Paradigm that enables early decision-making by jointly evaluating the competence of both the draft and target models. Our Draft Rating Learning (DRL) equips the draft model with an internal confidence estimator, while Joint Rating Learning (JRL) predicts how well the target model can handle a given query, thereby prioritizing the allocation of samples it excels at rather than the hardest ones. These ratings enable fine-grained, instance-level \textbf{Proactive Routing} and substantially accelerate inference without compromising overall performance. Extensive experiments across multiple multimodal reasoning benchmarks validate our effectiveness and efficiency.

</details>


### [363] [CaresAI at CT-DEB26: Detecting Dosing Errors In Clinical Trials Using Domain-Specific Transformer Embeddings and Classification Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30236)
*Leon Hamnett,Favour Igwezeke,Joseph Itopa Abubakar,Mary Adetutu Adewunmi*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本研究利用领域特定的Transformer嵌入（如BioBERT）结合结构化元数据，检测临床试验协议中的剂量错误风险，最佳模型（梯度提升、支持向量机等）达到0.821-0.853的ROC-AUC，优于基线方法3.95%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 剂量错误可导致患者伤害和不良药物事件，但通过早期识别可预防；现有方法在临床试验协议文本中检测剂量错误的能力有限，亟需更有效的自动化筛查手段以保障试验完整性和减轻临床经济负担。

Method: 采用ClinicalBERT、PubMedBERT、BioBERT、MedCPT等Transformer模型编码临床试验文本，结合分类特征；将文本嵌入输入逻辑回归、梯度提升、支持向量机、残差神经网络等模型，以ROC-AUC为主要评估指标进行实验。

Result: BioBERT在逻辑回归基线下以0.794的ROC-AUC优于其他编码器（较ClinicalBERT提升3.95%）；多嵌入融合无额外收益；梯度提升、支持向量机、逻辑回归和残差神经网络达到最佳性能（ROC-AUC: 0.821-0.853）。

Conclusion: 领域特定的Transformer嵌入与结构化元数据的集成能够有效识别高风险剂量错误的临床试验，推进安全监测并支持监管决策。

Abstract: Medication errors, particularly dosing errors in clinical trials (CT), can lead to patient harm, adverse drug events and worse patient outcomes. Dosing errors are preventable, and early identification can improve trial integrity and mitigate subsequent clinical and financial burden. This study aims to detect dosing errors within CT protocols by evaluating text representations of trial information using transformer-based language models trained on biomedical corpora. CT textual data was encoded using several models, including ClinicalBERT, PubMedBERT, BioBERT, and MedCPT, and integrated with categorical features. These text embeddings were used as input to classical machine learning models and neural network architectures within an experimental framework. Performance was primarily assessed using ROC-AUC with respect to predicting dosage error. Under a logistic regression baseline, BioBERT consistently outperformed alternative encoders, achieving an ROC-AUC of 0.794, a 3.95% improvement over the ClinicalBERT baseline. Combining multiple embeddings did not yield improvements, indicating that domain alignment outweighs representational stacking. Gradient boosting models, support vector classifiers, logistic regression, and residual neural networks achieved the strongest performance for predicting dosage error, achieving ROC-AUCs: 0.821 to 0.853. Overall, the integration of domain-specific transformer embeddings with structured metadata enables discrimination of trials meeting a predefined elevated dosing error risk criterion, advancing safety monitoring and supporting informed regulatory decision-making.

</details>


### [364] [Comparing Human and Automatic Recognition of Dutch Dysarthric Continuous Speech: A Case Study](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30237)
*Yuanyuan Zhang,Dimme de Groot,Jorge Martinez,Odette Scharenborg*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本研究比较了人类听者和三种商用ASR系统（Whisper-large-V3, Google Chirp 3, Omnilingual）对一名严重构音障碍患者的荷兰语连续朗读和自发言语的识别表现。结果显示，人类和ASR系统的词错误率（WER）均超过70%，表明构音障碍语音识别极具挑战性。通过微调构建的个性化DSR模型显著降低了WER（仍>23%），但已超越人类听者，接近可用于日常沟通支持的水平。未来研究应聚焦于改善自发言语和较长朗读语句的识别，特别是特定音素。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 开发个性化构音障碍语音识别（DSR）模型，以支持构音障碍患者的日常沟通。

Method: 对比人类听者与三种商用ASR系统（Whisper-large-V3, Google Chirp 3, Omnilingual）对一名严重构音障碍患者的荷兰语连续朗读和自发言语的识别性能，并通过微调构建个性化DSR模型。

Result: 人类和ASR系统的WER均超过70%；微调后个性化DSR模型的WER降至>23%，但仍高于可用阈值。

Conclusion: 个性化DSR模型性能超越人类听者，接近可用于日常沟通支持的水平；未来需改进自发言语和较长朗读语句的识别，重点关注特定音素。

Abstract: In our goal to develop personalised dysarthric speech recognition (DSR) models, this study compared the recognition performances of human listeners and those of three state-of-the-art, off-the-shelf ASR systems (Whisper-large-V3, Google Chirp 3, and Omnilingual) on the recognition of Dutch continuous read and spontaneous speech from a single speaker with severe dysarthria. Results showed that both humans listeners and the three off-the-shelf ASR systems exhibit word error rates (WER) exceeding 70% on average, indicating that DSR is highly challenging for both humans and ASR systems. Fine-tuning on the dysarthric speech significantly reduced WER. Although overall WERs are still quite high (>23%), the personalised DSR models outperformed the human listeners, and performance is getting closer to being useful for supporting day-to-day communication of dysarthric speakers. Future research should focus on improving personalized DSR on spontaneous speech and longer utterances in the case of read speech, with a specific focus on particular phonemes.

</details>


### [365] [Grounding LLM Reasoning under Incomplete Graph Evidence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30247)
*Jiaqi Li,Fanghui Song*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文从理论上分析了LLMs在不完全知识图谱证据下的推理过程，提出软接地作为KL正则化变形，并给出了证据扰动下的稳定性界限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 知识图谱通常是不完整的（开放世界假设），而LLM推理所依赖的图证据是检索得到的、有时序范围的、不完整的状态，并非完整真理。因此需要理论框架来理解在这种不完备证据下如何有效接地LLM的推理轨迹。

Method: 建立理论框架：将证据状态抽象为实体锚点、类型关系残差、路径能量和支持区域；LLM提供候选轨迹的先验分布。通过KL正则化变形实现软接地，有限松弛保留未支持但不矛盾的轨迹，硬条件约束作为无限惩罚极限。

Result: 证明了在开放世界不完备性下，基于观察状态的硬规则无法同时拒绝所有虚假未支持轨迹并保留真实但未观察到的轨迹。给出了证据扰动下的稳定性界限，并阐明了GraphRAG、KGQA、图智能体、约束解码和忠实生成等场景的适用约束机制。

Conclusion: KG兼容性应被视为声明的支持（declared support），而非事实真理（factual truth）。框架为不同下游任务提供了理论指导，区分了软硬约束的适用边界。

Abstract: Knowledge graphs can guide large language models (LLMs) reasoning, but the graph seen by a system is usually a retrieved, linked, temporally scoped, and incomplete evidence state rather than a complete account of truth. We develop a theoretical perspective on grounding observable LLM trajectories under such incomplete graph evidence.The evidence state induces entity anchors, typed relation residuals, path energies, and support regions, while the language model supplies a prior over candidate trajectories. We show that, under open-world incompleteness, no hard rule based only on the observed state can both reject every false unsupported trajectory and retain every true-but-unobserved one.We then characterize soft grounding as a KL-regularized deformation of the LLM prior: finite slack preserves support for unsupported but non-contradicted trajectories, whereas hard conditioning appears as an infinite-penalty limit.The framework also yields stability bounds under evidence perturbations and clarifies the constraint regimes appropriate for GraphRAG, KGQA, graph agents, constrained decoding, and faithful generation. The claims are evidence-relative: KG compatibility is treated as declared support, not factual truth.

</details>


### [366] [Multi-Agentic System Leveraging Open-Source LLMs to Mitigate Disinformation Threats](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30259)
*Sebastian Kula,Martin Tamajka*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于多智能体系统的去信息检测方法，通过模拟人类标注者的决策过程（包括共识机制、认知多样性、知识多样性和层次结构），在多种语言（英语、波兰语、斯洛伐克语、保加利亚语）的数据集上取得了优于GPT-4和GPT-3.5等大型语言模型的效果，并利用开源模型确保透明度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当代社会去信息威胁日益严重，电子通信、社交媒体和人工智能的普及加剧了这一问题。人工事实核查已无法应对如此大规模的挑战，迫切需要自动化方法来自动检测和揭穿去信息。

Method: 提出一种多智能体系统方法，模拟人类标注者在去信息检测任务中的决策过程。系统包含共识机制、认知多样性、知识多样性和层次化结构，采用开源模型（如LLaMA、Kimi、Qwen、Deepseek、LLaMA-Nemotron）以保证透明度。

Result: 在英语（高资源）、波兰语（中资源）、斯洛伐克语（低资源）和保加利亚语（低资源）数据集上，该方法在直接去信息检测、需核查文本识别、可验证事实主张检测等任务中均优于GPT-4和GPT-3.5等单一大型语言模型。

Conclusion: 多智能体系统通过模拟人类协作决策机制，能够有效提升去信息检测性能，特别是在低资源语言场景中表现突出，为自动化去信息治理提供了新的可行方案。

Abstract: In contemporary societies, the threat of disinformation has reached alarming levels, exacerbated by the proliferation of electronic communication, social media, and advancements in artificial intelligence. As a result, there is an urgent need to develop effective countermeasures to mitigate this menace. However, the sheer scale of the problem renders manual fact-checking and human-based verification inadequate, underscoring the necessity for automated methods to detect and debunk disinformation. This article proposes a novel approach based on a multi-agent system that emulates the decision-making processes of human annotators engaged in disinformation detection tasks. By incorporating a consensus mechanism, diversity in cognition and diversity in knowledge, and also hierarchical structure, inspired by human annotators' behavior, the proposed method achieves superior results compared to individual Large Language Models (LLMs), including GPT 4 and GPT 3.5. The system leverages open models (e.g., LLaMA, Kimi, Qwen, Deepseek and LLaMA-Nemotron) to ensure greater transparency. The evaluation of the proposed method encompasses datasets in languages with varying resource availability, including English (high-resource), Polish (medium-resource), Slovak (low-resource) and Bulgarian (low-resource). Experiments were conducted on tasks such as direct disinformation detection, identification of texts worthy of verification, and detection of texts containing verifiable factual claims.

</details>


### [367] [DialogPII: A multilingual dataset of synthetic dialog transcripts to detect personal information](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30312)
*Roland Roller,Vera Czehmann,Derya Erman,Luke Flanagan,Ibrahim Baroud,Frédéric Blain,Viviana Cotik,Eletta Giusto,Akhil Juneja,Mariana Neves,Maria Słowińska,Christine Hovhannisyan,Aaron Louis Eidt,Lisa Raithel,Sebastian Möller,Maija Poikela*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了DialogPII，一个多语言合成对话数据集，用于检测个人身份信息（PII），涵盖8种交互场景、19种实体类型和11种语言，包含书面和语音转录两种形式，并提供了基线模型和基准实验结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 医疗和社会科学等领域的对话数据是宝贵的分析资源，但负责任的数据共享需要检测和移除个人身份及敏感信息以保护隐私，因此需要支持自动去标识化系统的开发与评估。

Method: 使用大语言模型半自动生成合成对话，人工策展确保合理性和多样性，并进行本地化适配；通过TTS合成语音，再用Whisper转录；通过自动投影和人工校正进行标注，跨语言对齐书面和语音转录资源。

Result: 构建了DialogPII数据集，覆盖11种语言、8种场景和19种实体类型；发布了基线多语言命名实体识别模型；通过标注者间一致性分析、翻译质量评估、标注投影评估和Transformer序列标注模型基准实验进行了技术验证。

Conclusion: DialogPII为多语言对话数据中的个人信息检测提供了标准化评估资源，书面和语音转录双模态对齐的特性使其能够支持更真实的去标识化研究。

Abstract: Conversational data collected in domains such as healthcare or social sciences is a valuable resource for research and automated analysis. However, responsible data sharing requires the detection and removal of personally identifiable and sensitive information to protect individual privacy. To support the development and evaluation of automatic de-identification systems, we present DialogPII, a multilingual dataset of synthetic dialogs and speech-derived transcripts for personal information detection. DialogPII covers eight interaction scenarios (emergency calls, medical anamnesis interviews, therapy sessions, insurance communication, customer support, clinical interviews regarding an AI-supported dashboard, police reports, and group therapy discussions), 19 entity types, and 11 languages (English, Arabic, Finnish, French, German, Hindi, Italian, Polish, Portuguese, Spanish, and Turkish). Dialogs were generated semi-automatically using large language models, manually curated for plausibility and diversity, and localized to country- and city-specific contexts. All dialogs were additionally converted to speech via text-to-speech synthesis, transcribed with Whisper, and annotated through automatic projection and manual correction, yielding aligned written and speech-derived resources across all languages. We further release baseline multilingual named entity recognition models and provide technical validation through inter-annotator agreement analysis, translation quality evaluation, annotation projection assessment, and benchmark experiments with transformer-based sequence labeling models.

</details>


### [368] [REAR: Test-time Preference Realignment through Reward Decomposition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30339)
*Fuxiang Zhang,Pengcheng Wang,Chenran Li,Yi-Chen Li,Yuxin Chen,Lang Feng,Chenfeng Xu,Masayoshi Tomizuka,Bo An*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出REAR框架，将偏好对齐建模为重新对齐问题，通过分解奖励函数为问题相关和偏好相关两部分，并将其表示为token级策略对数概率的线性组合，从而高效地集成到测试时扩展算法中，实现无训练的偏好对齐。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有后训练方法虽能针对特定需求对齐LLM，但需要昂贵的数据整理和额外训练。测试时扩展方法虽然高效且无需训练，但此前仅适用于数学、编程等可验证领域。本文旨在将测试时扩展方法扩展到偏好对齐任务中。

Method: 1) 将偏好对齐建模为重新对齐问题；2) 将底层奖励函数分解为问题相关项和偏好信息项两部分；3) 推导出REAR（重新对齐奖励），选择性重新缩放这两项的比例；4) 将REAR表示为token级策略对数概率的线性组合，使其计算高效且易于集成到best-of-N采样、树搜索等TTS算法中。

Result: 相比其他测试时基线方法，REAR不仅能在多样化用户需求下实现偏好对齐任务的可扩展测试时重新对齐，还能在适当的偏好设置下泛化到数学和视觉任务。

Conclusion: REAR框架成功将测试时扩展方法拓展到偏好对齐领域，通过奖励分解和高效的token级实现，在不需额外训练的情况下实现了可扩展的偏好对齐，并展现出跨任务泛化能力。

Abstract: Aligning large language models (LLMs) with diverse user preferences is a critical yet challenging task. While post-training methods can adapt models to specific needs, they often require costly data curation and additional training. Test-time scaling (TTS) presents an efficient, training-free alternative, but its application has been largely limited to verifiable domains like mathematics and coding, where response correctness is easily judged. To extend TTS to preference alignment, we introduce a novel framework that models the task as a realignment problem, since the base model often fails to sufficiently align with the stated preference. Our key insight is to decompose the underlying reward function into two components: one related to the question and the other to preference information. This allows us to derive a REAlignment Reward (REAR) that selectively rescales the proportions of these two reward terms. We then show that REAR can be formulated as a linear combination of token-level policy log-probabilities, making it computationally efficient and easy to integrate with various TTS algorithms such as best-of-$N$ sampling and tree search. Experiments show that compared to other test-time baselines, REAR not only enables scalable test-time realignment for preference alignment tasks under diverse user requirements, but also generalizes to mathematical and visual tasks under appropriate preference settings.

</details>


### [369] [OLIVE: View-Augmented Latent Prediction with Waveform Reconstruction for Speech SSL](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30356)
*Karl El Hajal,Mathew Magimai. -Doss*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: OLIVE是一个联合优化分析和合成目标的自监督语音表示学习框架，通过结合视图增强的掩码潜在预测和波形重建，在统一目标下同时提升生成、说话人、识别和语义任务的性能，并改善波形重建质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自监督语音表示学习方法通常只优化分析目标（如掩码预测）或合成目标（如重构），难以同时兼顾下游任务性能和信号级信息保留，因此需要一种统一框架来联合优化两类目标。

Method: 提出OLIVE框架，联合优化视图增强的掩码潜在预测（分析目标）和波形重建（合成目标），在统一目标下约束早期编码器特征保留信号级信息，同时使后期上下文表示具备不变性。

Result: OLIVE在生成任务和说话人任务上取得改进，在识别和语义任务上保持竞争力，并提升了波形重建质量。

Conclusion: 联合优化分析和合成目标能够使语音表示同时支持多种任务，验证了多目标自监督学习在语音领域的有效性。

Abstract: We propose Online Latent prediction with Invariant Views and rEconstruction (OLIVE), a self-supervised speech representation learning framework that jointly optimizes analysis and synthesis objectives. OLIVE combines view-augmented masked latent prediction with waveform reconstruction under a unified objective. Reconstruction constrains early encoder features to retain signal-level information, while masked latent prediction shapes later contextual representations toward invariance for robust downstream performance. We show that these objectives enable representations that support a broad range of tasks. In particular, OLIVE improves results on generation and speaker tasks, maintains competitive performance on recognition and semantic tasks, and improves waveform reconstruction.

</details>


### [370] [MOPD: Multi-Teacher On-Policy Distillation for Capability Integration in LLM Post-Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30406)
*Wenhan Ma,Jianyu Wei,Liang Zhao,Hailin Zhang,Bangjun Xiao,Lei Li,Qibin Yang,Bofei Gao,Yudong Wang,Rang Li,Jinhao Dong,Zhifang Sui,Fuli Luo*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出多教师在线策略蒸馏（MOPD）范式，通过先为每个领域单独训练强化学习教师，再让学生模型在其自身轨迹上蒸馏这些教师的能力，有效解决了多能力融合难题。在Qwen3-30B-A3B上，MOPD优于Mix-RL、Cascade RL等方法，几乎继承了每位教师的全部能力，并已部署到工业级前沿模型MiMo-V2-Flash中。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有大语言模型在强化学习后训练阶段难以高效融合多种能力，Off-Policy Finetune和Mix-RL等方法存在效率低或性能损失的问题。

Method: MOPD采用两阶段策略：先对各领域分别进行专门化强化学习训练得到领域教师，再在学生的自采样轨迹上对这些教师进行知识蒸馏，从而消除曝光偏差并提供密集优化信号。

Result: 在Qwen3-30B-A3B上，MOPD全面超越Mix-RL、Cascade RL、Off-Policy Finetune和Param-Merge等基线方法，几乎完整继承各教师能力；该范式已成功部署于工业级前沿模型MiMo-V2-Flash的后训练中。

Conclusion: MOPD是一种高效的多能力融合后训练范式，支持各领域教师并行独立开发，避免了传统多领域后训练中的跨领域耦合问题，具有显著的工业实用价值。

Abstract: Modern large language models (LLMs) rely on reinforcement learning during post-training to push specific capabilities, yet integrating multiple capabilities into one model remains hard. Existing methods, such as Off-Policy Finetune and Mix-RL, are either inefficient or lose performance. In this work, we propose Multi-teacher On-Policy Distillation (MOPD), a post-training paradigm for combining the capabilities of multiple domain RL teachers: we first run per-domain specialised RL to obtain a set of domain teachers, then distill these teachers into the student on its own rollouts. This eliminates exposure bias and provides a dense optimization signal. On Qwen3-30B-A3B, MOPD outperforms Mix-RL, Cascade RL, Off-Policy Finetune, and Param-Merge baselines, inheriting nearly all of each teacher's capability. MOPD also enables parallel, independent development of domain teachers, removing the cross-domain coupling typical of multi-domain post-training. MOPD has been deployed in the post-training of MiMo-V2-Flash, an industrial-scale frontier model, demonstrating its practical value for capability integration in frontier-scale LLMs.

</details>


### [371] [Field Order Should Not Matter: Permutation-Invariant Embedding Model Fine-Tuning for Structured Metadata Retrieval](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30473)
*Aivin V. Solatorio,Olivier Dupriez,Rafael Macalaba*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出排列不变微调（PI-FT）方法，解决结构化元数据检索中字段顺序影响编码质量的问题；同时发布DevDataBench基准和模型，在15种语言上以118M参数模型超越text-embedding-3-large。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 结构化元数据记录由多个字段组成，传统做法将其序列化为字符串时强制指定字段顺序。微调后编码器会依赖绝对位置而非字段标签，导致索引重建顺序时检索质量大幅下降（nDCG@10损失7.4点）。

Method: 提出PI-FT：每个训练样本在序列化时随机采样字段顺序并随机丢弃部分字段，迫使模型学习字段标签语义而非位置信息。实现仅需修改数据加载器约两行代码。同时构建DevDataBench，利用LLM生成15种语言的接地查询（覆盖所有指标）。

Result: 标准微调在字段顺序变化后nDCG@10下降7.4点，PI-FT仅下降0.2点。118M参数的CPU可部署模型在DevDataBench上达到0.707 nDCG@10，超过text-embedding-3-large的0.556。

Conclusion: 字段顺序是结构化检索中不可忽视的关键因素，PI-FT通过排列不变性训练有效消除位置依赖。在开发统计指标检索场景中，小型微调模型在低资源语言上优势显著，有利于通过AI助手实现公共数据的可发现性。

Abstract: We study retrieval over catalogs of structured metadata, where each record is a small schema whose fields answer different kinds of query. Embedding a record with a text encoder first serializes its fields into a string, which forces a choice of field order. We show this choice, usually treated as an implementation detail, silently controls retrieval quality once the encoder is fine-tuned. A standard fine-tune loses 7.4 nDCG@10 points when the index is rebuilt under a different field order, because it reads absolute position instead of the field labels. We propose permutation-invariant fine-tuning ($\textbf{PI-FT}$), which serializes each record under a freshly sampled field order with random field dropout, so meaning binds to the labels rather than to position. The change is about two lines in the data loader; it costs negligible in-distribution accuracy and cuts the order-change penalty to 0.2 points. We study this in the discovery of development statistics, a catalog of nearly 10,000 indicators that should be searchable in many languages by a model small enough to self-host. As AI assistants and agents increasingly mediate access to public data and statistics, this retrieval step decides whether an answer is grounded in the right indicator or series, making discoverability a precondition for disseminating data through AI. Because usage logs cannot provide training signal for indicators no one has searched, we generate the queries instead. $\textbf{DevDataBench}$ is a fully LLM-generated benchmark of grounded, facet-targeted queries across 15 languages, covering every indicator for both training and evaluation. A fine-tuned 118M-parameter CPU encoder outperforms every zero-shot baseline, including $\texttt{text-embedding-3-large}$ (0.707 vs.\ 0.556 nDCG@10), with the largest gains in low-resource languages. We release the benchmark, pipeline, models, and a reusable PI-FT framework.

</details>


### [372] [SIMAX: A Scalable and Interpretable Framework for Multi-Fidelity and Annotated Clinician-Patient Dialogue Simulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30491)
*Zhuhan Bao,Rui Yang,Bohao Yang,Zhiyi Liu,Sicheng Shu,Ruio Heerschap,Le Li,Doris Yang,Elisabeth Bond,Haoyuan Wang,Nicoleta Economou-Zavlanos,Joshua M. Biro,Matthew McDermott,Nan Liu,Anand Chowdhury,Kai Sun,Kathryn Pollak,Ed Hammond,Chuan Hong*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: SIMAX是一个用于生成受控临床对话数据并带有参考行为注释的框架，可模拟多专科、多场景的医患对话，为沟通编码系统的开发、验证和优化提供数据基础。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有临床沟通数据的人工编码成本高、不一致且难以规模化，而真实对话数据和人工编码标签同样难以大规模获取，亟需一种可扩展的受控合成数据生成方法。

Method: SIMAX基于预定义的临床场景、人物画像、语音条件及目标沟通行为生成医患对话。行为控制通过Global Codebook（整体沟通质量）和WISER Codebook（具体可计数行为）两个编码本实现。采用自动评估（UTMOS、WV-MOS、WER、CER、CLAP相似度）与人工评估（MOS、临床真实感评分）及下游编码系统评估。

Result: 生成了3,388个模拟对话，覆盖3个专科、多个就诊阶段、人物特征和口音条件。自动评估显示语音自然度合理（UTMOS 3.03、WV-MOS 2.61）、转录保真度高（WER 0.07、CER 0.05）、文本-音频对应良好（CLAP 0.41）。人工评估中位数MOS为4.67，临床真实感中位数为3.00。下游评估表明SIMAX能有效检测沟通编码系统对行为目标的响应灵敏度不足。

Conclusion: SIMAX能够生成受控且可复现的模拟医患对话，为沟通编码系统的开发、验证和优化提供了可靠的数据基础。

Abstract: Background. The widespread deployment of ambient digital scribes is driving large-scale capture of clinician-patient dialogues. Human coding of clinical communication data remains costly, inconsistent, and difficult to scale, motivating AI-driven communication coding systems. However, evaluating these systems requires real-world dialogues and human-coded labels, both hard to obtain at scale.
  Methods. We developed SIMAX (Scalable and Interpretable Framework for Multi-Fidelity and Annotated Clinician-Patient Dialogue Simulation), a framework for generating controlled clinical dialogue data with reference behavioral annotations. SIMAX generates clinician-patient dialogues from predefined clinical scenarios, personas and voice conditions, and target communication behaviors. Behaviors are controlled using two codebooks: the Global Codebook for overall communication quality and the WISER Codebook for specific countable behaviors. We evaluated SIMAX using automated and human quality assessments and an example communication coding system.
  Results. SIMAX generated 3,388 simulated dialogues across three specialties, multiple visit stages, persona characteristics, and accent conditions. Automated assessment showed mean UTMOS and WV-MOS scores of 3.03 and 2.61, WER and CER of 0.07 and 0.05, and CLAP cosine similarity of 0.41, suggesting reasonable speech naturalness, high transcription fidelity, and positive text-audio correspondence. Human evaluation showed a median MOS of 4.67 and a median clinical realism score of 3.00. Downstream evaluation suggests that SIMAX can assess how a communication coding system responds to behavioral targets and reveal insufficient sensitivity in some dimensions.
  Conclusions. SIMAX generates controlled and reproducible simulated clinician-patient dialogues, providing a data foundation for developing, validating, and refining communication coding systems.

</details>


### [373] [Regime-Aware Peer Specialization for Robust RAG under Heterogeneous Knowledge Conflicts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30518)
*Bo Wang,Heyan Huang,Yaolin Li,Yanghao Zhou,Jiahao Teng,Ziyi Yang,Ge Shi,Chong Feng*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: RAPS-DA利用多粒度、分机制的专业化同伴训练框架，在固定模型规模下通过样本级三机制路由（接地、仲裁、抵抗）和令牌级双重选择器，有效解决RAG中检索上下文与参数知识冲突的异构问题，超越多种基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: RAG中检索到的外部上下文会与模型的参数知识产生冲突，这些冲突横跨从可靠到对抗的可靠性谱系。现有方法使用机制无关的监督统一处理异构冲突，会混淆不同可靠性机制下的不相容学习信号，导致模型表现脆弱。

Method: 提出RAPS-DA分两粒度处理冲突：1) 样本级：将冲突分为Grounding（基于检索）、Arbitration（中立仲裁）和Resistance（抵抗对抗）三机制，每个机制训练一个同规模同伴专家，样本硬路由到对应专家进行on-policy反向KL监督；2) 令牌级：双重选择器利用教师间分歧、学生-教师差异和学生熵，过滤无信息/不稳定令牌，加权高置信度错误令牌，随学生成熟逐步聚焦高冲突令牌。

Result: 在五个冲突场景和两个分布外基准上，RAPS-DA超越了所有提示、解码、微调、强化学习和单教师基线方法。

Conclusion: 通过在固定模型规模下进行机制感知的专业化训练，而非依赖更强的教师模型，可以在不增加部署成本的前提下有效解决RAG中的异构冲突问题。同伴专家仅在训练阶段存在，部署时学生无需机制标签或访问同伴。

Abstract: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) improves language models by grounding generation in external context. However, it can be fragile when the retrieved context conflicts with the model's parametric knowledge. Such conflicts span a reliability spectrum, ranging from reliable and partially reliable evidence to adversarial context. Existing remedies often handle such heterogeneous conflicts with regime-agnostic supervision, which can conflate incompatible learning signals across reliability regimes. To disentangle these signals, we propose RAPS-DA, a regime-aware peer specialization framework that addresses conflict at two complementary granularities. At the sample level, conflicts are divided into three regimes, including Grounding, Arbitration, and Resistance, with one same-scale peer specialist trained per regime from a shared base model. Each sample is then hard-routed to its regime-matched peer for on-policy reverse-KL supervision. At the token level, a dual-layer selector uses inter-teacher disagreement, student-teacher divergence, and student entropy to filter uninformative or unstable tokens, upweight confidently misaligned ones, and gradually focus supervision on high-conflict tokens as the student matures. Gains stem from specialization at a fixed model scale, not from a stronger teacher, and the peer specialists exist only during training, so the deployed student requires no regime labels or peer access. Experiments on five conflict scenarios and two out-of-distribution benchmarks show RAPS-DA surpasses all prompting, decoding, fine-tuning, RL, and single-teacher baselines.

</details>


### [374] [TRACE: Temporal Relationship-Aware Conversational Entrainment Detection in Dyadic Speech](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30543)
*Sathvik Manikantan Napa Ugandhar,Hao Zhang,Alison Gunzler,Yuzhe Wang,Thomas Thebaud,Georgi Tinchev,Venkatesh Ravichandran,Laureano Moro-Velázquez*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了DyadEE数据集（用于双人语音交互中的情感韵律检测）和TRACE框架（基于窗口级声学嵌入建模对话交互轨迹），在情感韵律检测任务上实现了97.01%的准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着语音AI智能体的普及，理解对话交互中的情感韵律（emotional entrainment）变得越来越重要。情感韵律受社会关系和对话语境的影响，但目前缺乏专门针对双人语音交互中情感韵律检测的数据集和有效方法。

Method: 构建了DyadEE数据集，包含自然情感韵律对话和通过伙伴交换与情感重合成破坏韵律的合成交互；提出TRACE框架，将双人交互建模为基于情感微调Whisper表示的声学嵌入的有序序列，每个样本被视为交互轨迹而非聚合话语，采用窗口级建模方式。

Result: 在DyadEE数据集上的实验表明，引入对话上下文和关系信息能提升情感韵律检测性能，TRACE框架取得了97.01%的最佳准确率。

Conclusion: 对话上下文和关系信息对于情感韵律检测至关重要，TRACE框架通过交互轨迹建模有效捕获了双人语音中的情感韵律模式。

Abstract: With the proliferation of speech AI agents, understanding emotional entrainment in conversational interaction has become increasingly important. Emotional entrainment is shaped by social relationships and conversational context, influencing affective coordination over time. We introduce DyadEE, a dataset for emotional entrainment detection in dyadic speech interactions, containing both emotionally entrained conversations and synthetic interactions where entrainment is disrupted through partner swapping and emotion resynthesis. We further propose TRACE, a window-level framework that models dyadic interaction as ordered sequences of acoustic embeddings derived from emotion fine-tuned Whisper representations, treating each sample as an interaction trace rather than pooled utterances. Experimental results on DyadEE show that incorporating conversational context and relationship information improves emotional entrainment detection, with TRACE achieving the best accuracy of 97.01%.

</details>


### [375] [Poller: Are LLMs Suitable for Evaluating the Poetry Understanding Task?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30556)
*Shanshan Wang,Derek F. Wong,Jingming Yao,Lidia S. Chao*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出Poller（Poetry LLM Evaluator）方法，通过让大语言模型扮演诗人角色来评估现代中文诗歌理解任务，在八个专业维度上显著降低了与人类评估之间的误差，尤其在修辞手法和陌生化维度上分别实现了94.55%和89.53%的误差降低。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统自动评估方法不适用于现代中文诗歌的独特文学特性，人工评估虽可靠但成本高昂且无法大规模应用，因此需要一种兼顾效率与专业性的自动化诗歌评估方法。

Method: Poller方法要求LLM扮演诗人的角色，利用详细的诗人信息从作者视角模拟人类评估和判断，在八个专业维度（包括修辞手法和陌生化等）上进行诗歌理解评估。

Result: 在多个LLM上的实验表明，Poller方法有效降低了LLM与人类之间的评估误差，在修辞手法维度上实现94.55%的误差降低，在陌生化维度上实现89.53%的误差降低，传统LLM评估方法无法达到此性能。

Conclusion: 该工作弥合了自动化效率与人类专业判断之间的差距，为诗歌相关任务的自动化评估奠定了基础。

Abstract: Traditional automatic evaluation methods have been shown to be unsuitable for modern Chinese poetry because of the distinct nature of this literary genre. Human evaluation remains reliable, but is expensive and not applicable to large-scale data. In this paper, we propose Poller (Poetry LLM Evaluator), a novel method leveraging large language models (LLMs) to evaluate the poetry understanding task. Specifically, our method requires LLMs to play the role of a poem's author with detailed information, thereby emulating human evaluation and judgment by adopting the poet's perspective. We conducted comprehensive experiments on multiple LLMs, evaluating the interpretations of poems across eight specialized dimensions. Experimental results demonstrate that our method effectively reduces the evaluation error between LLMs and humans. Especially for specific dimension evaluation, Poller-based LLMs achieve a 94.55% and 89.53% error reduction for rhetorical techniques and defamiliarization, respectively, compared to baseline methods. These performances are unattainable by conventional LLM evaluation methods. Experimental results from multiple LLMs across various dimensions validate the efficacy of our method. This work bridges the gap between automated efficiency and human expertise, establishing a foundation for automated evaluation in poetry-related tasks.

</details>


### [376] [Morphing into Hybrid Attention Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30562)
*Disen Lan,Jianbin Zheng,Yuxi Ren,Xin Xia,Xuanda Wang,Xuefeng Xiao,Xipeng Qiu,Yu Cheng*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: FlashMorph将混合注意力层选择形式化为预算约束的子集优化问题，通过构建可变形模型（每个全注意力层配备线性注意力分支），在合成长上下文检索数据上联合优化逐层门控，然后离散化门控以实例化混合架构，最终实现高效且有效的Transformer-to-hybrid转换。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有混合层选择方法依赖启发式策略（如固定放置模式或逐层评分），隐含地将层重要性视为孤立的，忽视了全局混合配置下的层间相互依赖效应。

Method: 1) 将混合层选择形式化为预算约束的子集优化问题；2) 构建可变形模型，为每个全注意力层配备转换后的线性注意力分支；3) 冻结所有权重，在合成长上下文检索数据上联合优化逐层门控，并加入线性化正则化；4) 在预设全注意力预算下离散化学习到的门控以实例化混合架构；5) 进行标准logits蒸馏和长上下文微调。

Result: FlashMorph能发现更有效的混合配置，在保持强长上下文召回率和通用基准性能的同时，显著降低了层选择成本。

Conclusion: FlashMorph是一种有效、高效且可扩展的混合层选择方法，证明了其在Transformer-to-hybrid转换中的优越性。

Abstract: Hybrid attention models improve long-context efficiency by retaining only a subset of full-attention layers and replacing the remaining layers with linear attention. However, the effectiveness of Transformer-to-hybrid conversion critically depends on which layers preserve full attention. Existing hybrid layer selection methods typically rely on heuristic strategies such as fixed placement patterns or layerwise scoring, implicitly treating layer importance as isolated and overlooking the interdependent layer effect under a global hybrid configuration. In this work, we formulate hybrid layer selection as a budget-constrained subset optimization problem. We further propose FlashMorph (Fast LAyer Selection for Hybrid MORPHing), an effective, efficient and scalable layer selection method for Transformer-to-hybrid conversion. FlashMorph first constructs a morphable model by equipping each full-attention layer with a converted linear-attention branch. It then freezes all model weights and jointly optimizes layerwise gates on synthetic long-context retrieval data, with a linearization regularization that encourages the model to rely on linear attention for efficiency. The learned gates are discretized under a preset full-attention budget to instantiate the hybrid architecture, followed by standard logits distillation and long-context finetuning. Extensive experiments show that FlashMorph discovers more effective hybrid configurations, preserves strong long-context recall and general benchmark performance while substantially reducing layer selection cost compared with existing layer selection methods, demonstrating its effectiveness, efficiency, and scalability.

</details>


### [377] [Uncertainty-Aware Generation and Decision-Making Under Ambiguity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30578)
*Nico Daheim,Iryna Gurevych*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出并评估了基于贝叶斯决策理论和风险规避决策的不确定性感知决策算法，应用于辅导和自动同行评审任务，通过考虑策略和评分的不确定性（结合保形预测提供保证）来提升LLM决策质量。实验发现贝叶斯方法表现优于风险规避规则，后者可能因优化通用输出而降低性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM在复杂真实任务中应用广泛，但很多任务具有高度主观性且要求输出可信。尽管模型训练已取得进展，决策算法方面受到的关注较少。

Method: 基于贝叶斯决策理论和风险规避决策，对辅导策略和评审分数的不确定性进行建模，并利用保形预测提供策略/分数的统计保证，在辅导和自动同行评审任务上评估。

Result: 这些算法能提升生成的效用，但在高模糊性场景下需要谨慎实现。风险规避规则可能因优化通用输出而降低性能，贝叶斯方法则表现更好。

Conclusion: 本文利用决策理论改进基于LLM的决策过程，并为社区指出了开放挑战。

Abstract: With rapidly improving capabilities, Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly used in many complex real-world tasks. Beyond requiring in-depth knowledge and reasoning skills, many of these tasks exhibit a high degree of subjectivity and require that the outputs of the model can be trusted. While a lot of progress has been made to train better models, decision-making algorithms have received less attention. In this work, we present and evaluate various uncertainty-aware decision-making algorithms based on Bayesian decision theory and risk-averse decision making on the tasks of tutoring and automatic peer reviewing. Concretely, we take uncertainty over tutoring strategies and review scores into account when generating a tutor response or review and use conformal prediction to provide guarantees over strategy and score. We find empirically that these algorithms can improve the utility of the generations but need to be carefully implemented when ambiguity is high. For example, risk-averse rules can degrade performance by optimizing for generic outputs, while Bayesian methods tend to perform better. Our work uses techniques from decision theory to improve LLM-based decision-making and outlines open challenges for the community.

</details>


### [378] [Scaling the Horizon, Not the Parameters: Reaching Trillion-Parameter Performance with a 35B Agent](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30616)
*Lei Bai,Zongsheng Cao,Yang Chen,Zhiyao Cui,Shangheng Du,Yue Fan,Shiyang Feng,Zijie Guo,Haonan He,Liang He,Xiaohan He,Shuyue Hu,Yusong Hu,Songtao Huang,Yichen Jiang,Hao Li,Xin Li,Dahua Lin,Weihao Lin,Fenghua Ling,Dongrui Liu,Zhuo Liu,Runmin Ma,Chunjiang Mu,Haoyang Peng,Tianshuo Peng,Jinxin Shi,Luohe Shi,Boyuan Sun,Zelin Tan,Shengji Tang,Qianyi Wang,Yiming Wu,Yi Xie,Xiangchao Yan,Jingqi Ye,Peng Ye,Fangchen Yu,Jiakang Yuan,Bihao Zhan,Bo Zhang,Chen Zhang,Shufei Zhang,Shuaiyu Zhang,Wenlong Zhang,Yiqun Zhang,Junpeng Zhao,Zhijie Zhong,Bowen Zhou,Yuhao Zhou*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种35B参数的MoE智能体模型Agents-A1，通过扩展智能体视野（agent horizon）达到万亿参数级别的性能。该模型在多个长视野智能体基准测试中取得了领先或具有竞争力的结果，展示了通过扩展轨迹长度和异构能力来提升模型性能的实用路径。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究从两个角度探索智能体视野扩展：一是扩展长视野轨迹的长度，二是扩展异构智能体能力。为此构建了长视野知识-动作基础设施，产生平均长度45K token的智能体轨迹。

Method: 采用三阶段训练方案：1）全领域监督微调对齐基础模型；2）训练领域级教师模型捕获各领域专业知识；3）提出多教师领域路由在线蒸馏方法，结合显著词汇对齐提高跨领域知识迁移效率，将六个异构领域统一为一个可部署的学生模型。

Result: 在SEAL-0 (56.4)、IFBench (80.6)、HiPhO (46.4)、FrontierScience-Olympiad (79.0)、MolBench-Bind (56.8)上取得领先结果，在SciCode (44.3)、HLE (47.6)、BrowseComp (75.5)上保持强竞争力。

Conclusion: 35B参数的Agents-A1可以在长视野任务上达到或匹敌万亿参数模型的性能，为社区提供了一条实用的视野扩展路径。

Abstract: We introduce Agents-A1, a 35B Mixture-of-Experts Agentic Model that reaches trillion-parameter-level performance by scaling the agent horizon. We investigate agent-horizon scaling from two perspectives: scaling long-horizon trajectories and scaling heterogeneous agent abilities. To support this goal, we build a long-horizon knowledge-action infrastructure that connects external knowledge, actions, observations, and verifier outcomes, producing agentic trajectories with an average length of 45K tokens. Based on this, we train Agents-A1 with a three-stage recipe. First, we perform full-domain supervised fine-tuning to align the base model with broad agentic behaviors. Second, we train domain-level teacher models to capture specialized expertise in each domain. Third, we propose a multi-teacher domain-routed on-policy distillation with salient vocabulary alignment to improve knowledge transfer efficiency across different domains, unifying six heterogeneous domains into one deployable student model. Agents-A1 achieves strong and broad performance for long-horizon agent benchmarks. Compared with 1T-parameter model such as Kimi-K2.6 and DeepSeek-V4-pro, Agents-A1 achieves leading results on SEAL-0 (56.4), IFBench (80.6), HiPhO (46.4), FrontierScience-Olympiad (79.0), and MolBench-Bind (56.8), and remains highly competitive on SciCode (44.3), HLE (47.6) and BrowseComp (75.5). We hope this work provides the community with a practical path for scaling the horizon using a 35B agent that can reach or match the performance of 1T models on long-horizon tasks.

</details>


<div id='cs.GT'></div>

# cs.GT [[Back]](#toc)

### [379] [Reaching as Cheap as Possible in 1-clock Robust Weighted Timed Games](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28773)
*Nathalie Bertrand,Maëlle Gautrin,Julie Parreaux*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文研究带鲁棒语义的加权时间博弈（WTGs）中的可达性值问题，证明了1时钟WTGs的鲁棒值问题是可判定的。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 加权时间博弈（WTGs）结合了实时约束和整数权重，鲁棒性允许表示时间测量不精确性。由于一般情况下的WTGs不可判定，本文旨在识别可判定的子类。

Method: 针对1时钟WTGs，分析其鲁棒语义下的值问题，通过理论证明建立其可判定性。

Result: 证明了1时钟WTGs的鲁棒值问题是可判定的，此前仅对无环或发散的鲁棒WTGs子类可判定。

Conclusion: 本文识别了新的可判定子类（1时钟WTGs），推进了鲁棒加权时间博弈的可判定性研究。

Abstract: The value problem for 2-player games on graph generally consists in determining the minimal value Min can ensure against any possible strategy for Max. We consider here the value problem for reachability objectives in weighted timed games (WTGs) under a robust semantics. WTGs are a modelling formalism combining real-time constraints and integer weights on transitions and locations in an adversarial setting. Robustness allows for representing timing imprecisions in the measurement of delays and clock values. Robust weighted timed games have been introduced more than a decade ago: they are undecidable in general, and were quite recently shown decidable for the subclasses of acyclic or divergent robust WTGs. This paper pursues the goal of identifying decidable subclasses and establishes the decidability of the robust value problem for 1-clock WTGs.

</details>


### [380] [Exit-and-Join Dynamics and Equilibrium in Continuum Cooperative Games](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28824)
*Quanyan Zhu*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文针对非原子合作博弈中的退出与加入联盟动态，提出了一个连续统理论。它将Aumann-Shapley值和Aumann-Drèze值扩展到联盟结构，推导出确定性平均场动态，刻画了退出-加入均衡，并通过Lyapunov函数证明全局收敛性，最终统一了合作博弈价值分配、非合作联盟流动、平均场动态、演化博弈论和群体博弈。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有合作博弈理论主要关注静态联盟结构或均衡分配，缺乏对大规模多智能体系统中智能体动态退出与加入联盟行为的建模框架。本文旨在弥补这一空白，将经典价值理论扩展到动态联盟形成过程。

Method: 通过将每个联盟视为受限非原子博弈，扩展Aumann-Shapley值和Aumann-Drèze值，定义基于边际贡献的支付密度，从分散化切换规则推导确定性平均场动态，并证明支付差切换可退化为复制者动态。利用Lyapunov函数证明严格凹性下的全局收敛性，并将均衡等价于Wardrop均衡和变分不等式。

Result: 建立了退出-加入均衡与激励兼容且严格支付响应的切换率下质量动态平稳性之间的等价关系；证明了均衡与诱导非原子群体博弈的Wardrop均衡等价，并具有变分不等式表述；将框架扩展到包含切换成本和内生联盟接受规则，得到由拟变分不等式刻画的约束均衡。

Conclusion: 该理论为大规模多智能体系统中的联盟形成与适应提供了一个统一的分析框架，桥接了合作博弈价值分配、非合作博弈联盟流动性、平均场动态、演化博弈论和群体博弈等多个领域。

Abstract: This paper develops a continuum theory of exit-and-join coalition dynamics in nonatomic cooperative games. We extend the Aumann-Shapley value and the Aumann-Drèze value to coalition structures in which each coalition is treated as a restricted nonatomic game, yielding a marginal-contribution-based payoff density that governs incentives for agents to remain in, exit, or join coalitions. We derive deterministic mean-field dynamics from decentralized switching rules and show that payoff-difference switching recovers replicator dynamics as a special case. We characterize exit-and-join equilibrium by the absence of profitable positive-mass deviations and prove its equivalence with stationarity of the induced mass dynamics under incentive-compatible and strictly payoff-responsive switching rates. For mass-based cooperative games, we construct a Lyapunov function and establish global convergence under strict concavity. We further show that the equilibrium is equivalent to a Wardrop equilibrium of an induced nonatomic population game and admits a variational inequality formulation. The framework is extended to incorporate switching costs and endogenous coalition acceptance rules, leading to constrained equilibria characterized by quasi-variational inequalities. The proposed theory unifies cooperative value allocation, noncooperative coalition mobility, mean-field dynamics, evolutionary game theory, and population games within a common framework for analyzing coalition formation and adaptation in large-scale multi-agent systems.

</details>


### [381] [Pure Nash Equilibria under the Affine Mechanism: A Potential Game of Exaggeration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29010)
*Jason Jisen Li,Young Wu,Yancheng Zhu,Jin-yi Cai,Xiaojin Zhu*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文刻画了仿射机制（包含均值机制）下纯纳什均衡的完整特征，证明理性参与者必然倾向于极端夸大报告，揭示了该机制在完全信息和贝叶斯博弈中的激励问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管均值机制存在激励不兼容的问题（理性参与者有动机谎报），但其在实际中广泛使用，因此需要理解在理性行为下参与者会如何谎报，以及谎报的程度。

Method: 通过博弈论分析，对仿射机制（均值机制是其特例）下的纯纳什均衡进行完整刻画，并分别分析完全信息博弈和贝叶斯博弈两种信息结构。

Result: 完全刻画了仿射机制下纯纳什均衡的谎报模式；证明在完全信息和贝叶斯博弈中，极端夸大是不可避免的。

Conclusion: 仿射机制（包括均值机制）下，理性参与者的均衡策略必然导致极端夸大，这为理解实践中普遍存在但理论上不激励兼容的机制的运作提供了理论基础。

Abstract: The mean mechanism is known to be non-incentive-compatible, namely, rational players are incentivized to misreport their values. Despite this game-theoretic issue, the mean mechanism is prevalent in practice due to its other desirable properties. We give a full characterization of pure Nash equilibria--how the players will misreport--for the affine mechanism, of which the mean is a special case. Furthermore, we characterize both complete-information and Bayesian games under the affine mechanism. Our results highlight the inevitability of extreme exaggeration in such games.

</details>


### [382] [The Game Changer Problem: Controlling Equilibria with Discrete Rewards](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29012)
*Brandon Han,Young Wu,Shiyun Cheng,Xiaojin Zhu*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文提出了"游戏改变者问题"，即在有限奖励集合约束下，通过修改游戏的奖励矩阵使目标纯行动组合成为唯一均衡。针对两人零和博弈和一般和博弈给出了可行性刻画，并利用离散奖励结构实现了精确最优性和高效动态规划算法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在游戏设计中，外部设计者希望调整奖励结构以引导参与者选择特定的目标行动组合，而实际应用中奖励值通常来自有限集合（而非连续实数），现有基于线性规划的连续奖励重塑方法无法处理这种离散约束。

Method: 定义了游戏改变者问题，给出了两人零和博弈和一般和博弈中可行性刻画的充要条件，并利用离散奖励结构设计了高效的动态规划算法来求解最优修改。

Result: 离散奖励结构使得问题具有精确最优性（而非近似解），动态规划算法比现有的连续线性规划方法更高效且更贴合实际应用场景。

Conclusion: 该工作为有限奖励集合下的游戏均衡设计提供了理论基础和高效算法，是对连续奖励重塑方法的一种更优替代方案。

Abstract: We introduce the game changer problem, where an external designer modifies a game's reward matrix to make a target pure action profile the unique equilibrium, subject to the constraint that all entries of the reward matrix come from a finite set. We give simple feasibility characterizations for two-player zero-sum games and general-sum games, and the discrete reward structure yields exact optimality and enables efficient dynamic programming algorithms, providing a sharper alternative to prior continuous reward redesign formulations based on linear programming.

</details>


### [383] [LLM Semantic Signaling Game and Mechanism Design: Systematic Blindness, Awareness Shaping, and Mindset Dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29113)
*Quanyan Zhu*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个语义信号博弈框架，将LLM驱动的战略交互形式化为发送者选择语义控制、LLM生成随机消息、接收者依赖感知类型进行评估的过程，并通过完美贝叶斯纳什均衡分析欺骗与检测策略，数值实验验证了高斯近似及感知塑造机制对减少网络钓鱼攻击的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型正在越来越多地通过自然语言中介战略交互，使得语义控制成为沟通与欺骗的关键要素，但缺乏一个正式的理论框架来建模和分析这种语义层面的战略博弈。

Method: 构建语义信号博弈模型，包含发送者、LLM消息生成器、感知类型依赖的接收者评分机制；采用高斯近似聚合消息评分以实现似然比决策规则，通过完美贝叶斯纳什均衡刻画战略行为；并设计机制重塑接收者感知、惩罚欺骗性语义控制、修改接收者群体以诱导良性池化均衡。

Result: 数值实验验证了高斯近似的准确性，量化了感知排序效应，分析了自适应对手下的心态动态，并展示了感知塑造和护栏成本如何有效减少成功的网络钓鱼攻击。

Conclusion: 该框架为分析AI代理系统中语言中介的战略交互提供了理论基础，并为设计鲁棒且安全的人机通信提供了新工具。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) increasingly mediate strategic interactions through natural language, making semantic control a critical element of communication and deception. This paper develops a semantic signaling game in which a sender selects a semantic control, an LLM generates a stochastic message, and a receiver evaluates the message using an awareness-dependent scoring mechanism. Receiver awareness is modeled as a type that determines which linguistic features are perceived and used for inference, providing a formal model of systematic blindness. The framework connects prompt-based control, statistical detection, and game-theoretic equilibrium analysis. Gaussian approximations of aggregate message scores enable likelihood-ratio decision rules, while Perfect Bayesian Nash equilibria characterize strategic behavior. The paper further develops mechanism-design approaches that reshape receiver awareness, penalize deceptive semantic controls, and modify receiver populations to induce benign pooling equilibria. Numerical experiments validate the Gaussian approximation, quantify awareness-ordering effects, analyze mindset dynamics under adaptive adversaries, and demonstrate how awareness shaping and guardrail costs reduce successful phishing attacks. The proposed framework provides a principled foundation for analyzing strategic language-mediated interactions in agentic AI systems and offers new tools for the design of robust and secure human-AI communication.

</details>


### [384] [Projected Exploitability Descent for Nash Equilibrium Computation in Multiplayer Imperfect-Information Games](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29169)
*Sam Ganzfried*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为投影可开发性下降（PED）的新算法，用于近似多人不完美信息博弈中的纳什均衡。该算法通过最小化多人广义可开发性函数的代理项来运行，并可与虚拟博弈（FP）结合形成混合算法FP-PED，在三人Kuhn扑克等基准游戏中表现出稳定的近单调改进。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法在多人不完美信息博弈中计算纳什均衡时，要么缺乏可扩展性，要么性能不佳，亟需一种兼具可扩展性和良好性能的近似算法。

Method: 提出投影可开发性下降（PED）算法，通过运行投影次梯度下降来最小化多人广义可开发性函数的代理项。该目标函数非凸非光滑，但可表示为线性函数最大值的和，便于计算次梯度并投影到可行序列形式策略的多面体上。此外，还提出了与虚拟博弈（FP）结合的混合算法FP-PED。

Result: 在三人Kuhn扑克（牌堆大小>4）的泛化版本上，PED表现出持续的近单调改进；FP和CFR在初始迭代中表现显著更好；混合算法FP-PED结合了FP的快速初始收敛和PED的稳定长期精化优势。

Conclusion: PED为多人不完美信息博弈的纳什均衡近似提供了一种新的有效方法，通过与FP结合形成FP-PED混合算法，可以在实际应用中取得更好的整体性能。

Abstract: Many important games have more than two players and imperfect information. Existing approaches for computing Nash equilibrium, the central game-theoretic solution concept, in such games either lack scalability or obtain poor performance. In this paper we introduce a new algorithm called projected exploitability descent (PED) for approximating Nash equilibria in multiplayer games of imperfect information. The algorithm works by running projected subgradient descent minimizing a proxy for the multiplayer generalized exploitability function. The objective is nonconvex and nonsmooth, but can be represented as the sum of the maxima of linear functions, for which a subgradient can easily be computed and projected to the polytope of feasible sequence-form strategies. We explore performance of PED on a generalized version of the well-studied benchmark game three-player Kuhn poker. No prior exact algorithms scale to the version of the game with deck size larger than 4, and we compare performance to the popular algorithms of fictitious play (FP) and counterfactual regret minimization (CFR). We find that PED obtains a consistent near-monotonic improvement throughout all runs, though both FP and CFR perform significantly better in the initial iterations. This inspires a hybrid algorithm FP-PED that runs FP for an initial burn-in period before switching to PED for stable long-run refinement. We can alternatively view this as a multi-step algorithm that runs FP as a pre-processing step to obtain a strong initialization for PED.

</details>


### [385] [Generalized Bidding Games: Where Bidding and Stochastic Games Meet](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29420)
*Ali Asadi,Thomas A. Henzinger,Ehsan Kafshdar Goharshady,Pavol Kebis,Kaushik Mallik*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文提出广义竞拍博弈（Generalized Bidding Games），将回合制博弈与纯竞拍博弈统一，证明其与简单随机博弈结构等价，并解决了时序与定量规约下的博弈问题，同时研究了顶点所有权分配的修复问题（NP完全）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有回合制博弈与纯竞拍博弈各自有局限性：回合制博弈中移动权由顶点类型决定，纯竞拍博弈中完全由竞拍决定。本文希望提出一个更通用的框架，融合两种决策机制，增强表达能力，并揭示其与简单随机博弈之间的深层联系。

Method: 提出广义竞拍博弈模型，包含玩家1顶点、玩家2顶点和竞拍顶点三类顶点；通过结构等价性证明，建立广义Richman竞拍博弈与简单随机博弈之间的线性互归约关系；利用该关系求解时序（parity）和定量（mean-payoff）规约下的博弈问题；研究修复问题（将竞拍顶点分配所有者以降低获胜阈值预算），并证明其NP完全性。

Result: 广义竞拍博弈比纯竞拍博弈更具表达能力；广义Richman竞拍博弈与简单随机博弈线性互归约；parity和mean-payoff规约下的复杂度保持在$NP\cap coNP$；修复问题为NP完全。

Conclusion: 广义竞拍博弈是一个自然且表达能力更强的统一框架，其与简单随机博弈的结构等价性为求解复杂规约提供了理论工具，修复问题的NP完全性界定了组合策略合成的计算复杂度边界。

Abstract: Two-player games on graphs are a classical framework for analyzing strategic decision making. In turn-based games, two players move a token along the edges of the graph, and the right to move the token is determined by the current vertex. In pure bidding games the right to move the token is determined at each step through bidding; here we consider Richman bidding, where the winning player of a bid pays the losing player. The winner is decided based on a temporal or quantitative specification evaluated over the resulting infinite play.
  We combine turn-based games and pure bidding games into generalized bidding games, with player-1 vertices, player-2 vertices, and bidding vertices. This natural and simple generalization of bidding games has far-reaching consequences. We show that, as a model, generalized bidding games are more expressive than pure bidding games, and we provide several applications. We also show that generalized Richman bidding games are structurally equivalent to simple stochastic games: they are linearly interreducible to each other. As was previously known, the special case of pure Richman bidding games corresponds to random-turn games. In other words, generalized bidding games extend pure bidding games in the same way that simple stochastic games extend random-turn games. We use this connection to solve generalized Richman bidding games for temporal and quantitativ specifications. We establish that generalized bidding games with parity and mean-payoff specifications retain the best known upper bounds for turn-based games and pure bidding games, namely $NP\cap coNP$.
  We study a repair problem that asks whether bidding vertices can be assigned owners so as to bring the threshold budget required to win the game below a given target. This problem has direct applications in compositional policy synthesis for multi-objective settings, and we show it to be NP-complete.

</details>


### [386] [Improved Multi-Dimensional Forecasting for Swap Regret](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29533)
*Joey Rivkin,Ramiro N. Deo-Campo Vuong,Robert Kleinberg,Chido Onyeze,Erald Sinanaj,Eva Tardos*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文研究了对具有未知目标且对预测做出最佳响应的任意数量下游智能体进行预测的问题。提出了一种能够同时为所有下游智能体保证次线性交换遗憾的单一预测器。在二维结果空间中，给出了多项式时间算法，实现了$\tilde{O}(\sqrt{kT})$交换遗憾，改进了先前$\tilde{O}(kT^{5/8})$的界限并避免了指数级运行时。算法可扩展到低维环境并保持$\tilde{O}(\sqrt{T})$的下游交换遗憾。对于任意维度$d$，给出了保证$\tilde{O}(d\sqrt{kT})$交换遗憾的预测算法，改进了先前高维保证中$\tilde{O}(T^{2/3})$的依赖关系。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有预测算法在多个下游智能体同时进行决策时，无法在保证次线性交换遗憾的同时兼顾计算效率。特别是高维场景下的遗憾界限和运行时存在显著改进空间。

Method: 对于二维结果空间，提出多项式时间算法实现$\tilde{O}(\sqrt{kT})$交换遗憾；对于任意维度$d$，提出预测算法实现$\tilde{O}(d\sqrt{kT})$交换遗憾，但运行时随维度增长。

Result: 二维空间中实现了$\tilde{O}(\sqrt{kT})$交换遗憾，优于先前$\tilde{O}(kT^{5/8})$；高维空间中实现了$\tilde{O}(d\sqrt{kT})$交换遗憾，优于先前$\tilde{O}(T^{2/3})$。

Conclusion: 提出的算法在多个下游智能体场景下显著改善了交换遗憾的理论界限，并避免了指数级运行时，为低维和高维环境提供了更优的预测策略。

Abstract: We study the problem of forecasting for an arbitrary number of downstream agents with unknown objectives, each of whom best responds to the forecaster's predictions. We seek a single forecaster that guarantees sublinear swap regret for all downstream agents simultaneously. For two-dimensional outcome spaces, we give a polynomial time algorithm that guarantees $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{kT})$ swap regret for any downstream agent with $k$ actions. This improves over the previously known bound of $\tilde{O}(kT^{5/8})$ and avoids the exponential in $T$ runtime of prior algorithms in this setting. Our algorithm extends nicely to other low dimensional environments, retaining $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{T})$ downstream swap regret while the exponent of $k$ in the regret bound and the exponent of $T$ in the running time both grow with dimension. For arbitrary dimension $d$, we give a forecasting algorithm that guarantees $\tilde{O}(d\sqrt{kT})$ swap regret, assuming the forecaster knows an upper bound $k$ on the number of actions available to any downstream agent, albeit with a much longer runtime. This improves upon previous high dimensional guarantees that had $\tilde{O}(T^{2/3})$ dependence and required additional behavioral assumptions.

</details>


### [387] [Computational Complexity of Strong and Average Justified Representation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29643)
*Yizhou Ai,Biaoshuai Tao*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文研究了批准投票多赢家选举问题中两个公理（SJR和AJR）的可满足性判定问题的计算复杂性，证明SJR问题为Θ₂ᵖ-完全，AJR问题为Σ₂ᵖ-完全，并附带证明了相关复杂性类性质及一个可用于归约的集合系统构造。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 批准投票多赢家选举问题中，SJR和AJR是衡量代表公平性的重要公理，但已知满足这些公理的委员会可能不存在。因此需要研究判定是否存在满足公理的委员会的计算复杂性，以理解这些公理在实际应用中的计算可行性。

Method: 通过归约方法证明SJR和AJR判定问题的复杂性完备性。具体地，SJR问题归约到Θ₂ᵖ（P^NP[log]），AJR问题归约到Σ₂ᵖ，并证明相应的困难性。此外还研究了NP oracle的自适应查询层次性质，并构造了一种可用于归约的集合系统。

Result: SJR问题为Θ₂ᵖ-完全；AJR问题为Σ₂ᵖ-完全。同时证明在NP oracle上增加一次自适应查询不会增加计算能力（仍为Θ₂ᵖ），并构造了一个可复用的集合系统。

Conclusion: SJR的判定问题相对更易通过SAT求解器实现，而AJR的判定问题本质上更难。

Abstract: We study the approval-based multiwinner election problem where a set of $n$ voters cast approval-based ballots to a set of $m$ candidates, and we are to select a winner committee consisting of $k$ candidates. We consider two axioms: strong justified representation (SJR) and average justified representation (AJR). A winner committee satisfies SJR if the satisfaction for each voter in every $\ell$-cohesive group is at least $\ell$. AJR is a weaker axiom that requires the average satisfaction for each $\ell$-cohesive group to be at least $\ell$. It is well known that a winner committee satisfying AJR may not exist (and neither does SJR). In this paper, we study the computational complexity of the following decision problem: given an approval-based multiwinner election instance, decide if there exists a winner committee satisfying SJR/AJR. We prove that this problem is $Θ_2^p$-complete for SJR, and $Σ_2^p$-complete for AJR. Our results indicate that the decision problem with SJR is more amenable to SAT-based implementations, whereas the decision problem with AJR is substantially harder.
  As byproducts, we derive some results that are interesting in their own right. Firstly, we show that adding one more adaptive query to an NP oracle on top of polynomially many non-adaptive NP queries does not add more computational power, and the resulting complexity class is still $Θ_2^p$. Secondly, we construct a set system that can be useful in other applications, especially when doing reductions from typical satisfiability problems such as 3SAT.

</details>


### [388] [A Decision-Making Framework for New Member Integration in Renewable Energy Communities under Prospect Theory](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30083)
*Louise Sadoine,Thomas Brihaye,Zacharie De Grève*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种将新成员整合到现有可再生能源社区中的新方法，使用有限扩展式博弈论建模长期决策（投资和本地定价），用广义纳什均衡问题建模短期日前调度，并考虑异质性利益相关者偏好和有限理性（前景理论）。该方法在两个社区中进行了验证，并揭示了决策顺序、偏好标准和前景理论参数对均衡结果的影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决一个尚未充分探索的问题：如何将新成员整合到现有的可再生能源社区中。该问题涉及长期决策（投资、本地定价）和短期运营（日常能源和资金流管理）的耦合，且利益相关者偏好异质且存在有限理性。

Method: 长期决策使用有限扩展式博弈论建模；短期日前调度决策建模为广义纳什均衡问题（GNEP）；通过前景理论刻画异质性利益相关者的偏好和有限理性。

Result: 在两个社区（各5名现有成员、11名候选用户）上进行应用验证，比较了多种偏好配置和文献中的启发式指标。结果显示均衡结果和利益相关者行为受决策顺序、偏好标准及前景理论参数（尤其是参考点选择）的影响。

Conclusion: 该方法灵活通用，适用于可再生能源社区中多种目标和决策情境；揭示了决策顺序、偏好标准和前景理论参数对社区整合结果的关键影响。

Abstract: This paper introduces an original approach to an underexplored issue: the integration of a new member into an existing renewable energy community. The problem involves actions with both long-term consequences, such as investment and local pricing, and short-term operational ones, such as daily energy and financial flow management. Long-term decision-making is modeled using finite extensive-form game theory, while short-term day-ahead scheduling decisions are formulated as a generalized Nash equilibrium problem. This framework explicitly accounts for heterogeneous stakeholder preferences and bounded rationality, modeled through prospect theory. The proposed approach is flexible and general, making it applicable to various objectives and decision-making contexts in the evolving landscape of renewable energy communities. It is applied to two communities with five members, eleven candidate users, multiple preference configurations and a comparison with heuristic metrics from the literature is also addressed. The model also exhibits that equilibrium outcomes and stakeholder behavior are influenced by the order of decisions, their preference criteria, and prospect theory parameters particularly the reference point selection.

</details>


### [389] [I.i.d. Prophet Inequalities with Discounted Rewards: As Hard as the Non-i.i.d. Case](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30118)
*Jung-hun Kim,Vianney Perchet*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文研究了带折扣奖励的预言家问题，发现即使是最弱的非平稳性（i.i.d.基础奖励乘以折扣因子）也会消除经典 i.i.d. 设置的优势，使得竞争比从经典的 $1-1/e$ 退化为 $1/2$ 的硬界限，且该界限对任意停时规则均成立。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 以往预言家问题大多假设奖励独立同分布（i.i.d.），但实际场景中奖励往往随时间非平稳衰减（如折扣），作者希望探究这种结构化的弱非平稳性是否以及如何影响最优停时策略的竞争比。

Method: 聚焦单分位数阈值策略，在公共衰减因子和等长阶段的典型机制下分析竞争比；通过有效视界校准设计单分位数阈值规则，并扩展到异质衰减因子和非等长阶段；同时在无限视界连续衰减基准下分析。

Result: 在典型机制下，竞争比从经典 i.i.d. 的 $1-1/e$ 退化为 $1/2$ 硬界限；即使允许任意停时规则，$1/2$ 界限依然成立；在无限视界连续衰减基准下，任意弱的衰减也会将竞争比从 $1$ 降至 $1/2$。

Conclusion: i.i.d. 基础奖励在折扣下可以变得与完全非 i.i.d. 情况一样困难，揭示了折扣这一结构化的弱非平稳性足以摧毁经典 i.i.d. 的优势，需要重新审视动态定价和在线资源分配等场景中的算法设计。

Abstract: We study prophet inequalities with discounted rewards, where i.i.d. base rewards are multiplicatively discounted over time. Our main message is that even this structured and arbitrarily weak form of nonstationarity can erase the classical advantage of the stationary i.i.d. setting. Focusing on single-quantile threshold policies, we show that the competitive ratio transitions from the classical $1-1/e$ guarantee to a fundamental $1/2$ barrier as discounting accumulates over many phases in a canonical regime with a common-decay factor and equal-length phases. We further show that, in the same regime, the $1/2$ barrier persists even for arbitrary stopping rules. Consequently, i.i.d. base rewards under discounting can be as hard as the fully non-i.i.d. case. On the algorithmic side, we design single-quantile threshold rules that attain the tight bounds by calibrating acceptance decisions to an effective horizon induced by discounting, and we extend this calibration to heterogeneous decay factors and unequal phase lengths. We further show that a similar discontinuous breakdown persists in an infinite-horizon continuous-decay benchmark, where arbitrarily weak decay collapses the stationary benchmark from $1$ to $1/2$.

</details>


### [390] [Revenue Guarantee of Anonymous Pricing for Mixed Bidders:Bridging Value and Utility Maximizers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30162)
*Zhile Jiang,Stratis Skoulakis*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文研究了在包含传统效用最大化者和价值最大化者的异质市场中，匿名定价（AP）机制的收益保证。通过建立两类行为者之间的结构等价性，证明AP在适当定价下能达到最优收益的1/e，改进了先前仅针对纯价值最大化者的1/2(1-1/e)保证，并扩展到混合竞标者类型。同时建立了AP的1/2.62上界，并发现了一个反直觉现象：在存在价值最大化者的情况下，竞争可能反而降低收益。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机制设计日益面临包含传统效用最大化者和价值最大化者的异质环境，后者在支出回报约束下追求最大化获取价值。设计针对这种多维场景的收益最优机制在计算和理论上都具有挑战性，因此需要研究简单实用的匿名定价机制的收益保证。

Method: 通过建立价值最大化者和效用最大化者之间的结构行为等价性，分析匿名定价机制在异质市场中的收益表现，并与最优收益进行对比。

Result: AP在适当定价下能达到最优收益的1/e，优于Deng等人(2022)针对纯价值最大化者建立的1/2(1-1/e)保证，且扩展到混合竞标者类型。同时建立了AP的1/2.62上界。

Conclusion: 匿名定价机制在异质市场中具有良好的收益保证，但存在反直觉现象：在价值最大化者存在时，竞争（如一价拍卖）反而可能降低收益。

Abstract: Mechanism design increasingly faces heterogeneous environments containing both traditional utility maximizers and value maximizers, the latter of whom seek to maximize acquired value subject to Return-on-Spend constraints. Designing revenue-optimal mechanisms for such multi-dimensional settings is both computationally and theoretically challenging. To address this complexity, we investigate the revenue guarantees of \textit{Anonymous Pricing} (AP), a simple and practical mechanism, in heterogeneous markets composed of both value and utility maximizers.
  By establishing a structural behavioral equivalence between value and utility maximizers, we show that AP, with an appropriately chosen price, achieves a \(1/e\) fraction of the optimal revenue. Our result improves upon the recent \( \frac{1}{2}(1 - 1/e) \) guarantee established by Deng et al.~(2022) for pure value maximizers, while extending it to mixed bidder types (both value and utility maximizers). We additionally establish an upper bound of \(1/2.62\) for AP.
  Finally, we demonstrate a counterintuitive phenomenon: competition can reduce revenue with the presence of value maximizers. In particular, running a First-Price Auction with the exact same reserve price as AP can, in the presence of value maximizers, generate lower revenue than AP itself.

</details>


<div id='cs.CE'></div>

# cs.CE [[Back]](#toc)

### [391] [Weak Dominant Balance for Robust Identification of Dynamically Consistent Fluid Flow Structure](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29047)
*Samuel Ahnert,Esther Lagemann,H. Jane Bae,Kunihiko Taira,Ricardo Vinuesa,Christian Lagemann,Steven L. Brunton*

Main category: cs.CE

TL;DR: 本文提出弱主导平衡（Weak Dominant Balance）框架，通过将控制方程投影到弱（积分）形式，利用光滑解析测试函数进行微分，避免对噪声敏感的数据数值微分，从而能够从复杂时空数据（包括实测数据）中提取可解释的局部物理机制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 从复杂时空数据中提取可解释的局部物理机制是物理学、生物学和工程学的基础性挑战，但现有方法依赖数值微分，在噪声放大、高阶方程发散、不规则几何上失效，局限于低阶系统的干净仿真，无法应用于真实测量数据。

Method: 弱主导平衡框架：将控制方程投影到弱（积分）公式，将微分操作转移到光滑解析测试函数上，数据本身不参与微分运算，从而避开数值微分的噪声放大问题。

Result: 该方法在严重噪声下仍能准确识别主导平衡机制（现有方法在此情况下完全失败）；首次实现了湍流管道流中三阶偏微分方程的数据驱动分解；在直接数值模拟和粒子图像测速（PIV）实测数据上产生一致的分解结果，并发现了一个此前未被表征的动力学机制。

Conclusion: 弱主导平衡将机制级分析从仿真拓展到实测数据，使得复杂物理系统能够直接基于方程进行可解释性分析。

Abstract: Extracting interpretable, localized physical mechanisms from complex spatiotemporal data is a foundational challenge across physics, biology, and engineering, but has remained out of reach on real measurements. The central obstacle is obtaining high-quality gradients of data via numerical differentiation, which amplifies noise, diverges for high-order equations, and falters on irregular geometries, limiting the scope of existing approaches to clean simulations of low-order systems. Here, we present weak dominant balance, a derivative-free framework that projects governing equations into a weak (integral) formulation, offloading differentiation onto smooth analytical test functions and leaving the data untouched. The method sustains accurate regime identification under severe noise where existing approaches categorically fail, delivers the first data-driven decomposition of a third-order partial differential equation applied to turbulent duct flow, and produces matching decompositions across direct numerical simulation and particle-image velocimetry measurements of a wavy channel flow, uncovering a previously uncharacterized dynamical regime. Weak dominant balance brings mechanism-level analysis out of simulation and onto measured data, and opens complex physical systems to direct, equation-grounded interpretation.

</details>


### [392] [Toward Exascale AI for Science: A Scalable AI Skill for Autonomous Microkinetics Discovery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29100)
*Ken-ichi Nomura,William Dawson,Nabankur Dasgupta,Taufeq Mohammed Razakh,Thomas Linker,Kai Ito,Aiichiro Nakano*

Main category: cs.CE

TL;DR: 提出了一个可扩展的AI驱动框架，通过结合代理工作流自动化、高性能计算和科学代理模型，实现自主科学发现。以微观动力学发现为测试平台，展示了AI如何减少专家干预、从失败的模拟中恢复并系统评估代理模型可靠性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 减少复杂科学工作流中的人工干预，实现自主科学发现，并提高计算工作流的鲁棒性和可扩展性。

Method: 结合代理工作流自动化、高性能计算和科学代理模型，构建可扩展的AI驱动框架。

Result: AI能够减少专家干预、从失败的模拟中恢复、系统评估代理模型可靠性，将复杂领域工作流转化为稳健可扩展的能力。

Conclusion: 该框架展示了AI技能能够将复杂领域工作流转化为下一代材料研究的稳健、可扩展能力，推动了自主科学发现的发展。

Abstract: We present a scalable AI-driven framework that advances autonomous scientific discovery by combining agentic workflow automation, high-performance computing, and scientific surrogate models. Using microkinetics discovery as a testbed, the work demonstrates how AI can reduce expert intervention, recover from failed simulations, and systematically evaluate surrogate model reliability. This study shows how AI skills can transform complex domain workflows into robust, scalable capabilities for next-generation materials research.

</details>


### [393] [Structure-preserving dynamical low-rank approximation for parametric elastic guided waves](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30469)
*Dimitri Goutaudier*

Main category: cs.CE

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于动态低秩近似（DLRA）的结构保持参数化降阶模型框架，用于弹性导波的结构健康监测（SHM）。该方法在离线阶段构建时间相关辛约化基，并针对简化参数依赖推导出非线性基演化方程的闭式解，从而在波传播阶段实现闭式、能量守恒的约化传播子，无需在线时间积分。在二维弹性问题上的验证表明，该方法实现了高压缩比（秩约10-30）、低全场重构误差（~10^{-3}-10^{-2}）、两到三个数量级的加速以及优异的长时间能量守恒性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高保真弹性导波模拟在多查询场景下计算成本过高，而传统的基于静态线性子空间的投影降阶模型难以处理弹性导波的输运主导和色散特性，同时需要保持哈密顿结构以确保能量守恒。DLRA虽已成功用于其他波动方程，但尚未应用于结构健康监测中的弹性导波问题。

Method: 提出一种结构保持的参数化ROM框架，采用DLRA在离线/在线策略中构建。离线阶段从训练模拟中构造时间相关的辛约化基；针对简化参数依赖，推导出非线性基演化方程的闭式解，进而得到闭式、能量守恒的约化传播子，消除加载阶段后的在线时间积分。

Result: 在二维弹性问题（含色散导波与损伤相互作用）上验证：压缩比高（秩约10-30）、全场重构误差低（~10^{-3}-10^{-2}）、实现两到三个数量级的加速、长时间能量守恒性能优异。

Conclusion: 所提出的DLRA框架能够有效解决弹性导波模拟中的计算效率问题，同时保持物理结构（能量守恒），为SHM多查询场景提供了一种高效的降阶建模方案。

Abstract: Elastic guided waves are widely used in Structural Health Monitoring (SHM). In many-query settings, the computational cost of high-fidelity simulations motivates the use of projection-based reduced order modeling (ROM). However, the transport-dominated and dispersive nature of guided waves challenges static linear subspaces. In addition, preserving the Hamiltonian structure of the equations for energy conservation necessitates dedicated projection techniques. While the Dynamical Low Rank Approximation (DLRA) has proven effective for other wave equations, its application to elastic guided waves in SHM has remained unexplored. In this work, we introduce a structure-preserving parametric ROM framework that leverages the DLRA in an off-line/on-line strategy. During the off-line stage, a time-dependent symplectic reduced basis is constructed from training simulations. For a simplified class of parameter dependencies, we derive a closed-form solution of the nonlinear basis evolution equation. This analytical result yields a closed-form, energy-preserving reduced propagator during wave propagation, eliminating on-line time integration after the loading phase. We validate our approach on a 2D elasticity problem featuring dispersive guided waves interacting with a damage. The results demonstrate high compression ratios (rank $\sim 10-30$), low full field reconstruction errors ($\sim 10^{-3}-10^{-2}$), speedups of two to three orders of magnitude, and excellent long-time energy conservation.

</details>


<div id='cs.IT'></div>

# cs.IT [[Back]](#toc)

### [394] [Convertible Codes: MSR-to-MSR Conversion with Optimal Access and Bandwidth](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28729)
*Yumeng Yang,Han Cai,Xianfu Lei,Xiaohu Tang*

Main category: cs.IT

TL;DR: 本文研究合并场景下的可转换码，聚焦最小存储再生（MSR）设置，提出显式MSR-to-MSR转换方案，在不规则设置中实现最优访问成本，并通过行匹配技术在相同码设置中同时实现最优访问成本和转换带宽。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究分布式存储系统中可转换码在合并场景下的应用，特别是同时保证初始码和最终码具有最优单节点修复能力（MSR属性），并优化转换过程中的访问成本和带宽开销。

Method: 针对不规则设置（m个初始码参数不同）提出最优访问成本方案；针对相同码设置引入行匹配技术，实现大多数参数范围内最优访问成本和转换带宽的同时达成。

Result: 在不规则设置中实现了最优访问成本；在相同码设置中，通过行匹配技术，在大多数参数范围内同时达到最优访问成本和最优转换带宽。

Conclusion: 本文提出的MSR-to-MSR转换方案能够高效支持分布式存储系统的码合并操作，在保证修复最优性的同时优化了转换效率。

Abstract: In this paper, we study convertible codes in the merge regime and focus on the minimum storage regenerating (MSR) setting, where both the initial codes and the final code admit optimal single-node repair. We propose explicit MSR-to-MSR conversion schemes and analyze their performance in terms of access cost and conversion bandwidth.
  We first construct convertible MSR codes in the irregular setting, where the $m$ initial codes may have different parameters, achieving optimal access cost. We further consider the practically important same-code setting, where all initial codewords are drawn from the same MSR code. By introducing a row-matching technique, we obtain constructions simultaneously achieving optimal access cost and conversion bandwidth in most parameter regimes.

</details>


### [395] [Brownian Bridge Diffusion-Based Joint Channel Estimation and Data Detection for Jamming-Resilient Receivers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28778)
*Honghan She,Yufan Cheng,Tieming Sun,Pengyu Wang,Siya Huang,Kaikai Yang*

Main category: cs.IT

TL;DR: 针对无线网络中导频和数据符号遭受干扰污染导致接收端联合估计与检测性能瓶颈的问题，提出基于布朗桥扩散的联合信道估计与数据检测框架(BBD-JCED)，通过STFT域干扰特征提取与抑制、布朗桥扩散过程建模以及快速ODE求解器，实现了低复杂度、高性能的抗干扰接收。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方案缺乏有效对抗干扰污染的统一框架，难以保障可靠传输；当干扰在时频域与导频和数据符号重叠时，对接收端联合估计与检测造成严重瓶颈。

Method: 提出BBD-JCED框架，包含两个核心模块：(1) STFT域干扰特征提取与干扰样本抑制，提升SJNR；(2) 引入布朗桥扩散(BBD)过程建模抑制后信号与编码比特在信道估计误差下的演化，实现增强型联合信道估计与数据检测；并推导快速ODE求解器以降低BBD过程计算负担，设计多模块训练算法提升数据恢复能力。

Result: 相比基线方案，所提框架在保持更低模型参数数量和竞争性计算复杂度的同时，实现了更优的比特恢复性能。

Conclusion: BBD-JCED框架有效提升了抗干扰接收性能，兼顾了低复杂度与高可靠性，为下一代无线网络中的抗干扰通信提供了新思路。

Abstract: In next-generation wireless networks, the growing density of devices and limited spectrum resources pose severe jamming challenges to fragile legitimate communication links in the wireless electromagnetic environment. Crucially, when jamming overlaps with pilot and data symbols in both time and frequency domains, it inflicts a severe bottleneck on receiver-side joint estimation and detection. Existing schemes often lack an effective framework to combat such jamming contamination, thereby failing to guarantee reliable transmission. To address this issue, we propose a Brownian bridge diffusion-based joint channel estimation and data detection framework (BBD-JCED) for jamming-resilient receivers. Specifically, the proposed framework comprises two core modules: the first extracts jamming features in the short-time Fourier transform (STFT) domain and suppresses jamming samples, thereby improving the signal-to-jamming-plus-noise ratio (SJNR) of the received signal; the second introduces a Brownian bridge diffusion (BBD) process to model the evolution of the suppressed signal and the encoded bits in the presence of channel estimation errors, thereby enabling enhanced joint channel estimation and data detection. To alleviate the computational burden of the BBD process in the second module, we further derive a fast ordinary differential equation (ODE) solver that enables its low-complexity iterative evolution. Finally, we design a multi-module training algorithm to improve the data recovery capability of the proposed framework. Simulation results demonstrate that the proposed framework achieves superior bit recovery performance compared with baseline schemes while maintaining a lower number of model parameters and competitive computational complexity.

</details>


### [396] [Salami Slicing Trellis for Synchronization Errors in DNA Coding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28802)
*Tsung-Han Wu,Joseph Swernofsky,Hsin-Po Wang*

Main category: cs.IT

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种结合"萨拉米切片网格"与极化码的编码方案，通过逐位置推进网格和跨链极化解码的交替迭代，有效应对DNA存储信道中的替换、插入和删除三种错误，仿真表明其性能接近理论容量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: DNA存储信道同时存在替换、插入和删除三种噪声，现有编码方案难以高效应对所有三种错误类型，因此需要开发具有高效编解码器的纠错码来联合对抗这三类噪声。

Method: 提出"萨拉米切片网格"（salami-slicing trellis）——一种决策反馈网格，沿每条链计算逐位后验概率，并与跨链极化码结合。解码器交替执行：将网格向前推进一个位置，对得到的跨链切片进行极化解码，再将解码比特反馈回网格用于下一位置。

Result: 仿真结果表明，所提出的编码方案性能接近替换-插入-删除信道的猜想容量。

Conclusion: 该方案为DNA存储中同时存在三种错误类型的信道提供了一种逼近容量极限的实用编码方法。

Abstract: On top of substitution errors, DNA storage channels suffer from both insertions and deletions at the same time. It is therefore important to develop error-correcting codes with efficient encoders and decoders that can combat all three types of noise. This paper introduces the salami-slicing trellis, a decision-feedback trellis that computes bitwise posterior probabilities along each strand and is coupled with polar codes across strands. The decoder alternates between advancing the trellises by one position and polar-decoding the resulting cross-strand slice, feeding the decoded bits back to the trellises for the next position. Simulations suggest that the resulting coding scheme approaches the conjectured capacity of the substitution-insertion-deletion channel.

</details>


### [397] [Channel Capacity under the Subtractive Dithered Quantization Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28842)
*Hossein Atrsaei,Mireille Sarkiss,Michèle Wigger*

Main category: cs.IT

TL;DR: 本文研究了加性高斯白噪声信道后接减性抖动均匀量化器的信道容量，在Schuchman条件及过载概率可忽略的假设下，推导了平均功率和峰值幅度约束下的容量上下界，发现K级量化器下K个质量点的离散星座能实现接近最优的速率，且上界在中高信噪比下紧贴下界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 实际通信系统中量化器广泛存在，理解量化信道的基本容量极限对于系统设计和性能评估具有重要意义。

Method: 利用Schuchman条件得到加性噪声表示；基于熵功率不等式(EPI)和最大熵输入得到可计算下界；使用离散输入星座获得更紧的数值下界；利用高斯分布在方差约束下最大化熵的性质推导上界。

Result: K级量化器下，K个质量点的离散星座在测试族中已接近最优速率；上界在中高信噪比区域接近下界，可作为该区域的简单容量近似。

Conclusion: 该研究为带量化器的AWGN信道提供了紧致的容量界，离散星座在实际中高效可行，上界在中高SNR下具有良好的近似效果。

Abstract: We study the capacity of an additive white Gaussian noise (AWGN) channel followed by a subtractive dithered uniform quantizer. Under the Schuchman conditions and with negligible overload probability, the system admits an additive-noise representation in which the effective noise is the sum of Gaussian and uniform components. Capacity bounds are derived for this model when inputs are subject to an average-power constraint as well as a peak-amplitude constraint, where the latter accounts for the limited quantizer dynamic range. Specifically, a computable lower bound is obtained based on the entropy power inequality (EPI), using the maximum-entropy input under the above constraints. Tighter numerical lower bounds are derived using discrete input constellations with finite mass points. Finally, an upper bound is obtained by exploiting the fact that Gaussian distributions maximize entropy under a variance constraint. Numerical results show that, for a K-level quantizer, discrete constellations with K mass points already achieve near-optimal rates among the tested families. Moreover, our upper bound is close to the lower bounds in the moderate-SNR regime; it thus represents a good and simple capacity approximation in this regime.

</details>


### [398] [A Theoretical Interpretation of In-Context Learning via Probabilistic Modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28926)
*Zhenyu Liu,Huaze Tang,Shao-Lun Huang*

Main category: cs.IT

TL;DR: 本文提出了上下文学习（ICL）的概率模型，并对其在一般参数分布和指数族分布下的性能进行了严格的理论分析，揭示了示例数量、模型参数敏感度以及示例与查询相似度对ICL性能的影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管上下文学习（ICL）在大型语言模型中表现出色，但缺乏统一的数学模型和严格的理论分析来解释其工作原理及影响因素。

Method: 提出一个概率模型来建模ICL过程，分别针对一般参数分布和指数族分布推导出ICL的性能表达式，并基于推导结果分析多个影响因素。

Result: 成功推导了ICL在一般参数分布和指数族分布下的理论性能，并量化分析了示例数量、模型参数敏感度以及示例-查询相似度对ICL性能的影响。

Conclusion: 该工作为ICL提供了理论基础，解释了其性能受多种因素影响的机理，有助于更深入地理解和优化上下文学习范式。

Abstract: In-context learning (ICL) is an emerging paradigm that employs the semantic information inherent in large language models (LLMs) for generating answers to user queries. While the remarkable performance of ICL has been widely known, a general modeling and a rigorous theoretical analysis of this paradigm are still lacking. This work presents a probabilistic model for ICL and derives the performance of ICL for both general parametric distributions and exponential families. Based on the derived results, the work explains the impact of multiple factors such as the number of demonstrations, the sensitivity of the probabilistic model to the variation of its parameters, as well as the similarity between the demonstrations and the query on the performance of ICL.

</details>


### [399] [Modeling and Analysis of Sensing Assisted UAV Networks for Urban Vehicular Communications](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28940)
*Kaushlendra Pandey,Nithin V Sabu,Abhishek K. Gupta*

Main category: cs.IT

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种面向城市车载网络的感知辅助无人机网络，利用曼哈顿泊松线过程（MPLP）和一维PPP建模道路与车辆分布，二维PPP建模无人机分布，并结合高度依赖的阻塞模型，推导了检测概率、拉普拉斯变换、覆盖概率和速率覆盖，发现增加高度会降低感知和覆盖性能，而速率覆盖呈非单调变化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 城市车载网络需要在道路受限环境中实现无缝连接和态势感知，促使部署能够同时感知车辆并建立通信的无人机平台。

Method: 将城市道路网络建模为MPLP，车辆分布建模为一维PPP，无人机分布建模为二维PPP（结合固定高度形成三维空间构型）；引入仰角依赖的阻塞模型，基于检测概率定义感知半径；推导检测概率、聚合干扰的拉普拉斯变换、覆盖概率和速率覆盖。

Result: 增加高度会降低感知和覆盖性能；速率覆盖呈现非单调趋势——先随高度下降，后随高度上升。

Conclusion: 所提出的感知辅助无人机网络框架能够有效分析城市环境中无人机的感知与通信性能，揭示了高度对各项性能指标的不同影响规律。

Abstract: Urban vehicular networks (VNs) demand seamless connectivity and situational awareness within road-constrained environments, motivating the deployment of unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) platforms capable of simultaneously sensing vehicles and establishing communication with them. In this paper, we present a sensing-assisted UAV network that provides connectivity to the vehicles in an urban area. The road network of the urban area is modeled as Manhattan Poisson line process (MPLP), and the random location of vehicles on each road is modeled as one dimensional Poisson point processes (PPPs). UAVs are distributed in the urban area at a fixed altitude and provide connectivity after sensing the vehicles. Their locations are modeled as a two-dimensional homogeneous PPP. Combined with the fixed altitude, this results in a three-dimensional spatial configuration. We incorporate an elevation dependent blockage model and define the sensing radius based on detection probability (DP), showing that it is jointly limited by signal strength and blockage effects.
